```
1: <?php
2: 
3: class Card
4: {
5:     public static function getBySetAndLevels(
6:         ?int $setId,
7:         array $levels,
8:         bool $randomMode = false,
9:         int $limit = 500,
10:         ?int $excludeUserId = null,
11:         ?array $setIds = null
12:     ): array {
13:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
14:         $sql = "SELECT c.id, c.set_id, c.title, c.pattern_type, c.level, c.question_text, c.content_data, s.name AS set_name FROM cards c LEFT JOIN card_sets s ON c.set_id = s.id WHERE 1=1";
15:         $params = [];
16: 
17:         if (!$randomMode && $setId !== null && $setId > 0) {
18:             $sql .= " AND c.set_id = ?";
19:             $params[] = $setId;
20:         } elseif (!$randomMode && ($setId === null || $setId === 0)) {
21:             $sql .= " AND c.set_id = 1";
22:         }
23: 
24:         if ($randomMode && !empty($setIds)) {
25:             $placeholders = implode(',', array_fill(0, count($setIds), '?'));
26:             $sql .= " AND c.set_id IN ($placeholders)";
27:             foreach ($setIds as $sid) {
28:                 $params[] = (int) $sid;
29:             }
30:         }
31: 
32:         if (!empty($levels)) {
33:             $placeholders = implode(',', array_fill(0, count($levels), '?'));
34:             $sql .= " AND c.level IN ($placeholders)";
35:             foreach ($levels as $level) {
36:                 $params[] = $level;
37:             }
38:         }
39: 
40:         if ($excludeUserId !== null && $excludeUserId > 0) {
41:             $sql .= " AND c.id NOT IN (SELECT card_id FROM user_card_progress WHERE user_id = ? AND next_review > CURDATE())";
42:             $params[] = $excludeUserId;
43:         }
44: 
45:         $sql .= " ORDER BY c.id ASC LIMIT " . (int) $limit;
46: 
47:         $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
48:         $stmt->execute($params);
49:         $cards = $stmt->fetchAll();
50: 
51:         foreach ($cards as &$card) {
52:             if (!empty($card['content_data'])) {
53:                 $decoded = json_decode($card['content_data'], true);
54:                 $card['content_data'] = $decoded ?: [];
55:             } else {
56:                 $card['content_data'] = [];
57:             }
58:         }
59: 
60:         return $cards;
61:     }
62: 
63:     public static function getBySet(int $setId): array
64:     {
65:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
66:         $stmt = $pdo->prepare("SELECT id, set_id, title, pattern_type, level, question_text, content_data FROM cards WHERE set_id = ? ORDER BY id");
67:         $stmt->execute([$setId]);
68:         return $stmt->fetchAll();
69:     }
70: 
71:     public static function getById(int $id): ?array
72:     {
73:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
74:         $stmt = $pdo->prepare("SELECT * FROM cards WHERE id = ?");
75:         $stmt->execute([$id]);
76:         $row = $stmt->fetch();
77:         return $row ?: null;
78:     }
79: 
80:     public static function findDuplicate(int $setId, string $title, string $patternType, ?int $excludeId = null): ?int
81:     {
82:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
83:         $sql = "SELECT id FROM cards WHERE set_id = ? AND title = ? AND pattern_type = ?";
84:         $params = [$setId, $title, $patternType];
85:         if ($excludeId !== null) {
86:             $sql .= " AND id != ?";
87:             $params[] = $excludeId;
88:         }
89:         $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
90:         $stmt->execute($params);
91:         $row = $stmt->fetch();
92:         return $row ? (int) $row['id'] : null;
93:     }
94: 
95:     public static function save(array $data): int
96:     {
97:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
98:         $id = (int) ($data['id'] ?? 0);
99:         $setId = (int) ($data['set_id'] ?? 1);
100:         $title = $data['title'] ?? '';
101:         $patternType = $data['pattern_type'] ?? 'usage_cases';
102:         $level = $data['level'] ?? 'Beginner';
103:         $questionText = $data['question_text'] ?? '';
104:         $contentData = json_encode($data['content_data'] ?? []);
105: 
106:         // Auto-fix ENUM if it doesn't include the pattern type yet
107:         static::ensurePatternTypeEnum($patternType);
108: 
109:         if ($id > 0) {
110:             $stmt = $pdo->prepare("UPDATE cards SET set_id=?, title=?, pattern_type=?, level=?, question_text=?, content_data=? WHERE id=?");
111:             $stmt->execute([$setId, $title, $patternType, $level, $questionText, $contentData, $id]);
112:             return $id;
113:         } else {
114:             $existing = self::findDuplicate($setId, $title, $patternType);
115:             if ($existing !== null) {
116:                 return $existing;
117:             }
118:             $stmt = $pdo->prepare("INSERT INTO cards (set_id, title, pattern_type, level, question_text, content_data) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?)");
119:             $stmt->execute([$setId, $title, $patternType, $level, $questionText, $contentData]);
120:             return (int) $pdo->lastInsertId();
121:         }
122:     }
123: 
124:     public static function delete(int $id): void
125:     {
126:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
127:         $stmt = $pdo->prepare("DELETE FROM cards WHERE id = ?");
128:         $stmt->execute([$id]);
129:     }
130: 
131:     private static function ensurePatternTypeEnum(string $type): void
132:     {
133:         $known = ['usage_cases','deep_dive','formula_table','multiple_choice','gap_fill','image_description','audio_listening'];
134:         if (!in_array($type, $known)) return;
135: 
136:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
137:         $col = $pdo->query("SHOW COLUMNS FROM cards WHERE Field = 'pattern_type'")->fetch();
138:         if (!$col) return;
139: 
140:         $enum = $col['Type']; // e.g. "enum('usage_cases','deep_dive',...)"
141:         if (strpos($enum, $type) !== false) return; // already present
142: 
143:         // Rebuild ENUM with all known types
144:         $escaped = array_map(fn($v) => "'" . str_replace("'", "''", $v) . "'", $known);
145:         $pdo->exec("ALTER TABLE cards MODIFY pattern_type ENUM(" . implode(',', $escaped) . ") DEFAULT 'usage_cases'");
146:     }
147: }

(End of file - total 147 lines)
```

```
1: <?php
2: 
3: class Review
4: {
5:     private const MIN_EF = 1.3;
6:     private const INITIAL_EF = 2.5;
7: 
8:     public static function ensureTable(): void
9:     {
10:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
11:         $pdo->exec("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_card_progress (
12:             id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
13:             user_id INT NOT NULL,
14:             card_id INT NOT NULL,
15:             ease_factor FLOAT DEFAULT 2.5,
16:             interval_days INT DEFAULT 0,
17:             repetitions INT DEFAULT 0,
18:             next_review DATE,
19:             last_review DATE,
20:             correct_streak INT DEFAULT 0,
21:             was_correct TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,
22:             total_reviews INT DEFAULT 0,
23:             FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
24:             FOREIGN KEY (card_id) REFERENCES cards(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
25:             UNIQUE KEY unique_pair (user_id, card_id)
26:         )");
27: 
28:         $stmt = $pdo->query("SHOW TABLES LIKE 'user_card_progress'");
29:         if (!$stmt->fetch()) {
30:             $pdo->exec("ALTER TABLE student_card_progress RENAME TO user_card_progress");
31:         }
32: 
33:         $stmt = $pdo->query("SHOW COLUMNS FROM user_card_progress LIKE 'user_id'");
34:         if (!$stmt->fetch()) {
35:             $pdo->exec("ALTER TABLE user_card_progress CHANGE student_id user_id INT NOT NULL");
36:         }
37: 
38:         $stmt = $pdo->query("SHOW COLUMNS FROM user_card_progress LIKE 'repetitions'");
39:         if (!$stmt->fetch()) {
40:             $pdo->exec("ALTER TABLE user_card_progress ADD COLUMN repetitions INT DEFAULT 0 AFTER interval_days");
41:         }
42:     }
43: 
44:     public static function ensureHistoryTable(): void
45:     {
46:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
47:         $pdo->exec("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS review_history (
48:             id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
49:             user_id INT NOT NULL,
50:             card_id INT NOT NULL,
51:             quality INT NOT NULL,
52:             was_correct TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,
53:             reviewed_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
54:             FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
55:             FOREIGN KEY (card_id) REFERENCES cards(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
56:         )");
57:     }
58: 
59:     /**
60:      * SM-2 algorithm implementation.
61:      * Quality mapping: 0=Again(blackout), 2=Good(recalled with effort), 3=Easy(perfect)
62:      */
63:     public static function record(int $cardId, int $userId, int $quality, bool $wasCorrect): void
64:     {
65:         self::ensureTable();
66:         self::ensureHistoryTable();
67:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
68: 
69:         $stmt = $pdo->prepare("SELECT id, ease_factor, interval_days, repetitions, correct_streak FROM user_card_progress WHERE user_id = ? AND card_id = ?");
70:         $stmt->execute([$userId, $cardId]);
71:         $progress = $stmt->fetch();
72: 
73:         $today = date('Y-m-d');
74: 
75:         if ($wasCorrect && $quality >= 2) {
76:             $ef = $progress ? (float) $progress['ease_factor'] : self::INITIAL_EF;
77:             $rep = $progress ? (int) $progress['repetitions'] : 0;
78:             $prevInterval = $progress ? (int) $progress['interval_days'] : 0;
79: 
80:             $newEF = $ef + (0.1 - (5 - $quality) * (0.08 + (5 - $quality) * 0.02));
81:             if ($newEF < self::MIN_EF) $newEF = self::MIN_EF;
82: 
83:             if ($rep === 0) {
84:                 $interval = 1;
85:             } elseif ($rep === 1) {
86:                 $interval = 6;
87:             } else {
88:                 $interval = (int) round($prevInterval * $ef);
89:             }
90: 
91:             $rep++;
92:             $streak = $progress ? (int) $progress['correct_streak'] + 1 : 1;
93:             $nextReview = date('Y-m-d', strtotime("+$interval days"));
94:         } else {
95:             $newEF = $progress ? (float) $progress['ease_factor'] : self::INITIAL_EF;
96:             $interval = 1;
97:             $rep = 0;
98:             $streak = 0;
99:             $nextReview = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('+1 day'));
100:         }
101: 
102:         if ($progress) {
103:             $stmt = $pdo->prepare("
104:                 UPDATE user_card_progress
105:                 SET ease_factor = ?, interval_days = ?, repetitions = ?, next_review = ?,
106:                     last_review = ?, correct_streak = ?, was_correct = ?, total_reviews = total_reviews + 1
107:                 WHERE user_id = ? AND card_id = ?
108:             ");
109:             $stmt->execute([$newEF, $interval, $rep, $nextReview, $today, $streak, $wasCorrect ? 1 : 0, $userId, $cardId]);
110:         } else {
111:             $stmt = $pdo->prepare("
112:                 INSERT INTO user_card_progress (user_id, card_id, ease_factor, interval_days, repetitions, next_review, last_review, correct_streak, was_correct, total_reviews)
113:                 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 1)
114:             ");
115:             $stmt->execute([$userId, $cardId, $newEF, $interval, $rep, $nextReview, $today, $streak, $wasCorrect ? 1 : 0]);
116:         }
117: 
118:         $stmt = $pdo->prepare("INSERT INTO review_history (user_id, card_id, quality, was_correct) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)");
119:         $stmt->execute([$userId, $cardId, $quality, $wasCorrect ? 1 : 0]);
120:     }
121: 
122:     public static function resetForUser(int $userId): void
123:     {
124:         self::ensureTable();
125:         self::ensureHistoryTable();
126:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
127:         $pdo->prepare("DELETE FROM review_history WHERE user_id = ?")->execute([$userId]);
128:         $pdo->prepare("DELETE FROM user_card_progress WHERE user_id = ?")->execute([$userId]);
129:     }
130: 
131:     public static function ensureSetAccessTable(): void
132:     {
133:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
134:         $pdo->exec("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS student_set_access (
135:             user_id INT NOT NULL,
136:             set_id INT NOT NULL,
137:             PRIMARY KEY (user_id, set_id),
138:             FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
139:             FOREIGN KEY (set_id) REFERENCES card_sets(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
140:         )");
141:     }
142: 
143:     public static function getAccessibleSets(int $userId): array
144:     {
145:         self::ensureSetAccessTable();
146:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
147:         $stmt = $pdo->prepare("SELECT set_id FROM student_set_access WHERE user_id = ?");
148:         $stmt->execute([$userId]);
149:         return $stmt->fetchAll(\PDO::FETCH_COLUMN);
150:     }
151: 
152:     public static function setAccessibleSets(int $userId, array $setIds): void
153:     {
154:         self::ensureSetAccessTable();
155:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
156:         $pdo->prepare("DELETE FROM student_set_access WHERE user_id = ?")->execute([$userId]);
157:         $stmt = $pdo->prepare("INSERT INTO student_set_access (user_id, set_id) VALUES (?, ?)");
158:         foreach ($setIds as $setId) {
159:             $stmt->execute([$userId, (int) $setId]);
160:         }
161:     }
162: 
163:     public static function hasAccessToSet(int $userId, int $setId): bool
164:     {
165:         $sets = self::getAccessibleSets($userId);
166:         if (empty($sets)) return true;
167:         return in_array($setId, $sets);
168:     }
169: 
170:     public static function isWithin30DayCycle(int $userId): bool
171:     {
172:         self::ensureHistoryTable();
173:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
174:         $stmt = $pdo->prepare("SELECT MIN(reviewed_at) FROM review_history WHERE user_id = ?");
175:         $stmt->execute([$userId]);
176:         $firstReview = $stmt->fetchColumn();
177:         if (!$firstReview) return false;
178:         $daysSinceFirst = (new \DateTime())->diff(new \DateTime($firstReview))->days;
179:         return $daysSinceFirst < 30;
180:     }
181: 
182:     public static function checkAndResetCycle(int $userId): bool
183:     {
184:         if (!self::isWithin30DayCycle($userId)) {
185:             $stats = self::getStats($userId);
186:             if ($stats['total_reviews'] > 0) {
187:                 self::resetForUser($userId);
188:                 return true;
189:             }
190:         }
191:         return false;
192:     }
193: 
194:     public static function getStreakDays(int $userId): int
195:     {
196:         self::ensureHistoryTable();
197:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
198:         $stmt = $pdo->prepare("
199:             SELECT DISTINCT DATE(reviewed_at) as review_date
200:             FROM review_history
201:             WHERE user_id = ?
202:             ORDER BY review_date DESC
203:         ");
204:         $stmt->execute([$userId]);
205:         $dates = $stmt->fetchAll(\PDO::FETCH_COLUMN);
206: 
207:         if (empty($dates)) return 0;
208: 
209:         $streak = 0;
210:         $today = new \DateTime();
211:         $checkDate = clone $today;
212: 
213:         foreach ($dates as $dateStr) {
214:             $date = new \DateTime($dateStr);
215:             $diff = (int) $checkDate->diff($date)->days;
216: 
217:             if ($streak === 0) {
218:                 if ($diff <= 1) {
219:                     $streak = 1;
220:                     $checkDate = $date;
221:                 } else {
222:                     break;
223:                 }
224:             } else {
225:                 if ($diff === 1) {
226:                     $streak++;
227:                     $checkDate = $date;
228:                 } else {
229:                     break;
230:                 }
231:             }
232:         }
233: 
234:         return $streak;
235:     }
236: 
237:     public static function getStats(int $userId): array
238:     {
239:         self::ensureTable();
240:         self::ensureHistoryTable();
241:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
242: 
243:         $total = $pdo->prepare("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_history WHERE user_id = ?");
244:         $total->execute([$userId]);
245:         $totalReviews = (int) $total->fetchColumn();
246: 
247:         $correct = $pdo->prepare("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_history WHERE user_id = ? AND was_correct = 1");
248:         $correct->execute([$userId]);
249:         $correctCount = (int) $correct->fetchColumn();
250: 
251:         $distinctCards = $pdo->prepare("SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT card_id) FROM review_history WHERE user_id = ?");
252:         $distinctCards->execute([$userId]);
253:         $cardsReviewed = (int) $distinctCards->fetchColumn();
254: 
255:         $daily = $pdo->prepare("
256:             SELECT DATE(reviewed_at) as day, COUNT(*) as count
257:             FROM review_history
258:             WHERE user_id = ? AND reviewed_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
259:             GROUP BY DATE(reviewed_at)
260:             ORDER BY day ASC
261:         ");
262:         $daily->execute([$userId]);
263:         $dailyStats = $daily->fetchAll();
264: 
265:         $upcoming = $pdo->prepare("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_card_progress WHERE user_id = ? AND next_review <= CURDATE()");
266:         $upcoming->execute([$userId]);
267:         $dueToday = (int) $upcoming->fetchColumn();
268: 
269:         $streak = self::getStreakDays($userId);
270: 
271:         $totalCards = $pdo->prepare("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cards");
272:         $totalCards->execute();
273:         $totalCardCount = (int) $totalCards->fetchColumn();
274: 
275:         $stmt = $pdo->prepare("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_card_progress WHERE user_id = ? AND repetitions >= 1");
276:         $stmt->execute([$userId]);
277:         $learnedCount = (int) $stmt->fetchColumn();
278: 
279:         $progress = $totalCardCount > 0 ? (int) round(($learnedCount / $totalCardCount) * 100) : 0;
280: 
281:         return [
282:             'total_reviews' => $totalReviews,
283:             'correct_count' => $correctCount,
284:             'incorrect_count' => $totalReviews - $correctCount,
285:             'cards_reviewed' => $cardsReviewed,
286:             'daily' => $dailyStats,
287:             'due_today' => $dueToday,
288:             'streak_days' => $streak,
289:             'learned_count' => $learnedCount,
290:             'total_cards' => $totalCardCount,
291:             'progress' => $progress,
292:         ];
293:     }
294: }

(End of file - total 294 lines)
</content>
```

```
117:         $ps->execute(array_merge([$studentId], $ids));
118:         $pmap = [];
119:         foreach ($ps->fetchAll() as $r) { $pmap[$r['card_id']] = $r; }
120:         foreach ($cards as &$c) { $c['progress'] = $pmap[$c['id']] ?? null; }
121:         unset($c);
122:     }
123: 
124:     $allDueReviewed = $totalAvailable > 0 && empty($cards);
125: 
126:     $setName = null;
127:     if (!$randomMode && $setId !== null && $setId > 0) {
128:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
129:         $stmt = $pdo->prepare("SELECT name FROM card_sets WHERE id = ?");
130:         $stmt->execute([$setId]);
131:         $row = $stmt->fetch();
132:         $setName = $row ? $row['name'] : null;
133:     }
134: 
135:     echo json_encode([
136:         'success' => true,
137:         'cards' => $cards,
138:         'count' => count($cards),
139:         'set_id' => $setId,
140:         'set_name' => $setName,
141:         'random_mode' => $randomMode,
142:         'levels_used' => $selectedLevels,
143:         'all_due_reviewed' => $allDueReviewed,
144:         'total_available' => $totalAvailable,
145:     ]);
146: } catch (PDOException $e) {
147:     echo json_encode([
148:         'success' => false,
149:         'error' => 'Database error: ' . $e->getMessage(),
150:         'cards' => [],
151:     ]);
152: }

(End of file - total 152 lines)
</content>
```

```
14:     $action = $input['action'] ?? 'login';
15: 
16:     if ($action === 'update_profile') {
17:         $userId = (int) ($input['user_id'] ?? 0);
18:         $fullName = trim($input['full_name'] ?? '');
19:         $englishLevel = $input['english_level'] ?? 'Beginner';
20:         if ($userId <= 0) {
21:             echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid user']);
22:             exit;
23:         }
24:         $user = User::getById($userId);
25:         if (!$user) {
26:             echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'User not found']);
27:             exit;
28:         }
29:         User::update($userId, $user['username'], $fullName, $englishLevel, $user['is_admin']);
30:         if (isset($_SESSION['student_user']) && $_SESSION['student_user']['id'] === $userId) {
31:             $_SESSION['student_user']['full_name'] = $fullName;
32:             $_SESSION['student_user']['english_level'] = $englishLevel;
33:         }
34:         echo json_encode(['success' => true]);
35:         exit;
36:     }
37: 
38:     $name = isset($input['name']) ? trim($input['name']) : '';
39:     $password = $input['password'] ?? '';
40: 
41:     if (empty($name) || empty($password)) {
42:         echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Name and password are required']);
43:         exit;
44:     }
45: 
46:     if (strlen($name) > 30) {
47:         echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Username must be 30 characters or less']);
48:         exit;
49:     }
50: 
51:     if ($action === 'register') {
52:         if (strlen($password) < 4) {
53:             echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Password must be at least 4 characters']);
54:             exit;
55:         }
56:         $fullName = isset($input['full_name']) ? trim($input['full_name']) : '';
57:         $englishLevel = isset($input['english_level']) ? trim($input['english_level']) : 'Beginner';
58:         $user = User::register($name, $password, $fullName, $englishLevel);
59:         if (!$user) {
60:             echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Name already taken. Please log in.']);
61:             exit;
62:         }
63:         session_regenerate_id(true);
64:         $_SESSION['student_user'] = $user;
65:         if (!empty($user['is_admin'])) {
66:             $_SESSION['admin_user'] = $user;
67:         }
68:         echo json_encode(['success' => true, 'student' => $user, 'new' => true]);
69:     } else {
70:         $user = User::authenticate($name, $password);
71:         if (!$user) {
72:             echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid name or password']);
73:             exit;
74:         }
75:         session_regenerate_id(true);
76:         $_SESSION['student_user'] = $user;
77:         if (!empty($user['is_admin'])) {
78:             $_SESSION['admin_user'] = $user;
79:         }
80:         echo json_encode(['success' => true, 'student' => $user, 'new' => false]);
81:     }
82: } catch (PDOException $e) {
83:     echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Database error: ' . $e->getMessage()]);
84: }
```

```
<path>/home/leonardo/Documents/Personal/Inglês/Aulas/materialLeo/ankiCards/flashcards/api/export_csv.php</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: <?php
2: 
3: session_start();
4: 
5: $currentUser = $_SESSION['admin_user'] ?? null;
6: $isAdmin = $currentUser !== null && ($currentUser['is_admin'] ?? false);
7: if (!$isAdmin) {
8:     header('HTTP/1.0 401 Unauthorized');
9:     echo 'Unauthorized';
10:     exit;
11: }
12: 
13: require_once __DIR__ . '/../src/Database.php';
14: require_once __DIR__ . '/../src/CardSet.php';
15: require_once __DIR__ . '/../src/Card.php';
16: 
17: $pdo = Database::getConnection();
18: 
19: $setIds = isset($_GET['set_ids']) ? array_map('intval', explode(',', $_GET['set_ids'])) : [];
20: $setIds = array_filter($setIds, fn($id) => $id > 0);
21: 
22: if (!empty($setIds)) {
23:     $placeholders = implode(',', array_fill(0, count($setIds), '?'));
24:     $stmt = $pdo->prepare("
25:         SELECT c.id, c.set_id, c.title, c.pattern_type, c.level, c.question_text, c.content_data, s.name AS set_name
26:         FROM cards c
27:         LEFT JOIN card_sets s ON c.set_id = s.id
28:         WHERE c.set_id IN ($placeholders)
29:         ORDER BY s.name, c.id
30:     ");
31:     $stmt->execute($setIds);
32: } else {
33:     $stmt = $pdo->query("
34:         SELECT c.id, c.set_id, c.title, c.pattern_type, c.level, c.question_text, c.content_data, s.name AS set_name
35:         FROM cards c
36:         LEFT JOIN card_sets s ON c.set_id = s.id
37:         ORDER BY s.name, c.id
38:     ");
39: }
40: $cards = $stmt->fetchAll();
41: 
42: header('Content-Type: text/csv; charset=utf-8');
43: header('Content-Disposition: attachment; filename=cards_export.csv');
44: 
45: $out = fopen('php://output', 'w');
46: 
47: fputcsv($out, [
48:     'id', 'set', 'set_id', 'type', 'title', 'level',
49:     'question_text', 'definition', 'sentence',
50:     'opt1', 'opt2', 'opt3', 'opt4',
51:     'correct_answer', 'explanation',
52:     'example1', 'example2', 'example3', 'example4',
53:     'usage1', 'tip',
54:     'image_url', 'description',
55:     'audio_url', 'prompt', 'transcript',
56: ]);
57: 
58: foreach ($cards as $card) {
59:     $cd = json_decode($card['content_data'], true) ?: [];
60:     $type = $card['pattern_type'];
61: 
62:     $row = [
63:         'id'             => $card['id'],
64:         'set'            => $card['set_name'] ?? '',
65:         'set_id'         => $card['set_id'],
66:         'type'           => $type,
67:         'title'          => $card['title'] ?? '',
68:         'level'          => $card['level'] ?? 'Beginner',
69:         'question_text'  => '',
70:         'definition'     => '',
71:         'sentence'       => '',
72:         'opt1'           => '', 'opt2' => '', 'opt3' => '', 'opt4' => '',
73:         'correct_answer' => '',
74:         'explanation'    => '',
75:         'example1'       => '', 'example2' => '', 'example3' => '', 'example4' => '',
76:         'usage1'         => '',
77:         'tip'            => '',
78:         'image_url'      => '',
79:         'description'    => '',
80:         'audio_url'      => '',
81:         'prompt'         => '',
82:         'transcript'     => '',
83:     ];
84: 
85:     if ($type === 'multiple_choice') {
86:         $options = $cd['options'] ?? [];
87:         $row['question_text'] = $cd['question_text'] ?? $card['question_text'] ?? '';
88:         for ($i = 0; $i < min(4, count($options)); $i++) {
89:             $row['opt' . ($i + 1)] = $options[$i];
90:         }
91:         $row['correct_answer'] = $cd['correct_index'] ?? 0;
92:         $row['explanation'] = $cd['explanation'] ?? '';
93:     } elseif ($type === 'gap_fill') {
94:         $row['sentence'] = $cd['sentence'] ?? '';
95:         $row['correct_answer'] = implode(',', $cd['correct_answers'] ?? ['answer']);
96:         $row['example1'] = $cd['example'] ?? '';
97:     } elseif ($type === 'image_description') {
98:         $row['definition'] = $cd['description'] ?? '';
99:         $row['correct_answer'] = $cd['image_url'] ?? '';
100:         $row['image_url'] = $cd['image_url'] ?? '';
101:         $row['description'] = $cd['description'] ?? '';
102:         $row['example1'] = '';
103:     } elseif ($type === 'audio_listening') {
104:         $row['definition'] = $cd['transcript'] ?? $cd['notes'] ?? '';
105:         $row['correct_answer'] = isset($cd['correct_answers']) ? implode(',', $cd['correct_answers']) : '';
106:         $row['question_text'] = $cd['prompt'] ?? '';
107:         $row['sentence'] = $cd['audio_url'] ?? '';
108:         $row['audio_url'] = $cd['audio_url'] ?? '';
109:         $row['prompt'] = $cd['prompt'] ?? '';
110:         $row['transcript'] = $cd['transcript'] ?? $cd['notes'] ?? '';
111:         $row['example1'] = '';
112:     } else {
113:         $row['definition'] = $cd['definition'] ?? '';
114:         $row['example1'] = $cd['example1a'] ?? $cd['example'] ?? '';
115:         if ($type === 'usage_cases') {
116:             $row['usage1'] = $cd['usage1'] ?? '';
117:             $row['tip'] = $cd['tip'] ?? '';
118:         }
119:         if ($type === 'deep_dive' || $type === 'formula_table') {
120:             $row['example2'] = !empty($cd['example']) && empty($row['example1']) ? '' : ($cd['example'] ?? '');
121:             $row['tip'] = $cd['tip'] ?? '';
122:         }
123:     }
124: 
125:     fputcsv($out, $row);
126: }
127: 
128: fclose($out);

(End of file - total 128 lines)
</content>
```

#### 🔧 Tool: read
**Status:** completed
**Title:** api/import_csv.php

**Input:**
```json
{
  "filePath": "/home/leonardo/Documents/Personal/Inglês/Aulas/materialLeo/ankiCards/flashcards/api/import_csv.php"
}
```

**Output:**
```
<path>/home/leonardo/Documents/Personal/Inglês/Aulas/materialLeo/ankiCards/flashcards/api/import_csv.php</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: <?php
2: 
3: session_start();
4: 
5: header('Content-Type: application/json');
6: header('Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *');
7: header('Access-Control-Allow-Methods: POST, OPTIONS');
8: header('Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type');
9: 
10: require_once __DIR__ . '/../src/Database.php';
11: require_once __DIR__ . '/../src/CardSet.php';
12: require_once __DIR__ . '/../src/Card.php';
13: 
14: $currentUser = $_SESSION['admin_user'] ?? null;
15: $isAdmin = $currentUser !== null && ($currentUser['is_admin'] ?? false);
16: if (!$isAdmin) {
17:     echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Unauthorized']);
18:     exit;
19: }
20: 
21: if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] !== 'POST') {
22:     echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'POST required']);
23:     exit;
24: }
25: 
26: try {
27:     if (!isset($_FILES['csv']) || $_FILES['csv']['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
28:         echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'CSV file required']);
29:         exit;
30:     }
31: 
32:     $handle = fopen($_FILES['csv']['tmp_name'], 'r');
33:     if (!$handle) {
34:         echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Cannot read file']);
35:         exit;
36:     }
37: 
38:     $header = fgetcsv($handle);
39:     if (!$header) {
40:         fclose($handle);
41:         echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Empty CSV']);
42:         exit;
43:     }
44: 
45:     $header = array_map('trim', $header);
46:     $colMap = array_flip($header);
47: 
48:     $required = ['type', 'title'];
49:     foreach ($required as $r) {
50:         if (!isset($colMap[$r])) {
51:             fclose($handle);
52:             echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => "Missing column: $r"]);
53:             exit;
54:         }
55:     }
56: 
57:     $imported = 0;
58:     $skipped = 0;
59:     $errors = [];
60:     $rowNum = 1;
61: 
62:     while (($row = fgetcsv($handle)) !== false) {
63:         $rowNum++;
64:         $data = array_combine($header, array_pad($row, count($header), ''));
65: 
66:         $type = trim($data['type'] ?? '');
67:         $title = trim($data['title'] ?? '');
68:         $level = trim($data['level'] ?? '');
69:         $setName = trim($data['set'] ?? '');
70:         $setIdRaw = trim($data['set_id'] ?? '');
71: 
72:         if (empty($title) || empty($type)) continue;
73: 
74:         $validTypes = ['usage_cases', 'deep_dive', 'formula_table', 'multiple_choice', 'gap_fill', 'image_description', 'audio_listening'];
75:         if (!in_array($type, $validTypes)) {
76:             $errors[] = "Row $rowNum: Invalid type '$type'";
77:             continue;
78:         }
79: 
80:         $levelMap = [
81:             'beginner' => 'Beginner', 'a1' => 'Beginner', 'a2' => 'Beginner',
82:             'intermediate' => 'Intermediate', 'b1' => 'Intermediate', 'b2' => 'Intermediate',
83:             'advanced' => 'Advanced', 'c1' => 'Advanced', 'c2' => 'Advanced',
84:         ];
85:         $levelKey = strtolower(trim($level));
86:         $level = $levelMap[$levelKey] ?? 'Beginner';
87: 
88:         $setId = 0;
89:         if ($setIdRaw !== '' && is_numeric($setIdRaw) && (int)$setIdRaw > 0) {
90:             $setId = (int) $setIdRaw;
91:         }
92:         if (!empty($setName)) {
93:             $existing = CardSet::getIdByName($setName);
94:             $setDescription = trim($data['set_description'] ?? '');
95:             if ($existing !== null) {
96:                 $setId = $existing;
97:             } elseif ($setId === 0) {
98:                 $setId = CardSet::create($setName, $setDescription);
99:             }
100:         }
101:         if ($setId === 0) {
102:             $setId = 1;
103:         }
104: 
105:         $questionText = trim($data['question_text'] ?? '');
106:         $definition = trim($data['definition'] ?? '');
107:         $sentence = trim($data['sentence'] ?? '');
108:         $correctAnswer = trim($data['correct_answer'] ?? '');
109:         $explanation = trim($data['explanation'] ?? '');
110:         $usage1 = trim($data['usage1'] ?? '');
111:         $tip = trim($data['tip'] ?? '');
112: 
113:         $examples = [];
114:         for ($i = 1; $i <= 4; $i++) {
115:             $val = trim($data["example$i"] ?? '');
116:             if (!empty($val)) $examples[] = $val;
117:         }
118: 
119:         $contentData = [];
120: 
121:         if ($type === 'multiple_choice') {
122:             $options = [];
123:             for ($i = 1; $i <= 4; $i++) {
124:                 $val = trim($data["opt$i"] ?? '');
125:                 if (!empty($val)) $options[] = $val;
126:             }
127:             if (empty($options)) {
128:                 $errors[] = "Row $rowNum: Multiple choice needs at least one option";
129:                 continue;
130:             }
131:             $correctIdx = 0;
132:             if ($correctAnswer !== '') {
133:                 $correctIdx = (int) $correctAnswer;
134:                 if ($correctIdx < 0 || $correctIdx >= count($options)) $correctIdx = 0;
135:             }
136:             $contentData = [
137:                 'options' => $options,
138:                 'correct_index' => $correctIdx,
139:                 'question_text' => $questionText ?: 'Select the correct answer:',
140:                 'explanation' => $explanation,
141:             ];
142:         } elseif ($type === 'gap_fill') {
143:             $answers = !empty($correctAnswer) ? array_map('trim', explode(',', $correctAnswer)) : ['answer'];
144:             $contentData = [
145:                 'sentence' => $sentence ?: 'Complete: ______',
146:                 'correct_answers' => $answers,
147:                 'example' => $examples[0] ?? '',
148:             ];
149:         } elseif ($type === 'image_description') {
150:             $imageUrl = trim($data['image_url'] ?? '');
151:             $description = trim($data['description'] ?? '');
152:             $contentData = [
153:                 'image_url' => $imageUrl ?: '',
154:                 'description' => $description ?: 'No description',
155:             ];
156:         } elseif ($type === 'audio_listening') {
157:             $audioUrl = trim($data['audio_url'] ?? '');
158:             $prompt = trim($data['prompt'] ?? '');
159:             $transcript = trim($data['transcript'] ?? '');
160:             $correctAnswerRaw = trim($data['correct_answer'] ?? '');
161:             $contentData = [
162:                 'audio_url' => $audioUrl ?: '',
163:                 'prompt' => $prompt ?: '',
164:                 'transcript' => $transcript ?: '',
165:             ];
166:             if (!empty($correctAnswerRaw)) {
167:                 $contentData['correct_answers'] = array_map('trim', explode(',', $correctAnswerRaw));
168:             }
169:         } else {
170:             // ** Pure text types: usage_cases, deep_dive, formula_table **
171:             $contentData = [
172:                 'definition' => $definition ?: 'No definition',
173:             ];
174:             if (!empty($usage1)) $contentData['usage1'] = $usage1;
175:             if (!empty($examples)) $contentData['example1a'] = $examples[0];
176:             if (!empty($tip)) $contentData['tip'] = $tip;
177:             if (count($examples) > 1) $contentData['example'] = $examples[1] ?? $examples[0];
178:         }
179: 
180:         if ($type === 'usage_cases' && empty($usage1) && !empty($examples)) {
181:             $contentData['usage1'] = $examples[0];
182:         }
183: 
184:         $cardId = isset($data['id']) && is_numeric($data['id']) ? (int) $data['id'] : 0;
185: 
186:         if ($cardId === 0 && Card::findDuplicate($setId, $title, $type) !== null) {
187:             $skipped++;
188:             continue;
189:         }
190: 
191:         Card::save([
192:             'id' => $cardId,
193:             'set_id' => $setId,
194:             'title' => $title,
195:             'pattern_type' => $type,
196:             'level' => $level,
197:             'question_text' => $type === 'multiple_choice' ? $questionText : '',
198:             'content_data' => $contentData,
199:         ]);
200:         $imported++;
201:     }
202: 
203:     fclose($handle);
204: 
205:     echo json_encode([
206:         'success' => true,
207:         'imported' => $imported,
208:         'skipped' => $skipped,
209:         'errors' => $errors,
210:     ]);
211: } catch (Exception $e) {
212:     echo json_encode([
213:         'success' => false,
214:         'error' => $e->getMessage(),
215:     ]);
216: }

(End of file - total 216 lines)
</content>
```

```
26:         try {

28:             $user = User::authenticate($username, $password);

36:             $setupError = 'Error: ' . $e->getMessage();
37:         }
38:     } else {
39:         $setupError = 'Please fill in all fields (password min 6 chars).';
40:     }

44:     $username = trim($_POST['username'] ?? '');
45:     $password = $_POST['password'] ?? '';
46:     try {
47:         $user = User::authenticate($username, $password);
48:     } catch (Exception $e) {
49:         $user = null;
50:         $loginError = 'Database error: ' . $e->getMessage();
51:     }
52:     if ($user && $user['is_admin']) {
53:         session_regenerate_id(true);
54:         $_SESSION['admin_user'] = $user;
55:         $currentUser = $user;
56:         $isLoggedIn = true;
57:     } else {
58:         $loginError = 'Invalid credentials or insufficient permissions.';
59:     }
60: }
61: 
62: if (isset($_GET['logout'])) {
63:     session_destroy();
64:     header('Location: admin_cards.php');
65:     exit;
66: }
67: 
68: $isAjax = isset($_SERVER['HTTP_X_REQUESTED_WITH'])
69:     && strtolower($_SERVER['HTTP_X_REQUESTED_WITH']) === 'xmlhttprequest';
70: 
71: if ($isAjax && isset($_GET['action'])) {
72:     header('Content-Type: application/json');
73:     if (!$isLoggedIn) {
74:         echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Unauthorized']);
75:         exit;
76:     }
77: 
78:     try {
79:         $action = $_GET['action'];
80: 
81:         if ($action === 'preview_csv') {
82:             if (!isset($_FILES['csv']) || $_FILES['csv']['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
83:                 echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'CSV file required']);
84:                 exit;
85:             }
86:             $handle = fopen($_FILES['csv']['tmp_name'], 'r');
87:             if (!$handle) {
88:                 echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Cannot read file']);
89:                 exit;
90:             }
91:             $header = fgetcsv($handle);
92:             if (!$header) {
93:                 fclose($handle);
94:                 echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Empty CSV']);
95:                 exit;
96:             }
97:             $header = array_map('trim', $header);
98:             // Strip BOM from first column
99:             if (isset($header[0])) {
100:                 $header[0] = preg_replace('/^\xEF\xBB\xBF/', '', $header[0]);
101:             }
102:             $rows = [];
103:             while (($row = fgetcsv($handle)) !== false) {
104:                 $row = array_slice(array_map('trim', $row), 0, count($header));
105:                 $rows[] = array_combine($header, array_pad($row, count($header), ''));
106:             }
107:             fclose($handle);
108:             echo json_encode(['success' => true, 'header' => $header, 'rows' => $rows, 'total' => count($rows)]);
109:             exit;
110:         } elseif ($action === 'get_cards') {
111:             $setId = isset($_GET['set_id']) ? (int) $_GET['set_id'] : 1;
112:             echo json_encode(['success' => true, 'cards' => Card::getBySet($setId)]);
113:         } elseif ($action === 'get_sets') {
114:             echo json_encode(['success' => true, 'sets' => CardSet::getAll()]);
115:         } elseif ($action === 'get_card') {
116:             $cardId = isset($_GET['card_id']) ? (int) $_GET['card_id'] : 0;
117:             $card = Card::getById($cardId);
118:             if ($card) {
119:                 $card['content_data'] = json_decode($card['content_data'], true);
120:                 echo json_encode(['success' => true, 'card' => $card]);
121:             } else {
122:                 echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Card not found']);
123:             }
124:         } elseif ($action === 'save_card') {
125:             $data = json_decode(file_get_contents('php://input'), true);
126:             $id = Card::save($data);
127:             echo json_encode(['success' => true, 'id' => $id]);
128:         } elseif ($action === 'delete_card') {
129:             $cardId = isset($_GET['card_id']) ? (int) $_GET['card_id'] : 0;
130:             Card::delete($cardId);
131:             echo json_encode(['success' => true]);
132:         } elseif ($action === 'get_users') {
133:             echo json_encode(['success' => true, 'users' => User::getAll()]);
134:         } elseif ($action === 'create_user') {
135:             $data = json_decode(file_get_contents('php://input'), true);
136:             $username = trim($data['username'] ?? '');
137:             $password = $data['password'] ?? '';
138:             $isAdmin = !empty($data['is_admin']);
139:             $fullName = trim($data['full_name'] ?? '');
140:             $englishLevel = $data['english_level'] ?? 'Beginner';
141:             if ($username === '' || strlen($password) < 6) {
142:                 echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Username required, password min 6 chars']);
143:                 exit;
144:             }
145:             $user = User::create($username, $password, $isAdmin, $fullName, $englishLevel);
146:             echo json_encode(['success' => true, 'user' => $user]);
147:         } elseif ($action === 'update_user') {
148:             $data = json_decode(file_get_contents('php://input'), true);
149:             $userId = (int) ($data['id'] ?? 0);
150:             $username = trim($data['username'] ?? '');
151:             $fullName = trim($data['full_name'] ?? '');
152:             $englishLevel = $data['english_level'] ?? 'Beginner';
153:             $isAdmin = !empty($data['is_admin']);
154:             if ($userId <= 0 || $username === '') {
155:                 echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid data']);
156:                 exit;
157:             }
158:             User::update($userId, $username, $fullName, $englishLevel, $isAdmin);
159:             echo json_encode(['success' => true]);
160:         } elseif ($action === 'reset_user_progress') {
161:             $userId = isset($_GET['user_id']) ? (int) $_GET['user_id'] : 0;
162:             if ($userId <= 0) {
163:                 echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid user']);
164:                 exit;
165:             }
166:             Review::resetForUser($userId);
167:             User::resetProgress($userId);
168:             echo json_encode(['success' => true]);
169:         } elseif ($action === 'delete_user') {
170:             $userId = isset($_GET['user_id']) ? (int) $_GET['user_id'] : 0;
171:             if ($userId === $currentUser['id']) {
172:                 echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Cannot delete yourself']);
173:                 exit;
174:             }
175:             User::delete($userId);
176:             echo json_encode(['success' => true]);
177:         } elseif ($action === 'create_set') {
178:             $data = json_decode(file_get_contents('php://input'), true);
179:             $name = trim($data['name'] ?? '');
180:             $description = trim($data['description'] ?? '');
181:             if ($name === '') {
182:                 echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Name is required']);
183:                 exit;
184:             }
185:             $id = CardSet::create($name, $description);
186:             echo json_encode(['success' => true, 'id' => $id, 'name' => $name, 'description' => $description]);
187:         } elseif ($action === 'update_set') {
188:             $data = json_decode(file_get_contents('php://input'), true);
189:             $id = (int) ($data['id'] ?? 0);
190:             $name = trim($data['name'] ?? '');
191:             $description = trim($data['description'] ?? '');
192:             if ($id <= 0 || $name === '') {
193:                 echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid data']);
194:                 exit;
195:             }
196:             CardSet::update($id, $name, $description);
197:             echo json_encode(['success' => true]);
198:         } elseif ($action === 'delete_set') {
199:             $id = isset($_GET['set_id']) ? (int) $_GET['set_id'] : 0;
200:             if ($id <= 0) {
201:                 echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid set']);
202:                 exit;
203:             }
204:             CardSet::delete($id);
205:             echo json_encode(['success' => true]);
206:         } elseif ($action === 'get_user_sets') {
207:             $userId = isset($_GET['user_id']) ? (int) $_GET['user_id'] : 0;
208:             $setIds = Review::getAccessibleSets($userId);
209:             echo json_encode(['success' => true, 'set_ids' => $setIds]);
210:         } elseif ($action === 'set_user_sets') {
211:             $data = json_decode(file_get_contents('php://input'), true);
212:             $userId = (int) ($data['user_id'] ?? 0);
213:             $setIds = array_map('intval', $data['set_ids'] ?? []);
214:             if ($userId <= 0) {
215:                 echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid user']);
216:                 exit;
217:             }
218:             Review::setAccessibleSets($userId, $setIds);
219:             echo json_encode(['success' => true]);
220:         } else {
221:             echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid action']);
222:         }
223:     } catch (Exception $e) {
224:         echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => $e->getMessage()]);
225:     }
226: 
227:     exit;
228: }
229: 
230: if (!$isLoggedIn) {
231:     if (isset($dbError) && $needsSetup) {
232:         $setupError = $dbError;
233:     } elseif (isset($dbError)) {
234:         $loginError = $dbError;
235:     }
236:     if ($needsSetup) {
237:         require __DIR__ . '/src/templates/admin_setup.php';
238:     } else {
239:         require __DIR__ . '/src/templates/admin_login.php';
240:     }
241:     exit;
242: }
243: 
244: $dbConnected = Database::testConnection();
245: $cardSets = $dbConnected ? CardSet::getAll() : [];
246: ?>
```

```
196: function getExpectedColumns(string $table): ?array {
197:     $schemas = [

202:         'review_history' => ['id', 'user_id', 'card_id', 'quality', 'was_correct', 'reviewed_at'],

204:     ];
205:     return $schemas[$table] ?? null;
```

```
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: <?php
2: /**
3:  * CSV Importer for Flashcard System
4:  * - Reads card_sets.csv and cards.csv
5:  * - Inserts records into database using src/ classes
6:  */
7: 
8: header('Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8');
9: 
10: require_once __DIR__ . '/../src/Database.php';
11: 
12: $setsFile = __DIR__ . '/card_sets.csv';
13: $cardsFile = __DIR__ . '/cards.csv';
14: 
15: echo '<!DOCTYPE html>
16: <html>
17: <head>
18:     <title>CSV Importer</title>
19:     <style>
20:         body { font-family: monospace; background: #f1f5f9; padding: 20px; }
21:         .container { max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; background: white; border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; }
22:         .success { color: #16a34a; background: #dcfce7; padding: 8px 12px; margin: 4px 0; border-left: 4px solid #16a34a; }
23:         .error { color: #dc2626; background: #fee2e2; padding: 8px 12px; margin: 4px 0; border-left: 4px solid #dc2626; }
24:         .info { color: #2563eb; background: #dbeafe; padding: 8px 12px; margin: 4px 0; border-left: 4px solid #2563eb; }
25:         .warning { color: #d97706; background: #fef3c7; padding: 8px 12px; margin: 4px 0; border-left: 4px solid #d97706; }
26:         h1 { color: #1e293b; }
27:         hr { margin: 20px 0; }
28:     </style>
29: </head>
30: <body>
31: <div class="container">
32:     <h1>📥 CSV Importer for Flashcard System</h1>
33:     <hr>
34: ';
35: 
36: function display($msg, $type = 'info') {
37:     echo "<div class='$type'>$msg</div>";
38:     flush();
39: }
40: 
41: try {
42:     $pdo = Database::getConnection();
43:     display("✅ Connected to database", 'success');
44: } catch (PDOException $e) {
45:     display("❌ Connection failed: " . $e->getMessage(), 'error');
46:     exit;
47: }
48: 
49: // ============ IMPORT CARD SETS ============
50: display("📚 Importing card sets from: card_sets.csv", 'info');
51: 
52: if (!file_exists($setsFile)) {
53:     display("❌ File not found: card_sets.csv", 'error');
54: } else {
55:     $handle = fopen($setsFile, 'r');
56:     if ($handle === false) {
57:         display("❌ Could not open file: card_sets.csv", 'error');
58:     } else {
59:         $header = fgetcsv($handle, 0, ',', '"', '\\');
60:         display("Header columns: " . implode(', ', $header), 'info');
61: 
62:         $inserted = 0;
63:         $skipped = 0;
64: 
65:         while (($row = fgetcsv($handle, 0, ',', '"', '\\')) !== false) {
66:             if (count($row) < 3) continue;
67: 
68:             $id = $row[0];
69:             $name = $row[1];
70:             $description = $row[2] ?? '';
71: 
72:             $stmt = $pdo->prepare("SELECT id FROM card_sets WHERE id = ? OR name = ?");
73:             $stmt->execute([$id, $name]);
74:             if ($stmt->fetch()) {
75:                 display("⏭️ Skipped (exists): ID $id - $name", 'warning');
76:                 $skipped++;
77:                 continue;
78:             }
79: 
80:             try {
81:                 $stmt = $pdo->prepare("INSERT INTO card_sets (id, name, description) VALUES (?, ?, ?)");
82:                 $stmt->execute([$id, $name, $description]);
83:                 display("✅ Inserted: ID $id - $name", 'success');
84:                 $inserted++;
85:             } catch (PDOException $e) {
86:                 display("❌ Error: " . $e->getMessage(), 'error');
87:             }
88:         }
89:         fclose($handle);
90:         display("📊 Card sets: $inserted inserted, $skipped skipped", 'info');
91:     }
92: }
93: 
94: // ============ IMPORT CARDS ============
95: display("<hr>📇 Importing cards from: cards.csv", 'info');
96: 
97: if (!file_exists($cardsFile)) {
98:     display("❌ File not found: cards.csv", 'error');
99: } else {
100:     $handle = fopen($cardsFile, 'r');
101:     if ($handle === false) {
102:         display("❌ Could not open file: cards.csv", 'error');
103:     } else {
104:         $header = fgetcsv($handle, 0, ',', '"', '\\');
105:         display("Header columns: " . implode(', ', $header), 'info');
106: 
107:         $inserted = 0;
108:         $skipped = 0;
109:         $errors = 0;
110:         $lineNum = 1;
111: 
112:         while (($row = fgetcsv($handle, 0, ',', '"', '\\')) !== false) {
113:             $lineNum++;
114:             if (count($row) < 6) {
115:                 display("⚠️ Line $lineNum: Skipped (only " . count($row) . " columns)", 'warning');
116:                 $skipped++;
117:                 continue;
118:             }
119: 
120:             $set_id = $row[0];
121:             $title = $row[1];
122:             $pattern_type = $row[2];
123:             $level = $row[3];
124:             $question_text = $row[4];
125:             $content_data = $row[5];
126: 
127:             if (!json_decode($content_data)) {
128:                 $content_data = str_replace("'", '"', $content_data);
129:                 if (!json_decode($content_data)) {
130:                     display("⚠️ Line $lineNum: Invalid JSON for '{$title}'", 'warning');
131:                     $errors++;
132:                     continue;
133:                 }
134:             }
135: 
136:             $stmt = $pdo->prepare("SELECT id FROM cards WHERE set_id = ? AND title = ?");
137:             $stmt->execute([$set_id, $title]);
138:             if ($stmt->fetch()) {
139:                 $skipped++;
140:                 continue;
141:             }
142: 
143:             try {
144:                 $stmt = $pdo->prepare("INSERT INTO cards (set_id, title, pattern_type, level, question_text, content_data) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)");
145:                 $stmt->execute([$set_id, $title, $pattern_type, $level, $question_text, $content_data]);
146:                 $inserted++;
147:                 if ($inserted % 100 == 0) {

149:                 }
150:             } catch (PDOException $e) {
151:                 display("❌ Error on line $lineNum: " . $e->getMessage(), 'error');
152:                 $errors++;
153:             }
154:         }
155:         fclose($handle);
156:         display("<hr>📊 Final results: $inserted inserted, $skipped skipped, $errors errors", 'info');
157:     }
158: }
```

```
25:     function escapeHtml(str) {
26:         if (!str) return '';
27:         const map = { '&': '&amp;', '<': '&lt;', '>': '&gt;', '"': '&quot;', "'": '&#39;' };
28:         return String(str).replace(/[&<>"']/g, m => map[m]);
29:     }
30: 
31:     function getIntervalPreview(card, quality) {
32:         const p = card?.progress;
33:         const rep = p ? (parseInt(p.repetitions) || 0) : -1;
34:         const ef = p ? (parseFloat(p.ease_factor) || 2.5) : 2.5;
35:         const prev = p ? (parseInt(p.interval_days) || 0) : 0;
36:         if (quality === 0) return '1d';
37:         if (rep === -1 || rep === 0) return '1d';
38:         if (rep === 1) return '6d';
39:         return Math.round(prev * ef) + 'd';
40:     }
41: 
42:     function formatBreaks(text) {
43:         if (!text) return '';
44:         let s = String(text);
45:         s = s.replace(/\\\\/g, '\\');
46:         s = s.replace(/\\br ?/g, '<br>');
47:         s = s.replace(/\\b(.*?)\\b/g, '<b>$1</b>');
48:         s = s.replace(/\\i(.*?)\\i/g, '<i>$1</i>');
49:         s = s.replace(/\\u(.*?)\\u/g, '<u>$1</u>');
50:         s = s.replace(/\\em(.*?)\\em/g, '<em>$1</em>');
51:         s = s.replace(/\\strong(.*?)\\strong/g, '<strong>$1</strong>');
52:         return s;
53:     }
54: 
55:     function stripFormatTags(text) {
56:         if (!text) return '';
57:         let s = String(text);
58:         s = s.replace(/\\\\/g, '\\');
59:         s = s.replace(/\\b(.*?)\\b/g, '$1');
60:         s = s.replace(/\\i(.*?)\\i/g, '$1');
61:         s = s.replace(/\\u(.*?)\\u/g, '$1');
62:         s = s.replace(/\\em(.*?)\\em/g, '$1');
63:         s = s.replace(/\\strong(.*?)\\strong/g, '$1');
64:         s = s.replace(/\\br/g, ' ');
65:         s = s.replace(/\\/g, '');
66:         return s.trim();
67:     }

69:     const SoundFX = {
70:         _ctx: null,
71:         _getCtx() {
72:             if (!this._ctx) {
73:                 try { this._ctx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)(); } catch (e) {}
74:             }
75:             return this._ctx;
76:         },
77:         _play(freq, duration, type, vol) {
78:             const ctx = this._getCtx();
79:             if (!ctx) return;
80:             const osc = ctx.createOscillator();
81:             const gain = ctx.createGain();
82:             osc.type = type || 'sine';
83:             osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq, ctx.currentTime);
84:             gain.gain.setValueAtTime(vol || 0.15, ctx.currentTime);
85:             gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, ctx.currentTime + duration);
86:             osc.connect(gain);
87:             gain.connect(ctx.destination);
88:             osc.start(ctx.currentTime);
89:             osc.stop(ctx.currentTime + duration);
90:         },
91:         correct() {
92:             this._play(523.25, 0.15, 'sine', 0.12);
93:             setTimeout(() => this._play(659.25, 0.15, 'sine', 0.12), 100);
94:             setTimeout(() => this._play(783.99, 0.25, 'sine', 0.12), 200);
95:         },
96:         incorrect() {
97:             this._play(150, 0.15, 'sine', 0.12);
98:             setTimeout(() => this._play(120, 0.3, 'sine', 0.1), 100);
99:         },
100:         flip() {
101:             this._play(800, 0.08, 'sine', 0.05);
102:         },
103:         complete() {
104:             const notes = [523.25, 587.33, 659.25, 783.99, 880, 1046.5];
105:             notes.forEach((n, i) => setTimeout(() => this._play(n, 0.2, 'sine', 0.1), i * 100));
106:         },
107:         click() { this._play(600, 0.04, 'sine', 0.04); }
108:     };

133:     async function apiCall(endpoint, method = 'GET', data = null) {
134:         try {
135:             let url = endpoint;
136:             let options = { method, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, credentials: 'same-origin' };
137:             if (data && method === 'POST') {
138:                 options.body = JSON.stringify(data);
139:             }
140:             const response = await fetch(url, options);
141:             const text = await response.text();
142:             if (!text || text.trim() === '') return null;
143:             try { return JSON.parse(text); } catch (e) { return null; }
144:         } catch (err) { return null; }
145:     }

234:             el.style.borderRadius = Math.random() > 0.5 ? '50%' : '2px';

236:             el.style.animationDelay = (Math.random() * 1.5) + 's';
237:             container.appendChild(el);

314:     function getGapFillHint(card) {
315:         const title = (card.title || '').toLowerCase();
316:         const content = card.content_data || {};
317: 
318:         if (title.includes('past') || title.includes('simple past')) {
319:             return '📝 Use Simple Past tense';
320:         } else if (title.includes('present perfect')) {
321:             return '📝 Use Present Perfect (have/has + past participle)';
322:         } else if (title.includes('modal') || title.includes('can') || title.includes('could') || title.includes('should') || title.includes('must')) {
323:             return '📝 Use a modal verb (can, could, should, must, might, etc.)';
324:         } else if (title.includes('future') || title.includes('will')) {
325:             return '📝 Use Future (will + base verb)';
326:         } else if (title.includes('continuous') || title.includes('progressive')) {
327:             return '📝 Use Continuous form (am/is/are/was/were + verb-ing)';
328:         } else if (title.includes('passive')) {
329:             return '📝 Use Passive voice (be + past participle)';
330:         } else if (title.includes('conditional')) {
331:             return '📝 Use Conditional (would/could/might + base verb)';
332:         } else if (content.sentence) {
333:             if (content.sentence.includes('yesterday') || content.sentence.includes('last week') || content.sentence.includes('ago')) {
334:                 return '📝 Hint: This happened in the past → use Simple Past';
335:             } else if (content.sentence.includes('tomorrow') || content.sentence.includes('next week')) {
336:                 return '📝 Hint: This will happen in the future → use Future (will)';
337:             } else if (content.sentence.includes('every day') || content.sentence.includes('usually') || content.sentence.includes('always')) {
338:                 return '📝 Hint: This is a habit/routine → use Simple Present';
339:             } else if (content.sentence.includes('now') || content.sentence.includes('right now')) {
340:                 return '📝 Hint: This is happening now → use Present Continuous';
341:             }
342:         }
343:         return '📝 Type the correct form of the verb in parentheses';
344:     }
345:
```
