412:                         </div>
413:                         ${stats.due_today > 0 ? `<button id="dueReviewBtn" class="text-2xs md:text-xs text-orange-600 mt-2 font-bold cursor-pointer hover:text-orange-800 underline" style="background:none;border:none;padding:0;font:inherit;">📅 ${stats.due_today} card${stats.due_today > 1 ? 's' : ''} due for review today!</button>` : ''}
414:                     </div>
415:                     ` : ''}
416:                     </div>
417:                     <div class="marker-border p-4 md:p-5 bg-white/80">
418:                         <label class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800 mb-2 title-font">📖 Card Set</label>
419:                         <select id="setSelect" class="w-full p-2 md:p-3 text-base md:text-lg border-2 rounded-xl bg-white">${setsHtml}</select>
420:                         <button id="refreshSetsBtn" class="mt-2 text-xs text-blue-600 underline">⟳ Refresh (show non-empty sets)</button>
421:                     </div>
422:                     <div class="whiteboard-card p-4 md:p-5">
423:                         <label class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800 mb-3 title-font">🎯 Difficulty Levels</label>
424:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-2">Leave unselected to auto-pick your level (${escapeHtml(currentStudent?.english_level || 'Beginner')})</p>
425:                         <div class="flex flex-nowrap gap-1 md:gap-4 justify-center">
426:                             ${['Beginner', 'Intermediate', 'Advanced'].map(lvl => `
427:                                 <button data-level="${lvl}" class="level-picker px-2 md:px-6 py-1 md:py-2 text-2xs md:text-xl rounded-full border-2 transition-all flex-1 md:flex-none ${selectedLevels.includes(lvl) ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white border-blue-800' : 'bg-white border-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-100'}">${lvl}</button>
428:                             `).join('')}
429:                         </div>
430:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-2">💡 Select levels, then click START to filter cards</p>
431:                     </div>
432:                     <button id="launchStudyBtn" class="w-full bg-blue-700 text-white py-3 md:py-4 text-xl md:text-2xl title-font rounded-xl shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.2)] hover:translate-y-1 transition-all">🚀 START STUDYING →</button>
433:                     <button id="switchStudentBtn" class="w-full text-gray-500 py-2 text-xs md:text-sm underline">↺ Switch student</button>
434:                 </div>
435:                 <div class="teacher-script mt-5 md:mt-6 p-2 md:p-3 text-center text-gray-500 text-xs md:text-sm bg-yellow-50 border border-yellow-200 rounded-lg">
436:                     💡 Tap any card to flip it! For multiple choice, tap your answer then flip to check.
437:                 </div>
438:             </div>
439:         `;
440:         appEl.innerHTML = html;
441: 
442:         document.querySelectorAll('.level-picker').forEach(btn => {
443:             btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
444:                 SoundFX.click();
445:                 const lvl = btn.getAttribute('data-level');
446:                 if (selectedLevels.includes(lvl)) {
447:                     selectedLevels = selectedLevels.filter(l => l !== lvl);
448:                     btn.classList.remove('bg-blue-600', 'text-white', 'border-blue-800');
449:                     btn.classList.add('bg-white', 'border-gray-400', 'hover:bg-gray-100');
450:                 } else {
451:                     selectedLevels.push(lvl);
452:                     btn.classList.add('bg-blue-600', 'text-white', 'border-blue-800');
453:                     btn.classList.remove('bg-white', 'border-gray-400', 'hover:bg-gray-100');
454:                 }
455:                 saveSessionState();
456:             });
457:         });
458: 
459:         document.getElementById('refreshSetsBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
460:             SoundFX.click();
461:             displayStatusMessage('Refreshing card sets (non-empty only)...', 'info');
462:             const freshSets = await loadCardSetsFromAPI();
463:             const selectEl = document.getElementById('setSelect');
464:             if (selectEl && freshSets.length) {
465:                 const randomSelectedNow = (currentSet === null || isRandomMode);
466:                 selectEl.innerHTML = '<option value="" ' + (randomSelectedNow ? 'selected' : '') + '>🎲 RANDOM MODE - All Sets</option>' +
467:                     freshSets.map(s => `<option value="${s.id}" ${currentSet?.id == s.id && !randomSelectedNow ? 'selected' : ''}>📚 ${escapeHtml(s.name)}</option>`).join('');
468:                 displayStatusMessage(`Loaded ${freshSets.length} card sets`, 'success');
469:             } else {
470:                 displayStatusMessage('No card sets with cards found!', 'warning');
471:             }
472:         });
473: 
474:         document.getElementById('launchStudyBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
475:             const launchBtn = document.getElementById('launchStudyBtn');
476:             if (launchBtn.disabled) return;
477:             launchBtn.disabled = true;
478:             SoundFX.click();
479:             const setSelect = document.getElementById('setSelect');
480:             const selectedValue = setSelect?.value;
481:             const randomMode = (selectedValue === "");
482:             let setId = null;
483:             if (!randomMode) setId = parseInt(selectedValue);
484: 
485:             const levelsToUse = selectedLevels.length > 0 ? selectedLevels : [];
486:             const studentLevel = currentStudent?.english_level || '';
487: 
488:             displayStatusMessage(randomMode ? 'Loading random cards from ALL sets...' : `Loading cards...`, 'info');
489: 
490:             isRandomMode = randomMode;
491:             currentSet = randomMode ? null : { id: setId };
492:             saveSessionState();
493: 
494:             if (!currentStudent) { if (launchBtn) launchBtn.disabled = false; displayStatusMessage('Not logged in', 'error'); return; }
495:             const cards = await loadCardsFromAPI(setId, levelsToUse, currentStudent.id, randomMode, studentLevel);
496:             if (!cards || cards.length === 0) {
497:                 if (allDueReviewed) {
498:                     currentCards = [];
499:                     currentIndex = 0;
500:                     currentView = 'study';
501:                     render();
502:                     return;
503:                 }
504:                 if (selectedLevels.length === 0) {
505:                     displayStatusMessage('No cards at your level. Trying all levels...', 'warning');
506:                     const fallback = await loadCardsFromAPI(setId, ['Beginner', 'Intermediate', 'Advanced'], currentStudent?.id, randomMode);
507:                     if (fallback && fallback.length > 0) {
508:                         currentCards = fallback;
509:                         currentIndex = 0;
510:                         currentView = 'study';
511:                         render();
512:                         return;
513:                     }
514:                 }
515:                 if (launchBtn) launchBtn.disabled = false;
516:                 alert('No cards found for the selected filters! Try different difficulty levels.');
517:                 return;
518:             }
519:             if (randomMode) {
520:                 for (let i = cards.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
521:                     const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
522:                     [cards[i], cards[j]] = [cards[j], cards[i]];
523:                 }
524:             }
525:             currentCards = cards;
526:             currentIndex = 0;
527:             currentView = 'study';
528:             render();
529:         });
530: 
531:         // dueReviewBtn is rendered dynamically, use event delegation
532:         document.getElementById('appRoot')?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
533:             if (e.target.id === 'dueReviewBtn') {
534:                 dueOnlyMode = true;
535:                 const setSelect = document.getElementById('setSelect');
536:                 if (setSelect) setSelect.value = '';
537:                 document.getElementById('launchStudyBtn')?.click();
538:             }
539:         });
540: 
541:         document.getElementById('switchStudentBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => clearStudent());
542:         document.getElementById('editProfileBtn')?.addEventListener('click', openEditProfileModal);
543:     }
544: 
545:     function openEditProfileModal() {
546:         const existing = document.getElementById('editProfileModal');
547:         if (existing) existing.remove();
548: 
549:         const modal = document.createElement('div');
550:         modal.id = 'editProfileModal';
551:         modal.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:1000;animation:fadeIn 0.2s;';
552:         modal.innerHTML = `
553:             <div class="whiteboard-card" style="max-width:400px;width:90%;padding:24px;">
554:                 <h3 class="text-lg marker-underline mb-3">✏️ Edit Profile</h3>
555:                 <div class="flex gap-2 mb-3">
556:                     <button id="saveProfileBtn" class="flex-1 bg-blue-700 text-white py-2 rounded-xl font-bold">💾 Save</button>
557:                     <button id="cancelProfileBtn" class="flex-1 bg-gray-300 text-gray-800 py-2 rounded-xl font-bold">Cancel</button>
558:                 </div>
559:                 <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Full Name:</label>
560:                 <input type="text" id="editProfileFullName" class="form-input w-full p-2 border-2 rounded-xl mb-3" value="${escapeHtml(currentStudent?.full_name || '')}">
561:                 <label class="block font-bold mb-1">English Level:</label>
562:                 <select id="editProfileLevel" class="form-select w-full p-2 border-2 rounded-xl mb-3 bg-white">
563:                     <option value="Beginner" ${currentStudent?.english_level === 'Beginner' ? 'selected' : ''}>🔰 Beginner</option>
564:                     <option value="Intermediate" ${currentStudent?.english_level === 'Intermediate' ? 'selected' : ''}>📚 Intermediate</option>
565:                     <option value="Advanced" ${currentStudent?.english_level === 'Advanced' ? 'selected' : ''}>🎓 Advanced</option>
566:                 </select>
567:                 <p id="editProfileError" class="text-red-600 text-center mt-2 hidden"></p>
568:             </div>
569:         `;
570:         document.body.appendChild(modal);
571: 
572:         document.getElementById('cancelProfileBtn').addEventListener('click', () => modal.remove());
573:         modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === modal) modal.remove(); });
574: 
575:         document.getElementById('saveProfileBtn').addEventListener('click', async () => {
576:             const fullName = document.getElementById('editProfileFullName').value.trim();
577:             const englishLevel = document.getElementById('editProfileLevel').value;
578: 
579:             const res = await apiCall('api/login.php', 'POST', {
580:                 action: 'update_profile',
581:                 user_id: currentStudent.id,
582:                 full_name: fullName,
583:                 english_level: englishLevel
584:             });
585:             if (res && res.success) {
586:                 currentStudent.full_name = fullName;
587:                 currentStudent.english_level = englishLevel;
588:                 modal.remove();
589:                 render();
590:             } else {
591:                 alert(res?.error || 'Error updating profile');
592:             }
593:         });
594:     }
595: 
596:     function renderCardFront(card) {
597:         const pattern = card.pattern_type;
598:         const data = card.content_data || {};
599:         const title = card.title || 'Flashcard';
600: 
601:         if (pattern === 'multiple_choice') {
602:             const options = data.options || ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C'];
603:             const gridClass = options.length > 3 ? 'grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-3' : 'space-y-3';
604:             return `
605:                 <div class="text-center">
606:                     <p class="text-lg mb-3 font-bold">❓ ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(card.question_text || 'Select the correct answer:'))}</p>
607:                     <div class="${gridClass}" id="mcqOptionsContainer">
608:                         ${options.map((opt, idx) => `<div class="quiz-option" data-idx="${idx}">${String.fromCharCode(65+idx)}. ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(opt))}</div>`).join('')}
609:                     </div>
610:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-2">👆 Tap your answer, then flip the card</p>
611:                 </div>
612:             `;
613:         } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill') {
614:             const sentence = data.sentence || 'Complete the sentence: ______';
615:             const hint = getGapFillHint(card);
616:             return `
617:                 <div class="text-center">
618:                     <p class="text-lg mb-1 font-bold">✏️ Complete the sentence:</p>
619:                     <p class="text-sm bg-gray-100 p-3 rounded-xl mb-1">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(sentence))}</p>
620:                     <div class="context-hint">${hint}</div>
621:                     <input type="text" id="gapFillInput" placeholder="Type your answer..." class="w-full p-2 text-sm border-2 rounded-xl mb-2" autocomplete="off">
622:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-1">👆 Type answer, then flip to check</p>
623:                 </div>
624:             `;
625:         } else if (pattern === 'image_description') {
626:             const imageUrl = data.image_url || '';
627:             const hasImage = imageUrl && (imageUrl.startsWith('http://') || imageUrl.startsWith('https://') || imageUrl.startsWith('uploads/'));
628:             return `
629:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full min-h-[200px]">
630:                     <h1 class="text-xl md:text-2xl text-center font-bold marker-underline mb-3">🖼️ ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h1>
631:                     ${hasImage ? `<img src="${escapeHtml(imageUrl)}" alt="${escapeHtml(title)}" class="max-h-48 md:max-h-64 rounded-xl shadow-md mb-2 object-contain" onerror="this.style.display='none'">` : `<div class="text-6xl mb-2">🖼️</div>`}
632:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-2">👆 Tap card to flip</p>
633:                 </div>
634:             `;
635:         } else if (pattern === 'audio_listening') {
636:             const audioUrl = data.audio_url || '';
637:             const hasAudio = audioUrl && (audioUrl.startsWith('http://') || audioUrl.startsWith('https://') || audioUrl.startsWith('uploads/'));
638:             const prompt = data.prompt || '';
639:             const isInteractive = !!(prompt || data.correct_answers);
640:             const isTranscription = !!data.transcript && !data.correct_answers;
641:             return `
642:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full min-h-[200px]">
643:                     <h1 class="text-xl md:text-2xl text-center font-bold marker-underline mb-3">🎧 ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h1>
644:                     ${hasAudio ? `<audio controls class="w-full max-w-xs mb-2" src="${escapeHtml(audioUrl)}">Your browser does not support audio.</audio>` : `<div class="text-6xl mb-2">🎧</div>`}
645:                     ${prompt ? `<p class="text-sm bg-gray-100 p-2 rounded-xl mb-1">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(prompt))}</p>` : ''}
646:                     ${isInteractive ? `<input type="text" id="gapFillInput" placeholder="${isTranscription ? 'Type what you hear...' : 'Type your answer...'}" class="w-full p-2 text-sm border-2 rounded-xl mb-2" autocomplete="off">` : ''}
647:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-1">👆 Tap card to flip${isInteractive ? ' after answering' : ''}</p>
648:                 </div>
649:             `;
650:         } else {
651:             return `
652:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full min-h-[200px]">
653:                     <h1 class="text-xl md:text-2xl md:text-3xl text-center font-bold marker-underline max-w-full break-words px-2">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h1>
654:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-3">👆 Tap card to flip</p>
655:                 </div>
656:             `;
657:         }
658:     }
659: 
660:     function renderCardBack(card, quizState) {
661:         const data = card.content_data || {};
662:         const pattern = card.pattern_type;
663:         const title = card.title || 'Flashcard';
664: 
665:         if (pattern === 'multiple_choice') {
666:             const options = data.options || ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C'];
667:             const correctIdx = data.correct_index !== undefined ? data.correct_index : 1;
668:             const correctAnswer = options[correctIdx];
669:             const selectedIdx = quizState?.selectedIdx;
670:             const isCorrect = (selectedIdx === correctIdx);
671:             const explanation = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.explanation || ''));
672: 
673:             return `
674:                 <div class="back-content">
675:                     <div class="text-center">
676:                         <h3 class="text-lg text-green-700 title-font marker-underline mb-2">✓ Answer</h3>
677:                         <div class="bg-green-50 p-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300 mb-2">
678:                             <p class="text-base font-bold">${String.fromCharCode(65+correctIdx)}. ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(correctAnswer))}</p>
679:                         </div>
680:                         ${selectedIdx !== null ? `
681:                         <div class="p-2 rounded-lg mb-2 ${isCorrect ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'}">
682:                             <p class="text-sm">${isCorrect ? '✅ Correct!' : `❌ Incorrect. The correct answer is ${String.fromCharCode(65+correctIdx)}.`}</p>
683:                         </div>
684:                         ` : ''}
685:                         ${explanation ? `<div class="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1 p-2 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">📝 ${explanation}</div>` : ''}
686:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">Rate your recall using the buttons below</p>
687:                     </div>
688:                 </div>
689:             `;
690:         } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill') {
691:             const correctAnswers = data.correct_answers || ['answer'];
692:             const userAnswer = quizState?.userAnswer || '';
693:             const isMatch = correctAnswers.some(ans => ans.toLowerCase() === userAnswer.toLowerCase());
694:             const example = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.example || ''));
695: 
696:             return `
697:                 <div class="back-content">
698:                     <div class="text-center">
699:                         <h3 class="text-lg text-green-700 title-font marker-underline mb-2">✓ Correct Answer</h3>
700:                         <div class="bg-green-50 p-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300 mb-2">
701:                             <p class="text-base font-bold">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(correctAnswers.join(' / ')))}</p>
702:                         </div>
703:                         ${userAnswer ? `
704:                         <div class="p-2 rounded-lg mb-2 ${isMatch ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'}">
705:                             <p class="text-sm">${isMatch ? '✅ Correct!' : `❌ Incorrect. Your answer: "${escapeHtml(userAnswer)}"`}</p>
706:                         </div>
707:                         ` : ''}
708:                         ${example ? `<div class="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1 p-2 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">📝 Example: ${example}</div>` : ''}
709:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">Rate your recall using the buttons below</p>
710:                     </div>
711:                 </div>
712:             `;
713:         } else if (pattern === 'image_description') {
714:             const description = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.description || 'No description'));
715:             return `
716:                 <div class="back-content">
717:                     <div class="text-center">
718:                         <h3 class="text-lg text-blue-700 title-font marker-underline mb-2">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h3>
719:                         <div class="card-definition bg-blue-50 p-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-300">
720:                             ${description}
721:                         </div>
722:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">Rate your recall using the buttons below</p>
723:                     </div>
724:                 </div>
725:             `;
726:         } else if (pattern === 'audio_listening') {
727:             const transcript = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.transcript || data.notes || ''));
728:             const correctAnswers = data.correct_answers || [];
729:             const userAnswer = quizState?.userAnswer || '';
730:             const isInteractive = !!(data.prompt || correctAnswers.length);
731:             let isMatch = false;
732:             if (userAnswer && correctAnswers.length) {
733:                 isMatch = correctAnswers.some(ans => ans.toLowerCase() === userAnswer.toLowerCase());
734:             } else if (userAnswer && data.transcript) {
735:                 isMatch = data.transcript.toLowerCase().trim() === userAnswer.toLowerCase().trim();
736:             }
737:             return `
738:                 <div class="back-content">
739:                     <div class="text-center">
740:                         <h3 class="text-lg text-green-700 title-font marker-underline mb-2">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h3>
741:                         ${transcript ? `<div class="card-definition bg-green-50 p-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300 mb-2">${transcript}</div>` : ''}
742:                         ${isInteractive && userAnswer ? `
743:                         <div class="p-2 rounded-lg mb-2 ${isMatch ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'}">
744:                             <p class="text-sm">${isMatch ? '✅ Correct!' : `❌ Your answer: "${escapeHtml(userAnswer)}"`}</p>
745:                         </div>
746:                         ` : isInteractive && !userAnswer ? `<p class="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-2">Type what you heard above, then flip.</p>` : ''}
747:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">Rate your recall using the buttons below</p>
748:                     </div>
749:                 </div>
750:             `;
751:         } else {
752:             const definition = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.definition || data.usage1 || 'No definition available'));
753:             const example = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.example1a || data.example || ''));
754: 
755:             return `
756:                 <div class="back-content">
757:                     <div class="text-center">
758:                         <h3 class="text-lg text-blue-700 title-font marker-underline mb-2">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h3>
759:                         <div class="card-definition bg-blue-50 p-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-300">
760:                             ${definition}
761:                         </div>
762:                         ${example ? `
763:                             <div class="mt-2 p-2 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg">
764:                                 <p class="text-sm"><strong>Example:</strong> ${example}</p>
765:                             </div>
766:                         ` : ''}
767:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">Rate your recall using the buttons below</p>
768:                     </div>
769:                 </div>
770:             `;
771:         }
772:     }
773: 
774:     function handleFlip(card, quizState, flashcardEl) {
775:         if (flashcardEl.classList.contains('flipped')) {
776:             flashcardEl.classList.remove('flipped');
777:             isFlipped = false;
778:             return;
779:         }
780: 
781:         const pattern = card.pattern_type;
782:         if (pattern === 'multiple_choice') {
783:             const selected = document.querySelector('#mcqOptionsContainer .quiz-option.selected');
784:             if (selected) {
785:                 quizState.selectedIdx = parseInt(selected.getAttribute('data-idx'));
786:                 quizState.answered = true;
787:             }
788:         } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill' || pattern === 'audio_listening') {
789:             const input = document.getElementById('gapFillInput');
790:             if (input) {
791:                 quizState.userAnswer = input.value.trim();
792:                 quizState.answered = true;
793:             }
794:         }
795: 
796:         SoundFX.flip();
797:         isFlipped = true;
798: 
799:         const backDiv = document.getElementById('cardBack');
800:         if (backDiv && quizState.answered) {
801:             backDiv.innerHTML = renderCardBack(card, quizState);
802:         } else if (backDiv && !quizState.answered && pattern !== 'usage_cases' && pattern !== 'deep_dive' && pattern !== 'formula_table' && pattern !== 'image_description' && pattern !== 'audio_listening') {
803:             backDiv.innerHTML = renderCardBack(card, quizState);
804:         }
805: 
806:         flashcardEl.classList.add('flipped');
807:     }
808: 
809:     function handleAutoFlip(card, quizState) {
810:         setTimeout(() => {
811:             if (!isFlipped) {
812:                 SoundFX.flip();
813:                 isFlipped = true;
814:                 const flashcardEl = document.getElementById('flashcardEl');
815:                 if (flashcardEl) {
816:                     const backDiv = document.getElementById('cardBack');
817:                     if (backDiv) backDiv.innerHTML = renderCardBack(card, quizState);
818:                     flashcardEl.classList.add('flipped');
819:                 }
820:             }
821:         }, 400);
822:     }
823: 
824:     function renderStudyScreen() {
825:         if (!currentCards.length || currentIndex >= currentCards.length) {
826:             const isAllDue = allDueReviewed;
827:             const msg = isAllDue
828:                 ? `<div class="text-5xl md:text-6xl mb-2 celebration-pop">🎉📚</div><h2 class="text-2xl md:text-3xl text-blue-800 marker-underline mb-2">All cards viewed!</h2><p class="text-sm md:text-base mb-3">You've seen all due cards for this set.<br>Try another set or come back later!</p>`
829:                 : `<div class="text-5xl md:text-6xl mb-2 celebration-pop">🏆✨</div><h2 class="text-2xl md:text-3xl text-green-800 marker-underline mb-2">All caught up!</h2><p class="text-sm md:text-base mb-3">Great job, ${escapeHtml(currentStudent?.username || currentStudent?.name || 'student')}!</p>`;

18:     function escapeHtml(str) {
19:         if (!str) return '';
20:         const map = { '&': '&amp;', '<': '&lt;', '>': '&gt;', '"': '&quot;', "'": '&#39;' };
21:         return String(str).replace(/[&<>"']/g, m => map[m]);
22:     }
23: 
24:     function formatBreaks(text) {
25:         if (!text) return '';
26:         let s = String(text);
27:         s = s.replace(/\\\\/g, '\\');
28:         s = s.replace(/\\br ?/g, '<br>');
29:         s = s.replace(/\\b(.*?)\\b/g, '<b>$1</b>');
30:         s = s.replace(/\\i(.*?)\\i/g, '<i>$1</i>');
31:         s = s.replace(/\\u(.*?)\\u/g, '<u>$1</u>');
32:         s = s.replace(/\\em(.*?)\\em/g, '<em>$1</em>');
33:         s = s.replace(/\\strong(.*?)\\strong/g, '<strong>$1</strong>');
34:         return s;
35:     }
36: 
37:     async function loadCardSets() {
38:         const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=get_sets&t=' + Date.now(), {
39:             headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
40:         });
41:         const data = await response.json();
42:         if (data.success && data.sets) {
43:             const currentVal = setSelector.value;
44:             setSelector.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- Choose Card Set --</option>';
45:             data.sets.forEach(set => {
46:                 setSelector.innerHTML += `<option value="${set.id}">${escapeHtml(set.name)}</option>`;
47:             });
48:             if (currentVal) setSelector.value = currentVal;
49:         }
50:     }
51: 
52:     async function loadCards(setId) {
53:         if (!setId) {
54:             cardListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center text-gray-500 py-8">Select a card set to load cards</div>';
55:             return;
56:         }
57:         currentSetId = setId;
58: 
59:         const levels = [];
60:         if (document.getElementById('levelBeginner').checked) levels.push('Beginner');
61:         if (document.getElementById('levelIntermediate').checked) levels.push('Intermediate');
62:         if (document.getElementById('levelAdvanced').checked) levels.push('Advanced');
63: 
64:         const styles = [];
65:         if (document.getElementById('styleText').checked) styles.push('text');
66:         if (document.getElementById('styleMcq').checked) styles.push('mcq');
67:         if (document.getElementById('styleGap').checked) styles.push('gap');
68:         if (document.getElementById('styleImage').checked) styles.push('image');
69:         if (document.getElementById('styleAudio').checked) styles.push('audio');
70: 
71:         cardListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center py-8"><div class="loader"></div> Loading cards...</div>';
72: 
73:         const response = await fetch(`admin_cards.php?action=get_cards&set_id=${setId}&t=${Date.now()}`, {
74:             headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
75:         });
76:         const data = await response.json();
77:         if (data.success) {
78:             currentCards = data.cards;
79:             renderCardList(levels, styles);
80:         } else {
81:             cardListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center text-red-500 py-8">Error loading cards</div>';
82:         }
83:     }
84: 
85:     function getSearchTerm() {
86:         const input = document.getElementById('cardSearchInput');
87:         return input ? input.value.trim().toLowerCase() : '';
88:     }
89: 
90:     function getStyleClass(patternType) {
91:         if (patternType === 'multiple_choice') return 'mcq';
92:         if (patternType === 'gap_fill') return 'gap';
93:         if (patternType === 'image_description') return 'image';
94:         if (patternType === 'audio_listening') return 'audio';
95:         return 'text';
96:     }
97: 
98:     function renderCardList(levelFilter = [], styleFilter = []) {
99:         let filteredCards = currentCards;
100: 
101:         const searchTerm = getSearchTerm();
102:         if (searchTerm) {
103:             filteredCards = filteredCards.filter(card =>
104:                 (card.title || '').toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm)
105:             );
106:         }
107: 
108:         if (levelFilter.length > 0) {
109:             filteredCards = filteredCards.filter(card => levelFilter.includes(card.level));
110:         }
111: 
112:         if (styleFilter.length > 0) {
113:             filteredCards = filteredCards.filter(card => styleFilter.includes(getStyleClass(card.pattern_type)));
114:         }
115: 
116:         if (!filteredCards.length) {
117:             cardListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center text-gray-500 py-8">No cards matching filter in this set</div>';
118:             return;
119:         }
120: 
121:         let html = '';
122:         filteredCards.forEach(card => {
123:             const isSelected = (selectedCardId === card.id);
124:             const typeClass = getStyleClass(card.pattern_type);
125:             const typeLabels = { mcq: 'MCQ', gap: 'Gap', image: 'Image', audio: 'Audio', text: 'Text' };
126:             const typeLabel = typeLabels[typeClass] || 'Text';
127:             html += `
128:                 <div class="card-item ${isSelected ? 'selected' : ''}" data-id="${card.id}">
129:                     <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
130:                         <span class="card-title">${escapeHtml(card.title || 'Untitled')}</span>
131:                         <span class="card-type ${typeClass}">${typeLabel}</span>
132:                     </div>
133:                     <div class="card-meta">${escapeHtml(card.level || 'Beginner')} · ID ${card.id}</div>
134:                     <button class="card-delete-btn" title="Delete card">&times;</button>
135:                 </div>
136:             `;
137:         });
138:         cardListContainer.innerHTML = html;
139: 
140:         document.querySelectorAll('.card-item').forEach(el => {
141:             el.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
142:                 if (e.target.classList.contains('card-delete-btn')) return;
143:                 const id = parseInt(el.dataset.id);
144:                 const card = currentCards.find(c => c.id === id);
145:                 if (card) loadCardIntoEditor(card);
146:                 document.querySelectorAll('.card-item').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('selected'));
147:                 el.classList.add('selected');
148:                 selectedCardId = id;
149:             });
150:         });
151: 
152:         document.querySelectorAll('.card-delete-btn').forEach(btn => {
153:             btn.addEventListener('click', async (e) => {
154:                 e.stopPropagation();
155:                 const el = btn.closest('.card-item');
156:                 const id = parseInt(el.dataset.id);
157:                 const card = currentCards.find(c => c.id === id);
158:                 const title = card ? card.title : 'this card';
159:                 if (!confirm(`Delete "${title}"? This cannot be undone.`)) return;
160:                 const response = await fetch(`admin_cards.php?action=delete_card&card_id=${id}`, {
161:                     headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
162:                 });
163:                 const result = await response.json();
164:                 if (result.success) {
165:                     if (selectedCardId === id) newCard();
166:                     if (setSelector.value) loadCards(setSelector.value);
167:                 } else {
168:                     alert('Error deleting card');
169:                 }
170:             });
171:         });
172:     }

174:     function loadCardIntoEditor(card) {
175:         currentEditingCard = card;
176:         editCardId.value = card.id;
177:         editTitle.value = card.title || '';
178:         editPatternType.value = card.pattern_type || 'usage_cases';
179:         editLevel.value = card.level || 'Beginner';
180:         if (editSetId) editSetId.value = card.set_id || 1;
181: 
182:         let contentData = card.content_data || {};

184:             try { contentData = JSON.parse(contentData); } catch (e) { contentData = {}; }
185:         }
186: 
187:         renderEditFields(card.pattern_type || 'usage_cases', contentData);
188:         updatePreviews();

201:                 </div>
202:                 <div>
203:                     <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Options (comma separated):</label>

214:                     <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Explanation (optional):</label>

231:                 <div>

240:                     <div class="flex gap-2">

243:                         <button type="button" id="editImageUploadBtn" class="px-3 py-1 bg-gray-200 rounded-xl text-xs hover:bg-gray-300 whitespace-nowrap">📁 Upload</button>
244:                     </div>
245:                     <div class="help-text">Paste a URL or upload a local image (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP)</div>
246:                 </div>
247:                 <div>
248:                     <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Description (shown on back):</label>
249:                     <textarea id="editDescription" class="form-textarea" rows="5" placeholder="Describe the image, what it shows, or what the student should learn from it...\brUse \br for line breaks">${escapeHtml(contentData.description || '')}</textarea>
250:                 </div>
251:             `;
252:         } else if (patternType === 'audio_listening') {
253:             html = `
254:                 <div class="mt-2">
255:                     <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Audio URL:</label>
256:                     <div class="flex gap-2">

294: 
295:     function setupUploadHandlers(patternType) {
296:         const btnId = patternType === 'image_description' ? 'editImageUploadBtn' : patternType === 'audio_listening' ? 'editAudioUploadBtn' : null;
297:         const fileId = patternType === 'image_description' ? 'editImageUpload' : patternType === 'audio_listening' ? 'editAudioUpload' : null;
298:         const urlId = patternType === 'image_description' ? 'editImageUrl' : patternType === 'audio_listening' ? 'editAudioUrl' : null;
299:         if (!btnId || !fileId || !urlId) return;
300: 
301:         const btn = document.getElementById(btnId);
302:         const fileInput = document.getElementById(fileId);
303:         const urlInput = document.getElementById(urlId);
304:         if (!btn || !fileInput || !urlInput) return;
305: 
306:         btn.addEventListener('click', () => fileInput.click());
307:         fileInput.addEventListener('change', async () => {
308:             const file = fileInput.files?.[0];
309:             if (!file) return;
310:             btn.textContent = '⏳ Uploading...';
311:             btn.disabled = true;
312:             try {
313:                 const fd = new FormData();
314:                 fd.append('type', patternType === 'image_description' ? 'image' : 'audio');
315:                 fd.append(patternType === 'image_description' ? 'image' : 'audio', file);
316:                 const res = await fetch('api/upload.php', { method: 'POST', body: fd });
317:                 const data = await res.json();
318:                 if (data.success) {
319:                     urlInput.value = data.url;
320:                     updatePreviews();
321:                 } else {
322:                     alert('Upload failed: ' + (data.error || 'Unknown error'));
323:                 }
324:             } catch (e) {
325:                 alert('Upload error: ' + e.message);
326:             }
327:             btn.textContent = '📁 Upload';
328:             btn.disabled = false;
329:             fileInput.value = '';
330:         });
331:         urlInput.addEventListener('blur', () => updatePreviews());
332:         urlInput.addEventListener('change', () => updatePreviews());
333:     }
334: 
335:     function getCurrentContentData() {
336:         const patternType = editPatternType.value;
337:         const contentData = {};
338: 
339:         if (patternType === 'multiple_choice') {
340:             const optionsInput = document.getElementById('editOptions');
341:             const options = optionsInput ? optionsInput.value.split(',').map(s => s.trim()) : ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C'];
342:             const correctIdx = document.getElementById('editCorrectIndex');
343:             contentData.options = options;
344:             contentData.correct_index = correctIdx ? parseInt(correctIdx.value) : 1;
345:             contentData.question_text = document.getElementById('editQuestionText')?.value || '';
346:             contentData.explanation = document.getElementById('editExplanation')?.value || '';
347:         } else if (patternType === 'gap_fill') {
348:             const answersInput = document.getElementById('editCorrectAnswers');
349:             contentData.sentence = document.getElementById('editSentence')?.value || '';
350:             contentData.correct_answers = answersInput ? answersInput.value.split(',').map(s => s.trim()) : ['answer'];
351:             contentData.example = document.getElementById('editExample')?.value || '';
352:         } else if (patternType === 'image_description') {
353:             contentData.image_url = document.getElementById('editImageUrl')?.value || '';
354:             contentData.description = document.getElementById('editDescription')?.value || '';
355:         } else if (patternType === 'audio_listening') {
356:             contentData.audio_url = document.getElementById('editAudioUrl')?.value || '';
357:             contentData.prompt = document.getElementById('editPrompt')?.value || '';
358:             contentData.transcript = document.getElementById('editTranscript')?.value || '';
359:             const answersInput = document.getElementById('editCorrectAnswers');
360:             const answers = answersInput ? answersInput.value.split(',').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean) : [];
361:             if (answers.length) contentData.correct_answers = answers;
362:         } else {
363:             contentData.definition = document.getElementById('editDefinition')?.value || '';
364:             contentData.example = document.getElementById('editExample')?.value || '';
365:         }
366: 
367:         return contentData;
368:     }
369: 
370:     function updatePreviews() {
371:         const patternType = editPatternType.value;
372:         const title = editTitle.value || 'Flashcard';
373:         const contentData = getCurrentContentData();
374: 
375:         let frontHtml = '';
376:         if (patternType === 'multiple_choice') {
377:             const options = contentData.options || ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C'];
378:             frontHtml = `
379:                 <div class="text-center">
380:                     <div class="text-4xl mb-3">❓</div>
381:                     <p class="text-lg mb-4 font-bold">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(contentData.question_text || 'Select the correct answer:'))}</p>
382:                     ${options.map((opt, idx) => `<div class="quiz-option-preview text-base">${String.fromCharCode(65+idx)}. ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(opt))}</div>`).join('')}
383:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-3">👆 Tap card to flip</p>
384:                 </div>
385:             `;
386:         } else if (patternType === 'gap_fill') {
387:             frontHtml = `
388:                 <div class="text-center">
389:                     <div class="text-4xl mb-3">✏️</div>
390:                     <p class="text-lg mb-4 font-bold">Complete the sentence:</p>
391:                     <p class="text-base bg-gray-100 p-3 rounded-xl">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(contentData.sentence || 'Complete: ______'))}</p>
392:                     <input type="text" placeholder="Type answer..." class="w-full p-2 text-base border-2 rounded-xl mt-3" disabled style="background:#f3f4f6">
393:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-3">👆 Tap card to flip</p>
394:                 </div>
395:             `;
396:         } else if (patternType === 'image_description') {
397:             const imgUrl = contentData.image_url || '';
398:             const hasImg = imgUrl && (imgUrl.startsWith('http://') || imgUrl.startsWith('https://') || imgUrl.startsWith('uploads/'));
399:             frontHtml = `
400:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[200px]">
401:                     <div class="text-4xl mb-2">🖼️</div>
402:                     <div class="text-center font-bold text-xl mb-2">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</div>
403:                     ${hasImg ? `<img src="${escapeHtml(imgUrl)}" alt="" class="max-h-32 rounded-lg shadow mb-2" onerror="this.style.display='none'">` : `<div class="text-gray-400 text-sm mb-2">(no image URL)</div>`}
404:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">👆 Tap card to flip</p>
405:                 </div>
406:             `;
407:         } else if (patternType === 'audio_listening') {
408:             const audUrl = contentData.audio_url || '';
409:             const hasAud = audUrl && (audUrl.startsWith('http://') || audUrl.startsWith('https://') || audUrl.startsWith('uploads/'));
410:             frontHtml = `
411:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[200px]">
412:                     <div class="text-4xl mb-2">🎧</div>
413:                     <div class="text-center font-bold text-xl mb-2">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</div>
414:                     ${hasAud ? `<audio controls class="w-full max-w-xs mb-2" src="${escapeHtml(audUrl)}"></audio>` : `<div class="text-gray-400 text-sm mb-2">(no audio URL)</div>`}
415:                     ${contentData.prompt ? `<p class="text-sm bg-gray-100 p-2 rounded-xl">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(contentData.prompt))}</p>` : ''}
416:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-3">👆 Tap card to flip</p>
417:                 </div>
418:             `;
419:         } else {
420:             frontHtml = `
421:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[200px]">
422:                     <div class="text-4xl text-center font-bold">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</div>
423:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-4">👆 Tap card to flip</p>
424:                 </div>
425:             `;
426:         }
427: 
428:         let backHtml = '';
429:         if (patternType === 'multiple_choice') {
430:             const options = contentData.options || ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C'];
431:             const correctIdx = contentData.correct_index || 1;
432:             backHtml = `
433:                 <div class="text-center">
434:                     <h3 class="text-xl text-green-700 marker-underline mb-3">✓ Answer</h3>
435:                     <div class="bg-green-50 p-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300 mb-3">
436:                         <p class="text-xl font-bold">${String.fromCharCode(65+correctIdx)}. ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(options[correctIdx] || 'Correct Answer'))}</p>
437:                     </div>
438:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-600">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(contentData.explanation || 'Explanation would appear here.'))}</p>
439:                 </div>
440:             `;
441:         } else if (patternType === 'gap_fill') {
442:             const answers = contentData.correct_answers || ['answer'];
443:             backHtml = `
444:                 <div class="text-center">
445:                     <h3 class="text-xl text-green-700 marker-underline mb-3">✓ Correct Answer</h3>
446:                     <div class="bg-green-50 p-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300">
447:                         <p class="text-xl font-bold">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(answers.join(' / ')))}</p>
448:                     </div>
449:                     ${contentData.example ? `<p class="text-md text-gray-600 mt-3">📝 Example: ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(contentData.example))}</p>` : ''}
450:                 </div>
451:             `;
452:         } else if (patternType === 'image_description') {
453:             backHtml = `
454:                 <div class="text-center">
455:                     <h3 class="text-2xl text-blue-700 marker-underline mb-3">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h3>
456:                     <div class="bg-blue-50 p-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-300">
457:                         <p class="text-lg">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(contentData.description || 'Description'))}</p>
458:                     </div>
459:                 </div>
460:             `;
461:         } else if (patternType === 'audio_listening') {
462:             const transcript = contentData.transcript || contentData.notes || '';
463:             backHtml = `
464:                 <div class="text-center">
465:                     <h3 class="text-xl text-green-700 marker-underline mb-3">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h3>
466:                     ${transcript ? `<div class="bg-green-50 p-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300 mb-3"><p class="text-lg">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(transcript))}</p></div>` : `<p class="text-gray-400">Transcript not provided</p>`}
467:                 </div>
468:             `;
469:         } else {
470:             backHtml = `
471:                 <div class="text-center">
472:                     <h3 class="text-2xl text-blue-700 marker-underline mb-3">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h3>
473:                     <div class="bg-blue-50 p-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-300">
474:                         <p class="text-lg">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(contentData.definition || 'Definition would appear here.'))}</p>
475:                     </div>
476:                     ${contentData.example ? `<p class="text-md text-gray-600 mt-3">📝 Example: ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(contentData.example))}</p>` : ''}
477:                 </div>
478:             `;
479:         }
480: 
481:         frontPreviewContent.innerHTML = frontHtml;
482:         backPreviewContent.innerHTML = backHtml;
483:     }
484: 
485:     async function saveCard() {
486:         const patternType = editPatternType.value;
487:         const contentData = getCurrentContentData();
488: 
489:         const cardData = {
490:             id: parseInt(editCardId.value) || 0,
491:             set_id: editSetId ? parseInt(editSetId.value) : (parseInt(setSelector.value) || 1),
492:             title: editTitle.value,
493:             pattern_type: patternType,
494:             level: editLevel.value,
495:             question_text: patternType === 'multiple_choice' ? contentData.question_text : '',
496:             content_data: contentData
497:         };
498: 
499:         const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=save_card', {
500:             method: 'POST',
501:             headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' },
502:             body: JSON.stringify(cardData)
503:         });
504:         const result = await response.json();
505:         if (result.success) {
506:             alert('Card saved successfully!');
507:             if (setSelector.value) loadCards(setSelector.value);
508:             if (result.id && (!editCardId.value || editCardId.value == 0)) {
509:                 editCardId.value = result.id;
510:             }
511:         } else {
512:             alert('Error saving card');
513:         }
514:     }
515: 
516:     async function deleteCard() {
517:         const cardId = parseInt(editCardId.value);
518:         if (!cardId) {
519:             alert('No card selected to delete');
520:             return;
521:         }
522:         if (confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this card? This action cannot be undone.')) {
523:             const response = await fetch(`admin_cards.php?action=delete_card&card_id=${cardId}`, {
524:                 headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
525:             });
526:             const result = await response.json();
527:             if (result.success) {
528:                 alert('Card deleted successfully!');
529:                 newCard();
530:                 if (setSelector.value) loadCards(setSelector.value);
531:             } else {
532:                 alert('Error deleting card');
533:             }
534:         }
535:     }
536: 
537:     function newCard() {
538:         editCardId.value = '0';
539:         editTitle.value = '';
540:         editPatternType.value = 'usage_cases';
541:         editLevel.value = 'Beginner';
542:         if (editSetId) editSetId.value = setSelector.value || '1';
543:         renderEditFields('usage_cases', {});
544:         updatePreviews();
545:         selectedCardId = null;
546:         document.querySelectorAll('.card-item').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('selected'));
547:     }
548: 
549:     function revertCard() {
550:         if (selectedCardId && currentEditingCard) {
551:             loadCardIntoEditor(currentEditingCard);
552:         } else {
553:             newCard();
554:         }
555:     }
556: 
557:     const cardEditorSection = document.getElementById('cardEditorSection');
558:     const userManagementSection = document.getElementById('userManagementSection');
559:     const userListContainer = document.getElementById('userListContainer');
560: 
561:     function showCardEditor() {
562:         if (cardEditorSection) cardEditorSection.classList.remove('hidden');
563:         if (userManagementSection) userManagementSection.classList.add('hidden');
564:     }
565: 
566:     function showUserManagement() {
567:         if (cardEditorSection) cardEditorSection.classList.add('hidden');
568:         if (userManagementSection) userManagementSection.classList.remove('hidden');
569:         loadUsers();
570:     }
571: 
572:     async function loadUsers() {
573:         if (!userListContainer) return;
574:         userListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center py-4"><div class="loader"></div> Loading users...</div>';
575: 
576:         const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=get_users&t=' + Date.now(), {
577:             headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
578:         });
579:         const data = await response.json();
580:         if (data.success && data.users) {
581:             renderUsers(data.users);
582:         } else {
583:             userListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center text-red-500 py-4">Error loading users</div>';
584:         }
585:     }
586: 
587:     function renderUsers(users) {
588:         if (!users.length) {
589:             userListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center text-gray-500 py-4">No users found</div>';
590:             return;
591:         }
592: 
593:         let html = '<table class="users-table">';
594:         html += '<tr><th>Name</th><th>Username</th><th>Role</th><th>Progress</th><th>Level</th><th>Actions</th></tr>';
595:         users.forEach(user => {
596:             html += `<tr>
597:                 <td>${escapeHtml(user.full_name || user.username)}</td>
598:                 <td>${escapeHtml(user.username)}</td>
599:                 <td>${user.is_admin ? '<span class="card-type mcq">Admin</span>' : '<span class="card-type text">Student</span>'}</td>
600:                 <td>${user.progress || 0}%</td>
601:                 <td>${escapeHtml(user.english_level || 'Beginner')}</td>
602:                 <td>
603:                     <button class="edit-user-btn btn btn-primary btn-xs" data-id="${user.id}" data-username="${escapeHtml(user.username)}" data-fullname="${escapeHtml(user.full_name || '')}" data-level="${escapeHtml(user.english_level || 'Beginner')}" data-admin="${user.is_admin}">✏️</button>
604:                     <button class="reset-user-btn btn btn-warning btn-xs" data-id="${user.id}">🔄</button>
605:                     <button class="delete-user-btn btn btn-danger btn-xs" data-id="${user.id}">🗑</button>
606:                 </td>
607:             </tr>`;
608:         });
609:         html += '</table>';
610: 
611:         userListContainer.innerHTML = html;
612: 
613:         document.querySelectorAll('.edit-user-btn').forEach(btn => {
614:             btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
615:                 openEditUserModal(btn.dataset);
616:             });
617:         });
618: 
619:         document.querySelectorAll('.delete-user-btn').forEach(btn => {
620:             btn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
621:                 const userId = parseInt(btn.dataset.id);
622:                 if (confirm('Delete this user? This action cannot be undone.')) {
623:                     const response = await fetch(`admin_cards.php?action=delete_user&user_id=${userId}`, {
624:                         headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
625:                     });
626:                     const result = await response.json();
627:                     if (result.success) {
628:                         loadUsers();
629:                     } else {
630:                         alert(result.error || 'Error deleting user');
631:                     }
632:                 }
633:             });
634:         });
635: 
636:         document.querySelectorAll('.reset-user-btn').forEach(btn => {
637:             btn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
638:                 const userId = parseInt(btn.dataset.id);
639:                 if (confirm('Reset all progress for this user? This will clear review history and progress.')) {
640:                     const response = await fetch(`admin_cards.php?action=reset_user_progress&user_id=${userId}`, {
641:                         headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
642:                     });
643:                     const result = await response.json();
644:                     if (result.success) {
645:                         alert('Progress reset successfully');
646:                         loadUsers();
647:                     } else {
648:                         alert(result.error || 'Error resetting progress');
649:                     }
650:                 }
651:             });
652:         });
653:     }
654: 
655:     function openEditUserModal(data) {
656:         const existing = document.getElementById('editUserModal');
657:         if (existing) existing.remove();
658: 
659:         const modal = document.createElement('div');
660:         modal.id = 'editUserModal';
661:         modal.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:1000;';
662:         modal.innerHTML = `
663:             <div class="whiteboard-card" style="max-width:500px;width:90%;padding:24px;max-height:80vh;overflow-y:auto;">
664:                 <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
665:                     <h3 class="text-lg marker-underline">✏️ Edit User</h3>
666:                     <div class="flex gap-2">
667:                         <button id="saveEditUserBtn" class="btn btn-success">💾 Save</button>
668:                         <button id="cancelEditUserBtn" class="btn btn-secondary">Cancel</button>
669:                     </div>
670:                 </div>
671:                 <p id="editUserError" class="text-red-600 text-center mt-2 hidden" style="display:none"></p>
672:                 <input type="hidden" id="editUserId" value="${data.id}">
673:                 <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Username:</label>
674:                 <input type="text" id="editUserUsername" class="form-input" value="${data.username}" maxlength="30">
675:                 <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Full Name:</label>
676:                 <input type="text" id="editUserFullName" class="form-input" value="${data.fullname}">
677:                 <label class="block font-bold mb-1">English Level:</label>
678:                 <select id="editUserLevel" class="form-select">
679:                     <option value="Beginner" ${data.level === 'Beginner' ? 'selected' : ''}>🔰 Beginner</option>
680:                     <option value="Intermediate" ${data.level === 'Intermediate' ? 'selected' : ''}>📚 Intermediate</option>
681:                     <option value="Advanced" ${data.level === 'Advanced' ? 'selected' : ''}>🎓 Advanced</option>
682:                 </select>
683:                 <label class="flex items-center gap-2 my-2">
684:                     <input type="checkbox" id="editUserIsAdmin" value="1" ${data.admin === 'true' || data.admin === '1' ? 'checked' : ''}>
685:                     <span class="font-bold">Admin privileges</span>
686:                 </label>
687:                 <div class="mt-3 mb-2">
688:                     <label class="block font-bold mb-1">📚 Visible Card Sets:</label>
689:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-2">Leave all unchecked to show all sets</p>
690:                     <div id="userSetAccessContainer" class="space-y-1">
691:                         <div class="text-sm text-gray-400">Loading sets...</div>
692:                     </div>
693:                 </div>
694:             </div>
695:         `;
696:         document.body.appendChild(modal);
697: 
698:         document.getElementById('cancelEditUserBtn').addEventListener('click', () => modal.remove());
699:         modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === modal) modal.remove(); });
700: 
701:         const saveBtn = document.getElementById('saveEditUserBtn');
702:         (async () => {
703:             const [setsRes, accessRes] = await Promise.all([
704:                 fetch('admin_cards.php?action=get_sets&t=' + Date.now(), { headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' } }),
705:                 fetch(`admin_cards.php?action=get_user_sets&user_id=${data.id}&t=${Date.now()}`, { headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' } })
706:             ]);
707:             const setsData = await setsRes.json();
708:             const accessData = await accessRes.json();
709:             const allSets = setsData.success ? setsData.sets : [];
710:             const userSetIds = accessData.success ? accessData.set_ids : [];
711:             const container = document.getElementById('userSetAccessContainer');
712:             if (allSets.length === 0) {
713:                 container.innerHTML = '<div class="text-sm text-gray-400">No card sets available</div>';
714:             } else {
715:                 container.innerHTML = allSets.map(set => `
716:                     <label class="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm cursor-pointer">
717:                         <input type="checkbox" class="user-set-checkbox" value="${set.id}" ${userSetIds.includes(set.id) ? 'checked' : ''}>
718:                         ${escapeHtml(set.name)}
719:                     </label>
720:                 `).join('');
721:             }
722:         })().then(() => {
723:             saveBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
724:                 const id = parseInt(document.getElementById('editUserId').value);
725:                 const username = document.getElementById('editUserUsername').value.trim();
726:                 const fullName = document.getElementById('editUserFullName').value.trim();
727:                 const englishLevel = document.getElementById('editUserLevel').value;
728:                 const isAdmin = document.getElementById('editUserIsAdmin').checked;
729: 
730:                 if (!username) { alert('Username is required'); return; }
731: 
732:                 const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=update_user', {
733:                     method: 'POST',
734:                     headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' },
735:                     body: JSON.stringify({ id, username, full_name: fullName, english_level: englishLevel, is_admin: isAdmin })
736:                 });
737:                 const result = await response.json();
738:                 if (!result.success) { alert(result.error || 'Error saving user'); return; }
739: 
740:                 const checkedSets = [...document.querySelectorAll('.user-set-checkbox:checked')].map(cb => parseInt(cb.value));
741:                 await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=set_user_sets', {
742:                     method: 'POST',
743:                     headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' },
744:                     body: JSON.stringify({ user_id: id, set_ids: checkedSets })
745:                 });
746: 
747:                 modal.remove();
748:                 loadUsers();
749:             });
750:         });
751:     }
752: 
753:     async function createUser() {
754:         const username = document.getElementById('newUserUsername')?.value.trim();
755:         const fullName = document.getElementById('newUserFullName')?.value.trim();
756:         const password = document.getElementById('newUserPassword')?.value;
757:         const englishLevel = document.getElementById('newUserLevel')?.value || 'Beginner';
758:         const isAdmin = document.getElementById('newUserIsAdmin')?.checked || false;
759: 
760:         if (!username) { alert('Username is required'); return; }
761:         if (!password || password.length < 6) { alert('Password must be at least 6 characters'); return; }
762: 
763:         const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=create_user', {
764:             method: 'POST',
765:             headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' },
766:             body: JSON.stringify({ username, full_name: fullName, password, english_level: englishLevel, is_admin: isAdmin })
767:         });
768:         const result = await response.json();
769:         if (result.success) {
770:             alert('User created successfully!');
771:             document.getElementById('newUserUsername').value = '';
772:             document.getElementById('newUserFullName').value = '';
773:             document.getElementById('newUserPassword').value = '';
774:             document.getElementById('newUserLevel').value = 'Beginner';
775:             document.getElementById('newUserIsAdmin').checked = false;
776:             loadUsers();
777:         } else {
778:             alert(result.error || 'Error creating user');
779:         }
780:     }
781: 
782:     setSelector.addEventListener('change', () => {
783:         if (setSelector.value) {
784:             loadCards(setSelector.value);
785:             newCard();
786:         } else {
787:             cardListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center text-gray-500 py-8">Select a card set to load cards</div>';
788:         }
789:     });
790: 
791:     editPatternType.addEventListener('change', () => {
792:         const currentContent = getCurrentContentData();
793:         renderEditFields(editPatternType.value, currentContent);
794:         updatePreviews();
795:     });
796: 
797:     editTitle.addEventListener('input', () => updatePreviews());
798: 
799:     document.getElementById('saveCardBtn').addEventListener('click', saveCard);
800:     document.getElementById('revertCardBtn').addEventListener('click', revertCard);
801:     document.getElementById('newCardBtn').addEventListener('click', newCard);
802:     document.getElementById('deleteCardBtn').addEventListener('click', deleteCard);
803:     document.getElementById('filterCardsBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
804:         if (setSelector.value) loadCards(setSelector.value);
805:     });
806: 
807:     const searchInput = document.getElementById('cardSearchInput');
808:     if (searchInput) {
809:         let searchTimeout;
810:         searchInput.addEventListener('input', () => {
811:             clearTimeout(searchTimeout);
812:             searchTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
813:                 const levels = [];
814:                 if (document.getElementById('levelBeginner').checked) levels.push('Beginner');
815:                 if (document.getElementById('levelIntermediate').checked) levels.push('Intermediate');
816:                 if (document.getElementById('levelAdvanced').checked) levels.push('Advanced');
817:                 const styles = [];
818:                 if (document.getElementById('styleText').checked) styles.push('text');
819:                 if (document.getElementById('styleMcq').checked) styles.push('mcq');
820:                 if (document.getElementById('styleGap').checked) styles.push('gap');
821:                 if (document.getElementById('styleImage').checked) styles.push('image');
822:                 if (document.getElementById('styleAudio').checked) styles.push('audio');
823:                 renderCardList(levels, styles);
824:             }, 200);
825:         });
826:     }
827: 
828:     setInterval(() => {
829:         if (document.activeElement && (document.activeElement.classList?.contains('form-input') ||
830:             document.activeElement.classList?.contains('form-textarea'))) {
831:             updatePreviews();
832:         }
833:     }, 500);
834: 
835:     document.getElementById('toggleUsersBtn')?.addEventListener('click', showUserManagement);
836:     document.getElementById('backToCardsBtn')?.addEventListener('click', showCardEditor);
837:     document.getElementById('createUserBtn')?.addEventListener('click', createUser);
838: 
839:     // --- Manage Sets ---
840:     const manageSetsModal = document.getElementById('manageSetsModal');
841:     const setListContainer = document.getElementById('setListContainer');
842: 
843:     async function loadSetsList() {
844:         if (!setListContainer) return;
845:         setListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center text-gray-500 py-4"><div class="loader"></div> Loading...</div>';
846:         const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=get_sets&t=' + Date.now(), {
847:             headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
848:         });
849:         const data = await response.json();
850:         if (!data.success || !data.sets) {
851:             setListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center text-red-500 py-4">Error loading sets</div>';
852:             return;
853:         }
854:         let html = '';
855:         data.sets.forEach(set => {
856:             const createdAt = set.created_at ? new Date(set.created_at + 'Z').toLocaleDateString() : '';
857:             html += `
858:                 <div class="set-item" data-id="${set.id}">
859:                     <div class="set-item-main">
860:                         <span class="set-name-display font-bold">${escapeHtml(set.name)}</span>
861:                         <input type="text" class="set-name-input hidden" value="${escapeHtml(set.name)}">
862:                         <div class="set-desc-display text-xs text-gray-500">${escapeHtml(set.description) || '<span class="text-gray-300">No description</span>'}</div>
863:                         <textarea class="set-desc-input hidden" rows="2">${escapeHtml(set.description || '')}</textarea>
864:                         <div class="set-meta text-xs text-gray-400">${createdAt ? 'Created: ' + createdAt : ''}</div>
865:                     </div>
866:                     <div class="set-item-actions">
867:                         <button class="edit-set-btn btn btn-primary btn-xs">✏️</button>
868:                         <button class="save-set-btn btn btn-success btn-xs hidden">💾</button>
869:                         <button class="cancel-set-btn btn btn-secondary btn-xs hidden">✕</button>
870:                         <button class="delete-set-btn btn btn-danger btn-xs">🗑</button>
871:                     </div>
872:                 </div>`;
873:         });
874:         setListContainer.innerHTML = html;
875: 
876:         document.querySelectorAll('.edit-set-btn').forEach(btn => {
877:             btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
878:                 const item = btn.closest('.set-item');
879:                 item.querySelector('.set-name-display').classList.add('hidden');
880:                 item.querySelector('.set-name-input').classList.remove('hidden');
881:                 item.querySelector('.set-desc-display').classList.add('hidden');
882:                 item.querySelector('.set-desc-input').classList.remove('hidden');
883:                 btn.classList.add('hidden');
884:                 item.querySelector('.save-set-btn').classList.remove('hidden');
885:                 item.querySelector('.cancel-set-btn').classList.remove('hidden');
886:                 item.querySelector('.delete-set-btn').classList.add('hidden');
887:                 item.querySelector('.set-name-input').focus();
888:             });
889:         });
890: 
891:         document.querySelectorAll('.cancel-set-btn').forEach(btn => {
892:             btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
893:                 const item = btn.closest('.set-item');
894:                 item.querySelector('.set-name-display').classList.remove('hidden');
895:                 item.querySelector('.set-name-input').classList.add('hidden');
896:                 item.querySelector('.set-desc-display').classList.remove('hidden');
897:                 item.querySelector('.set-desc-input').classList.add('hidden');
898:                 item.querySelector('.edit-set-btn').classList.remove('hidden');
899:                 btn.classList.add('hidden');
900:                 item.querySelector('.save-set-btn').classList.add('hidden');
901:                 item.querySelector('.cancel-set-btn').classList.add('hidden');
902:                 item.querySelector('.delete-set-btn').classList.remove('hidden');
903:                 item.querySelector('.set-name-input').value = item.querySelector('.set-name-display').textContent.trim();
904:                 item.querySelector('.set-desc-input').value = item.querySelector('.set-desc-display').textContent.trim();
905:             });
906:         });
907: 
908:         document.querySelectorAll('.save-set-btn').forEach(btn => {
909:             btn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
910:                 const item = btn.closest('.set-item');
911:                 const id = parseInt(item.dataset.id);
912:                 const name = item.querySelector('.set-name-input').value.trim();
913:                 const description = item.querySelector('.set-desc-input').value.trim();
914:                 if (!name) { alert('Name cannot be empty'); return; }
915:                 const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=update_set', {
916:                     method: 'POST',
917:                     headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' },
918:                     body: JSON.stringify({ id, name, description })
919:                 });
920:                 const result = await response.json();
921:                 if (result.success) {
922:                     await refreshSets();
923:                     loadSetsList();
924:                 } else {

926:                 }
927:             });
928:         });
929: 
930:         document.querySelectorAll('.delete-set-btn').forEach(btn => {
931:             btn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
932:                 const item = btn.closest('.set-item');
933:                 const id = parseInt(item.dataset.id);
934:                 if (confirm('Delete this card set? Cards in this set will remain but become orphaned.')) {
935:                     const response = await fetch(`admin_cards.php?action=delete_set&set_id=${id}`, {
936:                         headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
937:                     });
938:                     const result = await response.json();

941:                         loadSetsList();
942:                     } else {

944:                     }
945:                 }
946:             });
947:         });

904:             options.forEach(opt => {

916:

922:                         e.preventDefault();

925:                         handleAutoFlip(card, currentQuizState);

933:         const handleReview = async (quality) => {
934:             SoundFX.click();
935:             let wasCorrect = false;
936:             if (pattern === 'multiple_choice') {
937:                 const correctIdx = card.content_data?.correct_index ?? 1;
938:                 wasCorrect = (currentQuizState.selectedIdx === correctIdx);
939:             } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill') {
940:                 const correctAnswers = card.content_data?.correct_answers || ['answer'];
941:                 wasCorrect = correctAnswers.some(ans => ans.toLowerCase() === currentQuizState.userAnswer.toLowerCase());
942:             } else if (pattern === 'audio_listening') {
943:                 const correctAnswers = card.content_data?.correct_answers || [];
944:                 const transcript = card.content_data?.transcript || '';

946:                 if (correctAnswers.length) {
947:                     wasCorrect = correctAnswers.some(ans => ans.toLowerCase() === userAnswer.toLowerCase());
948:                 } else if (transcript) {
949:                     wasCorrect = transcript.toLowerCase().trim() === userAnswer.toLowerCase().trim();
950:                 } else {
951:                     wasCorrect = true;
952:                 }
953:             } else {
954:                 wasCorrect = true;
955:             }
956: 
957:             if (wasCorrect) SoundFX.correct();
958:             else SoundFX.incorrect();
959: 
960:             if (!currentStudent) { displayStatusMessage('Not logged in', 'error'); return; }
961:             const res = await recordReview(card.id, currentStudent.id, quality, wasCorrect);
962:             if (res?.streak_days !== undefined) streakDays = res.streak_days;
963:             currentIndex++;
964:             render();
965:         };
966: 
967:         document.getElementById('againBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => handleReview(0));
968:         document.getElementById('goodBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => handleReview(2));
969:         document.getElementById('easyBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => handleReview(3));
970:     }
