1028:         if (e.key === 'r' || e.key === 'R') revertCard();
1029:         if (e.key === '?' || e.key === 'H' || e.key === 'h') {
1030:             alert('Shortcuts: S=Save  N=New  D=Delete  R=Revert  ?=Help');
1031:         }
1032:     });
1033: 
1034:     // --- Import CSV Modal ---
1035:     let importRows = [];
1036:     let importHeader = [];
1037:     let importSelectedIdx = -1;
1038:     let importFileHandle = null;
1039: 
1040:     const importModal = document.getElementById('importModal');
1041:     const importStepFile = document.getElementById('importStepFile');
1042:     const importStepPreview = document.getElementById('importStepPreview');
1043:     const importDropZone = document.getElementById('importDropZone');
1044:     const importFileInput = document.getElementById('importFileInput');
1045:     const importFileName = document.getElementById('importFileName');
1046:     const importRowCount = document.getElementById('importRowCount');
1047:     const importPreviewBody = document.getElementById('importPreviewBody');
1048:     const importSetSelector = document.getElementById('importSetSelector');
1049:     const importApplySetAll = document.getElementById('importApplySetAll');
1050:     const importNewSetName = document.getElementById('importNewSetName');
1051:     const importEditTitle = document.getElementById('importEditTitle');
1052:     const importEditSetId = document.getElementById('importEditSetId');
1053:     const importEditStyle = document.getElementById('importEditStyle');
1054:     const importEditLevel = document.getElementById('importEditLevel');
1055:     const importEditDefinition = document.getElementById('importEditDefinition');
1056:     const importEditExtra = document.getElementById('importEditExtra');
1057:     const importEditMcqFields = document.getElementById('importEditMcqFields');
1058:     const importEditOpt1 = document.getElementById('importEditOpt1');
1059:     const importEditOpt2 = document.getElementById('importEditOpt2');
1060:     const importEditOpt3 = document.getElementById('importEditOpt3');
1061:     const importEditOpt4 = document.getElementById('importEditOpt4');
1062:     const importEditCorrectIdx = document.getElementById('importEditCorrectIdx');
1063:     const importEditDefGroup = document.getElementById('importEditDefGroup');
1064:     const importEditExtraGroup = document.getElementById('importEditExtraGroup');
1065:     const importSelectAll = document.getElementById('importSelectAll');
1066:     const importCardPreview = document.getElementById('importCardPreview');
1067: 
1068:     function openImportModal() {
1069:         importModal.classList.remove('hidden');
1070:         importStepFile.classList.remove('hidden');
1071:         importStepPreview.classList.add('hidden');
1072:         importRows = [];
1073:         importHeader = [];
1074:         importSelectedIdx = -1;
1075:         importFileHandle = null;
1076:         importFileName.textContent = '';
1077:         importRowCount.textContent = '';
1078:         importPreviewBody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="7" class="text-center text-gray-400 py-4">No data</td></tr>';
1079:         if (importSelectAll) importSelectAll.checked = true;
1080:         resetImportCardPreview();
1081:     }
1082: 
1083:     function resetImportCardPreview() {
1084:         if (importCardPreview) {
1085:             importCardPreview.innerHTML = `
1086:                 <div class="import-flip-front">
1087:                     <div class="text-gray-400 text-sm text-center p-4">Select a row to preview</div>
1088:                 </div>
1089:                 <div class="import-flip-back">
1090:                     <div class="text-gray-400 text-sm text-center p-4">Back side</div>
1091:                 </div>
1092:             `;
1093:         }
1094:     }
1095: 
1096:     function closeImportModal() {
1097:         importModal.classList.add('hidden');
1098:     }
1099: 
1100:     // Drop zone / file picker
1101:     importDropZone.addEventListener('click', () => importFileInput.click());
1102: 
1103:     importDropZone.addEventListener('dragover', (e) => {
1104:         e.preventDefault();
1105:         importDropZone.classList.add('dragover');
1106:     });
1107:     importDropZone.addEventListener('dragleave', () => {
1108:         importDropZone.classList.remove('dragover');
1109:     });
1110:     importDropZone.addEventListener('drop', (e) => {
1111:         e.preventDefault();
1112:         importDropZone.classList.remove('dragover');
1113:         const files = e.dataTransfer.files;
1114:         if (files.length > 0 && files[0].name.endsWith('.csv')) {
1115:             loadCsvPreview(files[0]);
1116:         } else {
1117:             alert('Please drop a .csv file');
1118:         }
1119:     });
1120: 
1121:     importFileInput.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
1122:         if (e.target.files.length > 0) {
1123:             loadCsvPreview(e.target.files[0]);
1124:         }
1125:     });
1126: 
1127:     document.getElementById('importChangeFileBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
1128:         importFileInput.click();
1129:     });
1130: 
1131:     document.getElementById('importCancelBtn')?.addEventListener('click', closeImportModal);
1132:     document.getElementById('closeImportBtn')?.addEventListener('click', closeImportModal);
1133:     importModal?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
1134:         if (e.target === importModal) closeImportModal();
1135:     });
1136: 
1137:     document.getElementById('importCsvBtn')?.addEventListener('click', openImportModal);
1138: 
1139:     // === Export Modal ===
1140:     const exportModal = document.getElementById('exportModal');
1141:     document.getElementById('exportCsvBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
1142:         exportModal.classList.remove('hidden');
1143:     });
1144:     document.getElementById('closeExportBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
1145:         exportModal.classList.add('hidden');
1146:     });
1147:     document.getElementById('closeExportBtn2')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
1148:         exportModal.classList.add('hidden');
1149:     });
1150:     exportModal?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
1151:         if (e.target === exportModal) exportModal.classList.add('hidden');
1152:     });
1153:     document.getElementById('exportSelectAll')?.addEventListener('change', function () {
1154:         document.querySelectorAll('.export-set-cb').forEach(cb => cb.checked = this.checked);
1155:     });
1156:     document.getElementById('doExportBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
1157:         const selected = [];
1158:         document.querySelectorAll('.export-set-cb:checked').forEach(cb => selected.push(cb.value));
1159:         if (selected.length === 0) { alert('Select at least one card set.'); return; }
1160:         const url = 'api/export_csv.php?set_ids=' + selected.join(',');
1161:         window.open(url, '_blank');
1162:         exportModal.classList.add('hidden');
1163:     });
1164: 
1165:     // Select all / deselect all
1166:     importSelectAll?.addEventListener('change', () => {
1167:         const checked = importSelectAll.checked;
1168:         importRows.forEach(row => { row._selected = checked; });
1169:         renderImportPreview();
1170:         if (importSelectedIdx >= 0) selectImportRow(importSelectedIdx);
1171:     });
1172: 
1173:     async function loadCsvPreview(file) {
1174:         importFileHandle = file;
1175:         importFileName.textContent = file.name;
1176: 
1177:         const formData = new FormData();
1178:         formData.append('csv', file);
1179: 
1180:         importPreviewBody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="7" class="text-center py-4"><div class="loader"></div> Parsing CSV...</td></tr>';
1181: 
1182:         try {
1183:             const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=preview_csv&t=' + Date.now(), {
1184:                 method: 'POST',
1185:                 body: formData,
1186:                 headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
1187:             });
1188:             const result = await response.json();
1189: 
1190:             if (!result.success) {
1191:                 alert('❌ ' + (result.error || 'Failed to parse CSV'));
1192:                 return;
1193:             }
1194: 
1195:             importHeader = result.header || [];
1196:             importRows = (result.rows || []).map(row => {
1197:                 const levelMap = {
1198:                     'beginner': 'Beginner', 'a1': 'Beginner', 'a2': 'Beginner',
1199:                     'intermediate': 'Intermediate', 'b1': 'Intermediate', 'b2': 'Intermediate',
1200:                     'advanced': 'Advanced', 'c1': 'Advanced', 'c2': 'Advanced',
1201:                 };
1202:                 let level = (row.level || 'Beginner').trim();
1203:                 level = levelMap[level.toLowerCase()] || level;
1204:                 let type = (row.type || 'usage_cases').trim().toLowerCase();
1205:                 const validTypes = ['usage_cases', 'deep_dive', 'formula_table', 'multiple_choice', 'gap_fill', 'image_description', 'audio_listening'];
1206:                 if (!validTypes.includes(type)) type = 'usage_cases';
1207:                 return {
1208:                     ...row,
1209:                     _setName: (row.set || '').trim(),
1210:                     _selected: true,
1211:                     type: type,
1212:                     level: level,
1213:                 };
1214:             });
1215: 
1216:             importRowCount.textContent = `(${result.total} rows)`;
1217:             renderImportPreview();
1218:             importStepFile.classList.add('hidden');
1219:             importStepPreview.classList.remove('hidden');
1220: 
1221:         } catch (err) {
1222:             alert('❌ Network error during CSV preview');
1223:         }
1224:     }
1225: 
1226:     function renderImportPreview() {
1227:         const styleLabels = {
1228:             usage_cases: '📘 Usage Cases',
1229:             deep_dive: '🧠 Deep Dive',
1230:             formula_table: '📐 Formula Table',
1231:             multiple_choice: '❓ MCQ',
1232:             gap_fill: '✏️ Gap Fill',
1233:             image_description: '🖼️ Image Description',
1234:             audio_listening: '🎧 Audio Listening',
1235:         };
1236: 
1237:         let selectedCount = 0;
1238:         let html = '';
1239:         importRows.forEach((row, idx) => {
1240:             const isSelected = idx === importSelectedIdx;
1241:             const style = row.type || 'usage_cases';
1242:             const title = row.title || 'Untitled';
1243:             const level = row.level || 'Beginner';
1244:             const setName = row._setName || '';
1245:             const preview = row.definition || row.question_text || row.sentence || '';
1246:             const previewTrim = preview.length > 60 ? preview.substring(0, 60) + '...' : preview;
1247:             const styleClass = style === 'multiple_choice' ? 'mcq' : (style === 'gap_fill' ? 'gap' : (style === 'image_description' ? 'image' : (style === 'audio_listening' ? 'audio' : 'text')));
1248:             const checked = row._selected !== false;
1249:             if (checked) selectedCount++;
1250: 
1251:             html += `<tr class="${isSelected ? 'selected' : ''} ${!checked ? 'dimmed' : ''}" data-idx="${idx}">
1252:                 <td><input type="checkbox" class="import-row-checkbox" data-idx="${idx}" ${checked ? 'checked' : ''}></td>
1253:                 <td class="text-gray-400 text-xs">${idx + 1}</td>
1254:                 <td>${escapeHtml(setName)}</td>
1255:                 <td><span class="card-type ${styleClass}">${styleLabels[style] || style}</span></td>
1256:                 <td class="import-row-title">${escapeHtml(title)}</td>
1257:                 <td><span class="text-xs bg-gray-100 px-2 py-0.5 rounded">${escapeHtml(level)}</span></td>
1258:                 <td class="text-gray-500 text-xs">${escapeHtml(previewTrim)}</td>
1259:             </tr>`;
1260:         });
1261: 
1262:         importPreviewBody.innerHTML = html;
1263:         updateImportRowCount(selectedCount);
1264: 
1265:         // Row click (excluding checkbox clicks)
1266:         importPreviewBody.querySelectorAll('tr').forEach(tr => {
1267:             tr.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
1268:                 if (e.target.type === 'checkbox') return;
1269:                 const idx = parseInt(tr.dataset.idx);
1270:                 selectImportRow(idx);
1271:             });
1272:         });
1273: 
1274:         // Checkbox toggle
1275:         importPreviewBody.querySelectorAll('.import-row-checkbox').forEach(cb => {
1276:             cb.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
1277:                 const idx = parseInt(e.target.dataset.idx);
1278:                 if (idx >= 0 && idx < importRows.length) {
1279:                     importRows[idx]._selected = e.target.checked;
1280:                 }
1281:                 renderImportPreview();
1282:                 if (importSelectedIdx >= 0) selectImportRow(importSelectedIdx);
1283:                 updateImportSelectAll();
1284:             });
1285:         });
1286: 
1287:         if (importRows.length > 0 && importSelectedIdx < 0) {
1288:             selectImportRow(0);
1289:         } else if (importSelectedIdx >= 0 && importSelectedIdx < importRows.length) {
1290:             renderImportCardPreview(importRows[importSelectedIdx]);
1291:         }
1292:     }
1293: 
1294:     function updateImportRowCount(selectedCount) {
1295:         const total = importRows.length;
1296:         importRowCount.textContent = selectedCount === total
1297:             ? `(${total} rows)`
1298:             : `(${selectedCount}/${total} selected)`;
1299:     }
1300: 
1301:     function updateImportSelectAll() {
1302:         if (!importSelectAll) return;
1303:         const allChecked = importRows.every(r => r._selected !== false);
1304:         importSelectAll.checked = allChecked;
1305:         importSelectAll.indeterminate = !allChecked && importRows.some(r => r._selected !== false);
1306:     }
1307: 
1308:     function selectImportRow(idx) {
1309:         if (idx < 0 || idx >= importRows.length) return;
1310:         importSelectedIdx = idx;
1311:         const row = importRows[idx];
1312: 
1313:         importEditTitle.value = row.title || '';
1314:         importEditStyle.value = row.type || 'usage_cases';
1315:         importEditLevel.value = row.level || 'Beginner';
1316: 
1317:         // Try to determine the best set_id from _setName
1318:         const setName = row._setName || '';
1319:         let matchedSetId = '';
1320:         if (setName) {
1321:             const options = importEditSetId.options;
1322:             for (let i = 0; i < options.length; i++) {
1323:                 if (options[i].text === setName) {
1324:                     matchedSetId = options[i].value;
1325:                     break;
1326:                 }
1327:             }
1328:         }
1329:         importEditSetId.value = matchedSetId || '';
1330: 
1331:         // Content fields
1332:         const def = row.definition || row.question_text || row.sentence || '';
1333:         let extra;
1334:         if (row.type === 'gap_fill') {
1335:             extra = row.correct_answer || row.example1 || '';
1336:         } else if (row.type === 'multiple_choice') {
1337:             extra = row.explanation || row.example1 || '';
1338:         } else {
1339:             extra = row.example1 || row.usage1 || row.tip || '';
1340:         }
1341: 
1342:         importEditDefinition.value = def;
1343:         importEditExtra.value = extra;
1344: 
1345:         // Type-specific fields
1346:         if (row.type === 'multiple_choice') {
1347:             if (importEditOpt1) importEditOpt1.value = row.opt1 || '';
1348:             if (importEditOpt2) importEditOpt2.value = row.opt2 || '';
1349:             if (importEditOpt3) importEditOpt3.value = row.opt3 || '';
1350:             if (importEditOpt4) importEditOpt4.value = row.opt4 || '';
1351:             if (importEditCorrectIdx) importEditCorrectIdx.value = row.correct_answer || '0';
1352:         }
1353:         updateImportEditorFields();
1354:         importPreviewBody.querySelectorAll('tr').forEach(tr => {
1355:             tr.classList.toggle('selected', parseInt(tr.dataset.idx) === idx);
1356:         });
1357: 
1358:         renderImportCardPreview(row);
1359:     }
1360: 
1361:     function updateRowFromEditor(idx) {
1362:         if (idx < 0 || idx >= importRows.length) return;
1363:         const row = importRows[idx];
1364:         row.title = importEditTitle.value;
1365:         row.type = importEditStyle.value;
1366:         row.level = importEditLevel.value;
1367: 
1368:         const setId = importEditSetId.value;
1369:         const setName = importEditSetId.options[importEditSetId.selectedIndex]?.text || '';
1370:         if (setId) {
1371:             row._setName = setName;
1372:             row.set_id = setId;
1373:         } else {
1374:             row._setName = '';
1375:             row.set_id = '';
1376:         }
1377: 
1378:         row.definition = importEditDefinition.value;
1379:         row.question_text = importEditDefinition.value;
1380:         row.sentence = importEditDefinition.value;
1381: 
1382:         const extra = importEditExtra.value;
1383:         if (row.type === 'gap_fill') {
1384:             row.correct_answer = extra;
1385:         } else if (row.type === 'multiple_choice') {
1386:             row.question_text = importEditDefinition.value;
1387:             row.opt1 = importEditOpt1 ? importEditOpt1.value : '';
1388:             row.opt2 = importEditOpt2 ? importEditOpt2.value : '';
1389:             row.opt3 = importEditOpt3 ? importEditOpt3.value : '';
1390:             row.opt4 = importEditOpt4 ? importEditOpt4.value : '';
1391:             row.correct_answer = importEditCorrectIdx ? importEditCorrectIdx.value : '0';
1392:         } else if (row.type === 'image_description') {
1393:             row.image_url = importEditDefinition.value;
1394:             row.description = extra;
1395:         } else if (row.type === 'audio_listening') {
1396:             row.audio_url = importEditDefinition.value;
1397:             row.transcript = extra;
1398:             row.correct_answer = extra;
1399:         } else {
1400:             row.example1 = extra;
1401:             row.tip = extra;
1402:             row.usage1 = extra;
1403:         }
1404:     }
1405: 
1406:     function renderImportCardPreview(row) {
1407:         if (!importCardPreview || !row) { resetImportCardPreview(); return; }
1408:         const style = row.type || 'usage_cases';
1409:         const title = row.title || 'Flashcard';
1410:         const definition = row.definition || row.question_text || row.sentence || '';
1411:         let extra;
1412:         if (style === 'gap_fill') {
1413:             extra = row.correct_answer || '';
1414:         } else if (style === 'multiple_choice') {
1415:             extra = row.correct_answer || row.tip || '';
1416:         } else {
1417:             extra = row.example1 || row.usage1 || row.tip || '';
1418:         }
1419:         const example = row.example1 || row.usage1 || row.tip || '';
1420: 
1421:         let frontHtml = '';
1422:         let backHtml = '';
1423: 
1424:         if (style === 'multiple_choice') {
1425:             const opts = [row.opt1, row.opt2, row.opt3, row.opt4].filter(Boolean);
1426:             const correctIdx = parseInt(row.correct_answer) || 0;
1427:             const correctText = opts[correctIdx] || extra;
1428:             frontHtml = `
1429:                 <div class="text-center">
1430:                     <div class="text-3xl mb-1">❓</div>
1431:                     <p class="text-lg font-bold">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</p>
1432:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(definition || 'Select the correct answer:'))}</p>
1433:                     <div class="mt-2 text-left text-xs space-y-1">
1434:                         ${opts.map((o, i) => `<div class="bg-gray-100 p-1.5 rounded ${i === correctIdx ? 'ring-2 ring-green-400' : ''}">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(o))}</div>`).join('')}
1435:                     </div>
1436:                 </div>
1437:             `;
1438:             backHtml = `
1439:                 <div class="text-center">
1440:                     <div class="text-base text-green-700 marker-underline mb-1">✓ Correct Answer</div>
1441:                     <div class="bg-green-50 p-2 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300">
1442:                         <p class="text-base font-bold">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(correctText))}</p>
1443:                     </div>
1444:                 </div>
1445:             `;
1446:         } else if (style === 'gap_fill') {
1447:             frontHtml = `
1448:                 <div class="text-center">
1449:                     <div class="text-3xl mb-1">✏️</div>
1450:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Complete the sentence:</p>
1451:                     <p class="text-sm bg-gray-100 p-2 rounded-lg">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(definition || 'Complete: ______'))}</p>
1452:                 </div>
1453:             `;
1454:             backHtml = `
1455:                 <div class="text-center">
1456:                     <div class="text-base text-green-700 marker-underline mb-1">✓ Correct</div>
1457:                     <div class="bg-green-50 p-2 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300">
1458:                         <p class="text-base font-bold">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(extra || 'Answer'))}</p>
1459:                     </div>
1460:                     ${example ? `<p class="text-xs text-gray-600 mt-1">📝 ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(example))}</p>` : ''}
1461:                 </div>
1462:             `;
1463:         } else if (style === 'image_description') {
1464:             const imageUrl = row.image_url || '';
1465:             const description = row.description || definition || 'Description';
1466:             frontHtml = `
1467:                 <div class="text-center">
1468:                     <div class="text-3xl mb-1">🖼️</div>
1469:                     <p class="text-sm font-bold">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</p>
1470:                     ${imageUrl ? `<img src="${escapeHtml(imageUrl)}" alt="${escapeHtml(title)}" class="mx-auto mt-2 max-h-32 rounded-lg border" onerror="this.alt='Image not found'" />` : `<div class="mx-auto mt-2 w-24 h-24 bg-gray-200 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400 text-xs">No image</div>`}
1471:                 </div>
1472:             `;
1473:             backHtml = `
1474:                 <div class="text-center">
1475:                     <div class="text-base text-blue-700 marker-underline mb-1">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</div>
1476:                     <div class="bg-blue-50 p-2 rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-300">
1477:                         <p class="text-sm">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(description))}</p>
1478:                     </div>
1479:                 </div>
1480:             `;
1481:         } else if (style === 'audio_listening') {
1482:             const transcript = row.transcript || row.correct_answer || '';
1483:             const prompt = row.question_text || definition || 'Listen and answer:';
1484:             frontHtml = `
1485:                 <div class="text-center">
1486:                     <div class="text-3xl mb-1">🎧</div>
1487:                     <p class="text-sm font-bold">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</p>
1488:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(prompt))}</p>
1489:                 </div>
1490:             `;
1491:             backHtml = `
1492:                 <div class="text-center">
1493:                     <div class="text-base text-green-700 marker-underline mb-1">✓ Transcript</div>
1494:                     <div class="bg-green-50 p-2 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300">
1495:                         <p class="text-sm">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(transcript || 'Transcript not provided'))}</p>
1496:                     </div>
1497:                 </div>
1498:             `;
1499:         } else {
1500:             frontHtml = `
1501:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center">
1502:                     <div class="text-2xl text-center font-bold">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</div>
1503:                 </div>
1504:             `;
1505:             backHtml = `
1506:                 <div class="text-center">
1507:                     <div class="text-base text-blue-700 marker-underline mb-1">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</div>
1508:                     <div class="bg-blue-50 p-2 rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-300">
1509:                         <p class="text-sm">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(definition || 'Definition'))}</p>
1510:                     </div>
1511:                     ${example ? `<p class="text-xs text-gray-600 mt-1">📝 ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(example))}</p>` : ''}
1512:                 </div>
1513:             `;
1514:         }
1515: 
1516:         importCardPreview.innerHTML = `
1517:             <div class="import-flip-front">${frontHtml}</div>
1518:             <div class="import-flip-back">${backHtml}</div>
1519:         `;
1520:     }
1521: 
1522:     document.getElementById('importApplyCardBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
1523:         if (importSelectedIdx < 0) { alert('Select a row first'); return; }
1524:         updateRowFromEditor(importSelectedIdx);
1525:         renderImportPreview();
1526:         selectImportRow(importSelectedIdx);
1527:     });
1528: 
1529:     document.getElementById('importDeleteCardBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
1530:         if (importSelectedIdx < 0) { alert('Select a row first'); return; }
1531:         if (!confirm('Remove this row from import?')) return;
1532:         importRows.splice(importSelectedIdx, 1);
1533:         importSelectedIdx = -1;
1534:         renderImportPreview();
1535:         if (importRows.length > 0) selectImportRow(0);
1536:     });
1537: 
1538:     // Create new set from mapping bar
1539:     document.getElementById('importCreateSetBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
1540:         const name = importNewSetName.value.trim();
1541:         if (!name) { alert('Enter a set name'); return; }
1542:         const descInput = document.getElementById('importNewSetDesc');
1543:         const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=create_set', {
1544:             method: 'POST',
1545:             headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' },
1546:             body: JSON.stringify({ name, description: descInput ? descInput.value.trim() : '' })
1547:         });
1548:         const result = await response.json();
1549:         if (result.success) {
1550:             // Refresh both selectors
1551:             const setsRes = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=get_sets&t=' + Date.now(), {
1552:                 headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
1553:             });
1554:             const setsData = await setsRes.json();
1555:             if (setsData.success && setsData.sets) {
1556:                 const populateSelect = (sel, val) => {
1557:                     const cur = sel.value;
1558:                     sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- Select Set --</option>';
1559:                     setsData.sets.forEach(s => {
1560:                         sel.innerHTML += `<option value="${s.id}">${escapeHtml(s.name)}</option>`;
1561:                     });
1562:                     if (cur) sel.value = cur;
1563:                 };
1564:                 populateSelect(importSetSelector);
1565:                 populateSelect(importEditSetId);
1566:                 importSetSelector.value = String(result.id);
1567:             }
1568:             importNewSetName.value = '';
1569:             if (descInput) descInput.value = '';
1570:         } else {
1571:             alert(result.error || 'Error creating set');
1572:         }
1573:     });
1574: 
1575:     // Apply set mapping to all rows
1576:     importApplySetAll.addEventListener('change', () => {
1577:         if (importApplySetAll.checked && importSetSelector.value) {
1578:             const setName = importSetSelector.options[importSetSelector.selectedIndex]?.text || '';
1579:             importRows.forEach(row => {
1580:                 row._setName = setName;
1581:                 row.set_id = importSetSelector.value;
1582:             });
1583:             renderImportPreview();
1584:         }
1585:     });
1586: 
1587:     importSetSelector.addEventListener('change', () => {
1588:         if (importApplySetAll.checked && importSetSelector.value) {
1589:             const setName = importSetSelector.options[importSetSelector.selectedIndex]?.text || '';
1590:             importRows.forEach(row => {
1591:                 row._setName = setName;
1592:                 row.set_id = importSetSelector.value;
1593:             });
1594:             renderImportPreview();
1595:         }
1596:     });
1597: 
1598:     // Live preview update on editor field changes
1599:     function refreshImportPreviewFromEditor() {
1600:         if (importSelectedIdx >= 0 && importRows[importSelectedIdx]) {
1601:             const style = importEditStyle.value;
1602:             const extra = importEditExtra.value;
1603:             let correctAnswer = extra;
1604:             let example = extra;
1605:             if (style === 'multiple_choice') {
1606:                 correctAnswer = importEditCorrectIdx ? importEditCorrectIdx.value : '0';
1607:                 example = '';
1608:             }
1609:             const base = {
1610:                 title: importEditTitle.value,
1611:                 type: style,
1612:                 level: importEditLevel.value,
1613:                 definition: importEditDefinition.value,
1614:                 question_text: importEditDefinition.value,
1615:                 sentence: importEditDefinition.value,
1616:                 example1: example,
1617:                 usage1: example,
1618:                 tip: example,
1619:                 correct_answer: correctAnswer,
1620:             };
1621:             if (style === 'image_description') {
1622:                 base.image_url = importEditDefinition.value;
1623:                 base.description = extra;
1624:             } else if (style === 'audio_listening') {
1625:                 base.audio_url = importEditDefinition.value;
1626:                 base.transcript = extra;
1627:                 base.correct_answer = extra;
1628:             }
1629:             renderImportCardPreview(base);
1630:         }
1631:     }
1632:     function updateImportEditorFields() {
1633:         const style = importEditStyle.value;
1634:         if (style === 'multiple_choice') {
1635:             importEditMcqFields.classList.remove('hidden');
1636:             importEditDefGroup.querySelector('.field-label').textContent = 'Question Text';
1637:             importEditDefinition.placeholder = 'Question text for the MCQ...';
1638:             importEditExtraGroup.querySelector('.field-label').textContent = 'Explanation';
1639:             importEditExtra.placeholder = 'Explanation shown after answering...';
1640:         } else if (style === 'gap_fill') {
1641:             importEditMcqFields.classList.add('hidden');
1642:             importEditDefGroup.querySelector('.field-label').textContent = 'Sentence';
1643:             importEditDefinition.placeholder = 'Sentence with blank (_______)';
1644:             importEditExtraGroup.querySelector('.field-label').textContent = 'Correct Answers';
1645:             importEditExtra.placeholder = 'Comma-separated correct answers...';
1646:         } else if (style === 'image_description') {
1647:             importEditMcqFields.classList.add('hidden');
1648:             importEditDefGroup.querySelector('.field-label').textContent = 'Image URL';
1649:             importEditDefinition.placeholder = 'https://example.com/image.jpg';
1650:             importEditExtraGroup.querySelector('.field-label').textContent = 'Description';
1651:             importEditExtra.placeholder = 'Description shown on back...';
1652:         } else if (style === 'audio_listening') {
1653:             importEditMcqFields.classList.add('hidden');
1654:             importEditDefGroup.querySelector('.field-label').textContent = 'Audio URL';
1655:             importEditDefinition.placeholder = 'https://example.com/audio.mp3';
1656:             importEditExtraGroup.querySelector('.field-label').textContent = 'Transcript / Answer';
1657:             importEditExtra.placeholder = 'Transcript or comma-separated answers...';
1658:         } else {
1659:             importEditMcqFields.classList.add('hidden');
1660:             importEditDefGroup.querySelector('.field-label').textContent = 'Definition';
1661:             importEditDefinition.placeholder = 'Definition, notes...';
1662:             importEditExtraGroup.querySelector('.field-label').textContent = 'Example / Tip';
1663:             importEditExtra.placeholder = 'Example, usage1, or tip...';
1664:         }
1665:     }
1666: 
1667:     importEditStyle.addEventListener('change', () => {
1668:         updateImportEditorFields();
1669:         refreshImportPreviewFromEditor();
1670:     });
1671:     importEditTitle.addEventListener('input', refreshImportPreviewFromEditor);
1672:     importEditLevel.addEventListener('change', refreshImportPreviewFromEditor);
1673:     importEditDefinition.addEventListener('input', refreshImportPreviewFromEditor);
1674:     importEditExtra.addEventListener('input', refreshImportPreviewFromEditor);
1675:     [importEditOpt1, importEditOpt2, importEditOpt3, importEditOpt4, importEditCorrectIdx].forEach(el => {
1676:         if (el) el.addEventListener('input', refreshImportPreviewFromEditor);
1677:     });
1678: 
1679:     // Execute import
1680:     document.getElementById('importExecuteBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
1681:         const selectedRows = importRows.filter(r => r._selected !== false);
1682:         if (selectedRows.length === 0) { alert('No rows selected for import'); return; }
1683:         if (!confirm(`Import ${selectedRows.length} card${selectedRows.length > 1 ? 's' : ''}?`)) return;
1684: 
1685:         // Build CSV from selected rows
1686:         const csvCols = ['id', 'set', 'set_id', 'type', 'title', 'level', 'definition', 'question_text', 'sentence', 'example1', 'example2', 'usage1', 'tip', 'correct_answer', 'explanation', 'opt1', 'opt2', 'opt3', 'opt4', 'image_url', 'description', 'audio_url', 'prompt', 'transcript'];
1687:         const csvRows = [csvCols.join(',')];
1688: 
1689:         selectedRows.forEach(row => {
1690:             const vals = csvCols.map(col => {
1691:                 let val = '';
1692:                 if (col === 'id') {
1693:                     val = row.id || '';
1694:                 } else if (col === 'set') {
1695:                     val = row._setName || '';
1696:                 } else if (col === 'set_id') {
1697:                     val = row.set_id || '';
1698:                 } else if (col === 'type') {
1699:                     val = row.type || 'usage_cases';
1700:                 } else if (col === 'level') {
1701:                     val = row.level || 'Beginner';
1702:                 } else if (col === 'title') {
1703:                     val = row.title || '';
1704:                 } else if (col === 'definition' || col === 'question_text' || col === 'sentence') {
1705:                     val = row.definition || row.question_text || row.sentence || '';
1706:                 } else if (col === 'usage1' || col === 'tip') {
1707:                     val = row.usage1 || row.tip || '';
1708:                 } else if (col === 'example1' || col === 'example2') {
1709:                     val = row.example1 || row.example2 || '';
1710:                 } else if (col === 'image_url') {
1711:                     val = row.image_url || '';
1712:                 } else if (col === 'description') {
1713:                     val = row.description || '';
1714:                 } else if (col === 'audio_url') {
1715:                     val = row.audio_url || '';
1716:                 } else if (col === 'prompt') {
1717:                     val = row.prompt || '';
1718:                 } else if (col === 'transcript') {
1719:                     val = row.transcript || '';
1720:                 } else if (col === 'correct_answer') {
1721:                     val = row.correct_answer || '';
1722:                 } else if (col === 'opt1' || col === 'opt2' || col === 'opt3' || col === 'opt4') {
1723:                     val = row[col] || '';
1724:                 } else {
1725:                     val = row[col] || '';
1726:                 }
1727:                 // Escape CSV value
1728:                 if (val.includes(',') || val.includes('"') || val.includes('\n')) {
1729:                     val = '"' + val.replace(/"/g, '""') + '"';
1730:                 }
1731:                 return val;
1732:             });
1733:             csvRows.push(vals.join(','));
1734:         });
1735: 
1736:         const csvContent = csvRows.join('\n');
1737:         const blob = new Blob([csvContent], { type: 'text/csv' });
1738:         const formData = new FormData();
1739:         formData.append('csv', blob, (importFileHandle ? importFileHandle.name : 'import.csv'));
1740: 
1741:         try {
1742:             const response = await fetch('api/import_csv.php', { method: 'POST', body: formData });
1743:             const result = await response.json();
1744:             if (result.success) {
1745:                 let msg = `✅ Imported ${result.imported} cards.`;
1746:                 if (result.skipped > 0) msg += `\n⏭️ ${result.skipped} duplicate(s) skipped.`;
1747:                 if (result.errors.length) msg += `\n⚠️ ${result.errors.length} errors:\n` + result.errors.slice(0, 10).join('\n');
1748:                 if (result.errors.length > 10) msg += `\n...and ${result.errors.length - 10} more`;
1749:                 alert(msg);
1750:                 closeImportModal();
1751:                 await refreshSets();
1752:                 if (setSelector.value) loadCards(setSelector.value);
1753:             } else {
1754:                 alert('❌ Import failed: ' + (result.error || 'Unknown error'));
1755:             }
1756:         } catch (err) {
1757:             alert('❌ Network error during import');
1758:         }
1759:     });
1760: 
1761:     // === Test Card Popup ===
1762:     const testCardModal = document.getElementById('testCardModal');
1763:     const closeTestCardBtn = document.getElementById('closeTestCardBtn');
1764:     const testCardFront = document.getElementById('testCardFront');
1765:     const testCardBack = document.getElementById('testCardBack');
1766:     const testFlipBtn = document.getElementById('testFlipBtn');
1767:     const testMissBtn = document.getElementById('testMissBtn');
1768:     const testHitBtn = document.getElementById('testHitBtn');
1769:     const testCardFeedback = document.getElementById('testCardFeedback');
1770:     const testCardFeedbackMsg = document.getElementById('testCardFeedbackMsg');
1771:     const testCardFeedbackDetail = document.getElementById('testCardFeedbackDetail');
1772:     let testQuizState = {};
1773:     let testFlipped = false;
1774:     let testAnswered = false;
1775: 
1776:     function renderTestCardFront(card) {
1777:         const pattern = card.pattern_type;
1778:         const data = card.content_data || {};
1779:         const title = card.title || 'Flashcard';
1780: 
1781:         if (pattern === 'multiple_choice') {
1782:             const options = data.options || ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C'];
1783:             const gridClass = options.length > 3 ? 'grid gap-2' : 'space-y-2';
1784:             return `
1785:                 <div class="text-center w-full">
1786:                     <p class="text-base mb-2 font-bold">❓ ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(card.question_text || 'Select the correct answer:'))}</p>
1787:                     <div class="${gridClass}" id="testMcqOptions">
1788:                         ${options.map((opt, idx) => `<div class="quiz-option text-sm" data-idx="${idx}">${String.fromCharCode(65+idx)}. ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(opt))}</div>`).join('')}
1789:                     </div>
1790:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">👆 Tap your answer, then flip</p>
1791:                 </div>
1792:             `;
1793:         } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill') {
1794:             const sentence = data.sentence || 'Complete the sentence: ______';
1795:             return `
1796:                 <div class="text-center w-full">
1797:                     <p class="text-base mb-1 font-bold">✏️ Complete the sentence:</p>
1798:                     <p class="text-sm bg-gray-100 p-3 rounded-xl mb-1">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(sentence))}</p>
1799:                     <input type="text" id="testGapFillInput" placeholder="Type your answer..." class="w-full p-2 text-sm border-2 rounded-xl" autocomplete="off">
1800:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">👆 Type answer, then flip</p>
1801:                 </div>
1802:             `;
1803:         } else if (pattern === 'image_description') {
1804:             const imageUrl = data.image_url || '';
1805:             const hasImage = imageUrl && (imageUrl.startsWith('http://') || imageUrl.startsWith('https://'));
1806:             return `
1807:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[200px]">
1808:                     <h1 class="text-lg text-center font-bold marker-underline mb-2">🖼️ ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h1>
1809:                     ${hasImage ? `<img src="${escapeHtml(imageUrl)}" alt="${escapeHtml(title)}" class="max-h-32 rounded-lg shadow mb-1 object-contain" onerror="this.style.display='none'">` : `<div class="text-4xl mb-1">🖼️</div>`}
1810:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">👆 Tap card to flip</p>
1811:                 </div>
1812:             `;
1813:         } else if (pattern === 'audio_listening') {
1814:             const audioUrl = data.audio_url || '';
1815:             const hasAudio = audioUrl && (audioUrl.startsWith('http://') || audioUrl.startsWith('https://') || audioUrl.startsWith('uploads/'));
1816:             const prompt = data.prompt || '';
1817:             const isInteractive = !!(prompt || (data.correct_answers && data.correct_answers.length));
1818:             return `
1819:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[200px] w-full">
1820:                     <h1 class="text-lg text-center font-bold marker-underline mb-2">🎧 ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h1>
1821:                     ${hasAudio ? `<audio controls class="w-full max-w-xs mb-1" src="${escapeHtml(audioUrl)}">Your browser does not support audio.</audio>` : `<div class="text-4xl mb-1">🎧</div>`}
1822:                     ${prompt ? `<p class="text-xs bg-gray-100 p-2 rounded-xl mb-1">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(prompt))}</p>` : ''}
1823:                     ${isInteractive ? `<input type="text" id="testGapFillInput" placeholder="${data.transcript && !data.correct_answers ? 'Type what you hear...' : 'Type your answer...'}" class="w-full p-2 text-sm border-2 rounded-xl" autocomplete="off">` : ''}
1824:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">👆 Tap card to flip${isInteractive ? ' after answering' : ''}</p>
1825:                 </div>
1826:             `;
1827:         } else {
1828:             return `
1829:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[200px]">
1830:                     <h1 class="text-xl text-center font-bold marker-underline">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h1>
1831:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-3">👆 Tap card to flip</p>
1832:                 </div>
1833:             `;
1834:         }
1835:     }
1836: 
1837:     function renderTestCardBack(card) {
1838:         const data = card.content_data || {};
1839:         const pattern = card.pattern_type;
1840:         const title = card.title || 'Flashcard';
1841: 
1842:         if (pattern === 'multiple_choice') {
1843:             const options = data.options || ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C'];
1844:             const correctIdx = data.correct_index !== undefined ? data.correct_index : 1;
1845:             const correctAnswer = options[correctIdx];
1846:             const selectedIdx = testQuizState.selectedIdx;
1847:             const isCorrect = (selectedIdx === correctIdx);
1848:             const explanation = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.explanation || ''));
1849:             return `
1850:                 <div class="text-center w-full">
1851:                     <h3 class="text-base text-green-700 marker-underline mb-2">✓ Answer</h3>
1852:                     <div class="bg-green-50 p-2 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300 mb-2">
1853:                         <p class="text-sm font-bold">${String.fromCharCode(65+correctIdx)}. ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(correctAnswer))}</p>
1854:                     </div>
1855:                     ${selectedIdx !== undefined && selectedIdx !== null ? `
1856:                     <div class="p-2 rounded-lg mb-2 ${isCorrect ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'}">
1857:                         <p class="text-sm">${isCorrect ? '✅ Correct!' : '❌ Incorrect'}</p>
1858:                     </div>
1859:                     ` : '<p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-2">You did not select an answer.</p>'}
1860:                     ${explanation ? `<div class="text-xs text-gray-600 mt-1 p-2 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">📝 ${explanation}</div>` : ''}
1861:                 </div>
1862:             `;
1863:         } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill') {
1864:             const correctAnswers = data.correct_answers || ['answer'];
1865:             const userAnswer = testQuizState.userAnswer || '';
1866:             const isMatch = correctAnswers.some(ans => ans.toLowerCase() === userAnswer.toLowerCase());
1867:             const example = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.example || ''));
1868:             return `
1869:                 <div class="text-center w-full">
1870:                     <h3 class="text-base text-green-700 marker-underline mb-2">✓ Correct Answer</h3>
1871:                     <div class="bg-green-50 p-2 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300 mb-2">
1872:                         <p class="text-sm font-bold">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(correctAnswers.join(' / ')))}</p>
1873:                     </div>
1874:                     ${userAnswer ? `
1875:                     <div class="p-2 rounded-lg mb-2 ${isMatch ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'}">
1876:                         <p class="text-sm">${isMatch ? '✅ Correct!' : '❌ Incorrect'}</p>
1877:                     </div>
1878:                     ` : '<p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-2">You did not type an answer.</p>'}
1879:                     ${example ? `<div class="text-xs text-gray-600 mt-1 p-2 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">📝 Example: ${example}</div>` : ''}
1880:                 </div>
1881:             `;
1882:         } else if (pattern === 'image_description') {
1883:             const description = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.description || 'No description'));
1884:             return `
1885:                 <div class="text-center w-full">
1886:                     <h3 class="text-base text-blue-700 marker-underline mb-2">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h3>
1887:                     <div class="bg-blue-50 p-2 rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-300">
1888:                         <p class="text-sm">${description}</p>
1889:                     </div>
1890:                 </div>
1891:             `;
1892:         } else if (pattern === 'audio_listening') {
1893:             const transcript = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.transcript || data.notes || ''));
1894:             const correctAnswers = data.correct_answers || [];
1895:             const userAnswer = testQuizState.userAnswer || '';
1896:             let isMatch = false;
1897:             if (userAnswer && correctAnswers.length) {
1898:                 isMatch = correctAnswers.some(ans => ans.toLowerCase() === userAnswer.toLowerCase());
1899:             } else if (userAnswer && data.transcript) {
1900:                 isMatch = data.transcript.toLowerCase().trim() === userAnswer.toLowerCase().trim();
1901:             }
1902:             return `
1903:                 <div class="text-center w-full">
1904:                     <h3 class="text-base text-green-700 marker-underline mb-2">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h3>
1905:                     ${transcript ? `<div class="bg-green-50 p-2 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300 mb-2"><p class="text-sm">${transcript}</p></div>` : ''}
1906:                     ${userAnswer ? `
1907:                     <div class="p-2 rounded-lg mb-2 ${isMatch ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'}">
1908:                         <p class="text-sm">${isMatch ? '✅ Correct!' : '❌ Incorrect'}</p>
1909:                     </div>
1910:                     ` : '<p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-2">Passive listening — tap Hit if you understood.</p>'}
1911:                 </div>
1912:             `;
1913:         } else {
1914:             const definition = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.definition || data.usage1 || 'No definition available'));
1915:             const example = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.example1a || data.example || ''));
1916:             return `
1917:                 <div class="text-center w-full">
1918:                     <h3 class="text-base text-blue-700 marker-underline mb-2">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h3>
1919:                     <div class="bg-blue-50 p-2 rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-300">
1920:                         <p class="text-sm">${definition}</p>
1921:                     </div>
1922:                     ${example ? `<div class="mt-1 p-2 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg"><p class="text-xs"><strong>Example:</strong> ${example}</p></div>` : ''}
1923:                 </div>
1924:             `;
1925:         }
1926:     }
1927: 
1928:     function openTestCardModal() {
1929:         const title = editTitle.value.trim() || 'Flashcard';
1930:         const patternType = editPatternType.value;
1931:         const contentData = getCurrentContentData();
1932:         const card = {
1933:             title,
1934:             pattern_type: patternType,
1935:             question_text: patternType === 'multiple_choice' ? contentData.question_text : '',
1936:             content_data: contentData
1937:         };
1938:         testQuizState = {};
1939:         testFlipped = false;
1940:         testAnswered = false;
1941: 
1942:         testCardFront.innerHTML = renderTestCardFront(card);
1943:         testCardBack.classList.add('hidden');
1944:         testCardBack.innerHTML = renderTestCardBack(card);
1945:         testFlipBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
1946:         testMissBtn.classList.add('hidden');
1947:         testHitBtn.classList.add('hidden');
1948:         testCardFeedback.classList.add('hidden');
1949:         testCardFeedback.classList.remove('hit', 'miss');
1950:         testCardModal.classList.remove('hidden');
1951: 
1952:         // Bind MCQ options
1953:         if (patternType === 'multiple_choice') {
1954:             setTimeout(() => {
1955:                 document.querySelectorAll('#testMcqOptions .quiz-option').forEach(el => {
1956:                     el.addEventListener('click', function () {
1957:                         document.querySelectorAll('#testMcqOptions .quiz-option').forEach(o => o.classList.remove('selected'));
1958:                         this.classList.add('selected');
1959:                         testQuizState.selectedIdx = parseInt(this.getAttribute('data-idx'));
1960:                         testAnswered = true;
1961:                     });
1962:                 });
1963:             }, 50);
1964:         }
1965:     }
1966: 
1967:     function closeTestCardModal() {
1968:         testCardModal.classList.add('hidden');
1969:         testQuizState = {};
1970:         testFlipped = false;
1971:         testAnswered = false;
1972:     }
1973: 
1974:     testFlipBtn?.addEventListener('click', () => {
1975:         if (testFlipped) return;

This should work because `$setIds` is indexed from 0. Actually `array_filter` preserves keys. So the keys could be non-sequential like [0 => 1, 2 => 3]. But PDO's execute with positional placeholders expects sequential 0-indexed keys. So `array_filter` could cause a problem here if a filter removes an element in the middle - but since `array_filter` removes falsy values (like 0), and we're filtering `fn($id) => $id > 0`, it only removes 0. PDO's `execute()` with positional placeholders expects `[0 => ..., 1 => ..., 2 => ...]`. This is a bug.

### BUG 15: In `Record_review.php` `record()` - initial total_reviews value
At line 113, new progress records get `total_reviews = 1`. But at line 111-116, for updates, `total_reviews` is incremented by 1: `total_reviews = total_reviews + 1`. So a new record starts at 1, which matches the increment. This is logically consistent.

### BUG 16: In `helpers.php`, `formatBreaks` handles `\br` and `\br `.
The function replaces `\\br` and `\\br ` with `<br>`. But this appears to be incorrect because the backslashes are literal in PHP strings. In PHP, `'\\br'` is the literal string `\br`. So `str_replace(['\\br', '\\br '], '<br>', ...)` replaces `\br` and `\br ` with `<br>`. The `formatBreaks` in JS does `s.replace(/\\br ?/g, '<br>')` which matches `\br` optionally followed by a space.

Actually, wait. In PHP:
- `'\\br'` means the string `\br` (one backslash + br)
- `'\\br '` means `\br ` (one backslash + br + space)
So the PHP formatBreaks replaces `\br` and `\br ` with `<br>`. This seems correct.

But in the JavaScript version:
```js
s = s.replace(/\\\\/g, '\\');  // This replaces \\ (two backslashes) with one backslash
s = s.replace(/\\br ?/g, '<br>');  // This replaces \br optionally followed by space with <br>
```

The `//` in regex doesn't create special escape sequences in the same way as in PHP strings. In JS regex `/\\\\/g` matches two literal backslashes and replaces with one. This means `\\br` (escaped backslash) gets unescaped to `\br`, and then `\br` gets matched by the second regex. This is actually intentional!

### BUG 17: In `app.js` line 45, `s.replace(/\\\\/g, '\\')`
This replaces `\\` (two backslashes) with `\` (one backslash). But wait, in JS regex:
- `/\\\\/g` = the pattern is two literal backslashes (each needs to be escaped in regex literal)
- The replacement `'\\'` = one literal backslash

So if the user types `\\br` (escaped backslash), this becomes `\br`, which then gets rendered as `<br>`. This is intentional.

### BUG 18: In `get_cards.php`, the `$dueOnly` checkbox uses `isset($input['due_only'])` which would return true even when due_only is `false`/`0`.
Line 28: `$dueOnly = !empty($input['due_only']) && $input['due_only'] !== 'false';`
The `!empty()` check handles false values, so this should be fine.

Aqui está minha análise do sistema. Aqui estão os bugs que encontrei:

---

### 🔴 Crítico

**1. Variáveis indefinidas em `api/record_review.php:42-43`**
`$progressPercent` e `$newLevel` são usadas na resposta JSON, mas nunca são definidas. Isso gera warnings e valores `null` no frontend.
- A resposta deveria usar `$stats['progress']` e `User::calculateLevel($stats['progress'])` (ou similar).

**2. Chaves de array não sequenciais em `api/export_csv.php:31`**
`array_filter()` preserva chaves. Se um `set_id=0` for filtrado, o array resultante terá chaves não sequenciais (ex: `[0 => 1, 2 => 3]`). `PDOStatement::execute()` com placeholders posicionais (`?`) espera chaves `0, 1, 2...`, então a query falhará silenciosamente ou com erro.

**3. Salt de `PASSWORD_BCRYPT` sem custo em `src/Student.php:16` e `src/User.php:55`**
`password_hash($name, PASSWORD_BCRYPT)` usa o custo padrão (`10`). Para senhas de alunos geradas a partir do nome, isso é aceitável, mas seria melhor especificar explicitamente um custo.

### 🟡 Médio

**4. Variável não utilizada em `assets/js/app.js:175`**
```js
const filtered = phpCardSets.filter(s => s.id);
```
`filtered` é criada mas nunca usada — lixo de memória e confusão.

**5. Referência nula potencial em `assets/js/admin.js:1636-1664`**
`updateImportEditorFields()` usa `importEditDefGroup.querySelector(...)`, mas se o elemento não estiver no DOM, lançará um erro. Deve ter uma verificação de nulidade.

**6. Inconsistência de tipos em `src/Student.php:8`**
O método retorna `['name' => ...]` (linha 21), mas a query seleciona `username AS name` (linha 8). O `$existing` retorna `name`, e o fallback também usa `name`. O frontend em `app.js:371` espera tanto `username` quanto `name` (`currentStudent?.username || currentStudent?.name`), o que funciona, mas é frágil.

**7. `static::` vs `self::` em `src/Card.php:107`**
`ensurePatternTypeEnum` é `private`, então `static::` deveria ser `self::`. Funciona porque não há sobrescrita, mas semanticamente incorreto e pode quebrar se a classe for estendida.

### 🟢 Leve

**8. Variáveis `$isMissing` / `$isExtra` definidas mas não usadas em `fix_db.php:140-141`** — lixo.

**9. Nenhuma validação se o aluno selecionou opção no MCQ antes de virar em `assets/js/app.js:936-938`** — conta como incorreto mesmo sem seleção, o que pode confundir.

**10. Senha em texto puro via GET em `fix_db.php:77-78,170-171,186-188`** — senha enviada como query string (`?admin_user=X&admin_pass=Y`), visível em logs e histórico. Apenas para ferramentas de migração, mas ainda é inseguro.

---

**Resumo:** O bug #1 (variáveis indefinidas em record_review.php) é o mais grave — quebra a resposta da API de revisão, e o frontend receberia `null` para `progress` e `english_level`, potencialmente quebrando a atualização do progresso do aluno. O bug #2 (export_csv.php) quebra a exportação quando um conjunto de cartões com id=0 é passado.

### 🤖 Assistant
*2026-06-07 22:43:09*

*[step-start part]*

Here's a summary of all 7 bugs fixed:

### 🔴 Críticos
| Bug | File | Fix |
|-----|------|-----|
| Undefined `$progressPercent` / `$newLevel` | `api/record_review.php:42-43` | Now correctly uses `$stats['progress']` and `User::calculateLevel()` |
| `array_filter` preserves non-sequential keys → PDO execute fails | `api/export_csv.php:22` | Wrapped with `array_values()` |

### 🟡 Médios
| Bug | File | Fix |
|-----|------|-----|
| `static::` instead of `self::` on private method | `src/Card.php:107` | Changed to `self::` |
| Null reference on `importEditDefGroup.querySelector` | `assets/js/admin.js:1632` | Added guard clause + null-safe calls |
| Unused `const filtered` variable | `assets/js/app.js:175` | Removed |

### 🟢 Leves
| Bug | File | Fix |
|-----|------|-----|
| Unused `$isMissing` / `$isExtra` | `fix_db.php:140-141` | Removed |

### 🔄 Cache Busting
Added to **every** page and API endpoint:
- `Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0`
- `Pragma: no-cache`
- `<meta http-equiv>` tags in HTML pages

This eliminates the need for Ctrl+F5 — the browser will always fetch the latest code from the server. The existing `assetVersion()` helper (which appends `?v=filemtime` to CSS/JS URLs) already handles fine-grained file cache busting.

*[step-finish part]*

  "newString": "    function evaluateTestCard() {\n        const card = _testCardData;\n        const pattern = card ? card.pattern_type : editPatternType.value;\n        const data = card ? card.content_data : getCurrentContentData();\n        let isCorrect = false;\n\n        if (pattern === 'multiple_choice') {\n            const correctIdx = data.correct_index !== undefined ? data.correct_index : 1;\n            isCorrect = (testQuizState.selectedIdx === correctIdx);\n        } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill') {\n            const correctAnswers = data.correct_answers || ['answer'];\n            isCorrect = correctAnswers.some(ans => ans.toLowerCase() === (testQuizState.userAnswer || '').toLowerCase());\n        } else if (pattern === 'audio_listening') {\n            const correctAnswers = data.correct_answers || [];\n            const userAnswer = testQuizState.userAnswer || '';\n            if (correctAnswers.length) {\n                isCorrect = correctAnswers.some(ans => ans.toLowerCase() === userAnswer.toLowerCase());\n            } else if (data.transcript) {\n                isCorrect = data.transcript.toLowerCase().trim() === userAnswer.toLowerCase().trim();\n            } else {\n                isCorrect = true;\n            }\n        } else {\n            isCorrect = true;\n        }"
}

### 🤖 Assistant
*2026-06-07 22:43:09*

*[step-start part]*

All fixes are in place. Here's a summary of the changes for the import test card:

**Changes made:**

1. **`admin_cards.php`** — Added a "🎯 Test" button in the import preview panel header (replacing the static `h3` with a flex row containing title + button)

2. **`assets/js/admin.js`** — Three modifications:
   - Added `_testCardData` variable to store the card being tested from import
   - Modified `openTestCardModal(card)` to accept an optional `card` parameter — when provided, it renders that card; otherwise falls back to reading editor fields (backward compatible)
   - Modified `testFlipBtn` and `evaluateTestCard` to use `_testCardData` when available
   - Added `openImportTestCardModal()` — builds a card object from the selected import row by mapping CSV columns to content_data fields for each pattern type, then calls `openTestCardModal(card)`
   - Added `closeTestCardModal` resets `_testCardData`
   - Wired `#importTestCardBtn` to `openImportTestCardModal`

The import test works exactly like the editor test: same modal, same flip/Hit/Miss buttons, same MCQ/gap/audio interaction.

The implementation looks correct. Here's what was added:

- `_filteredCardIds` — tracks the current visible card order (respecting filter/search)
- `tabindex="0"` on `#cardListContainer` — makes the list focusable
- `keydown` listener on the container — handles ArrowUp/ArrowDown

💭 **Reasoning:**

<details>
<summary>Click to expand reasoning</summary>

The user is saying that when using arrow keys to navigate the card list on the left, the card list scrolls (items change) but the keyboard focus stays fixed on the card list container (the outline/visual focus doesn't follow the selected card). They want the focus indicator to follow the selected card as they navigate.

Actually, re-reading: "the names in the left are rolling but the focus keeps fixed" - this likely means the selected card highlight (the visual "selected" class) is working correctly, but the keyboard focus ring stays on the container rather than moving to the selected card item. Or it could mean the card list items change but the visual focus doesn't follow.

Let me re-read the code I added. The keydown handler does:
1. `e.preventDefault()` - prevents default arrow key behavior
2. Finds the new card by navigating `_filteredCardIds`
3. Sets `selectedCardId = newId`
4. Calls `loadCardIntoEditor(card)` 
5. Toggles the `'selected'` class on `.card-item` elements
6. Scrolls the item into view

So the visual selection (blue highlight) should follow. But the keyboard focus ring (the browser's default `:focus` outline) stays on the `cardListContainer` because that's where the keydown listener is attached.

The issue is likely that even though the visual selection moves, the browser's focus outline stays on the outer container rather than following to the active card item.

I should programmatically focus the selected `.card-item` element by calling `.focus()` on it. But `.card-item` divs aren't focusable by default. I need to either:
1. Add `tabindex="-1"` to each `.card-item` so they can receive programmatic focus
2. Call `.focus()` on the selected card item after navigation

Actually, I think I should just add `tabindex="-1"` to card items so they can be focused programmatically. The `cardListContainer` has `tabindex="0"` to catch the initial focus, but after arrow navigation, focus should move to the specific card item.

Wait, but if I focus the card item, then subsequent arrow key presses won't work because the event listener is on the container. I need to think about this differently.

Options:
1. Keep focus on the container, but style the `.card-item.selected` to have a clear visible focus indicator using CSS `:focus-within` or similar
2. Move focus to the card item and use event delegation on the container
3. Add focus to the card item, but keep the keyboard listener on the container

Option 3 seems right: add `tabindex="-1"` to card items, focus the selected item after navigation, but keep the keydown listener on the container (since the container wraps all items, and events bubble up from the items).

Actually, `keydown` events don't bubble from child elements to the parent automatically in the same way. If I focus a child `.card-item`, the keydown listener on `cardListContainer` will still fire if the event originates from within the container (keyboard events bubble from the focused element up through ancestors). So if I focus a `.card-item` that's a child of `cardListContainer`, the keydown listener on `cardListContainer` should still fire.

Let me implement:
1. Add `tabindex="-1"` to each `.card-item` so they can receive programmatic focus
2. In the arrow key handler, focus the newly selected `.card-item` element
3. This way, the browser's focus outline follows the card item visually

Let me do this.

</details>

### 🤖 Assistant
*2026-06-07 22:43:09*

*[step-start part]*

Fixed. Two changes:

1. **`tabindex="-1"`** added to each `.card-item` — makes them programmatically focusable so the browser focus ring can land on them
2. **`el.focus({ preventScroll: true })`** called after arrow navigation — moves the actual keyboard focus to the selected card item, so the browser's focus ring follows the selection visually as you arrow up/down

Now when you arrow through the list, the focus outline (and `.selected` highlight) follows the active card in lockstep.

*[step-finish part]*

  "newString": "        cardListContainer.innerHTML = html;\n\n        document.querySelectorAll('.card-item').forEach(el => {\n            el.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n                if (e.target.classList.contains('card-delete-btn')) return;\n                const id = parseInt(el.dataset.id);\n                const card = currentCards.find(c => c.id === id);\n                if (card) loadCardIntoEditor(card);\n                document.querySelectorAll('.card-item').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('selected'));\n                el.classList.add('selected');\n                selectedCardId = id;\n                el.focus({ preventScroll: true });\n            });\n        });\n\n        document.querySelectorAll('.card-item').forEach(el => {\n            el.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {\n                if (e.key !== 'ArrowUp' && e.key !== 'ArrowDown') return;\n                e.preventDefault();\n                const items = [...document.querySelectorAll('.card-item')];\n                const curIdx = items.indexOf(el);\n                if (curIdx === -1) return;\n                const nextIdx = e.key === 'ArrowDown'\n                    ? (curIdx + 1) % items.length\n                    : (curIdx - 1 + items.length) % items.length;\n                items[nextIdx]?.click();\n                items[nextIdx]?.focus({ preventScroll: true });\n            });\n        });"

<details>

</details>

## Goal
- Review, fix bugs, and improve cache-busting in a PHP/JS flashcard spaced-repetition application.

## Constraints & Preferences
- Cache headers must force browser to load fresh code on every request (no Ctrl+F5 needed)
- Arrow keys in admin card list navigate through filtered cards while keeping editor panel synced
- Import module test popup must work identically to the existing editor test popup
- Keep conversation in English

## Progress
### Done
- Fixed undefined `$progressPercent`/`$newLevel` variables in `api/record_review.php` – now uses `$stats['progress']` and `User::calculateLevel()`
- Fixed `array_filter` key-preservation bug in `api/export_csv.php` – wrapped with `array_values()`
- Changed `static::ensurePatternTypeEnum` to `self::` in `src/Card.php:107`
- Removed unused `$isMissing`/`$isExtra` variables in `fix_db.php:140-141`
- Removed unused `const filtered` variable in `assets/js/app.js:175`
- Added null-guard for `importEditDefGroup`/`importEditExtraGroup` in `updateImportEditorFields()` in `assets/js/admin.js`
- Added `no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate` Cache-Control and Pragma headers to all PHP entry-points (`index.php`, `admin_cards.php`, all `api/*.php` files)
- Added `<meta http-equiv>` cache-busting tags to HTML `<head>` in `index.php`, `admin_cards.php`, `src/templates/admin_setup.php`, and `src/templates/admin_login.php`
- Added “🎯 Test” button in the import preview panel (`admin_cards.php`)
- Added `_testCardData` variable and refactored `openTestCardModal(card)` to accept an optional card object in `assets/js/admin.js`
- Added `openImportTestCardModal()` function in `assets/js/admin.js` – builds card from import row and calls `openTestCardModal(card)`
- Modified `testFlipBtn` handler and `evaluateTestCard()` to use `_testCardData` when available
- Wired `#importTestCardBtn` click to `openImportTestCardModal`
- Added `_filteredCardIds` array, `tabindex="0"` on card list container, and `keydown` listener for ArrowUp/ArrowDown navigation in `assets/js/admin.js`
- Card list arrow keys wrap around (down from last goes to first, up from first goes to last) and scroll selected card into view

### In Progress
- (none)

### Blocked
- (none)

## Key Decisions
- Cache busting applied at both HTTP header level and HTML meta tag level for maximum browser compliance
- `openTestCardModal()` was refactored to accept an optional card argument instead of creating a separate modal – avoids code duplication between editor and import
- Arrow key navigation wraps around the filtered list and updates editor + scrolls list – keeps UX consistent with click-based selection

## Next Steps
- (none – all reported bugs fixed and requested features implemented)

## Critical Context
- The system uses `assetVersion()` helper that appends `?v=filemtime` to CSS/JS URLs – already in place, combined with new no-cache headers ensures fresh code
- `_testCardData` is reset to `null` when the test modal is closed
- Arrow navigation uses `_filteredCardIds` which is rebuilt on every `renderCardList()` call – respects current filters and search

## Relevant Files
- `api/record_review.php`: critical undefined-variable bug fixed
- `api/export_csv.php`: array_filter key-preservation bug fixed
- `assets/js/admin.js`: import test popup, arrow-key navigation, null-safety, `_testCardData` added
- `assets/js/app.js`: unused `filtered` variable removed
- `admin_cards.php`: import test button HTML added
- `src/Card.php`: `static::` → `self::` fixed
- `config.php`: contains hardcoded DB credentials (password `4p0LL0cr33d`) – pre-existing, not changed
- `index.php`, `admin_cards.php`, all `api/*.php`: cache-busting headers added
- `src/helpers.php`: `assetVersion()` function for `?v=filemtime` cache busting

But wait - there's a potential conflict. The `.click()` handler calls `cardListContainer.focus({ preventScroll: true })`. 1. Focus stays on the container (no scroll from this)

2. The `.focus()` call gives it focus
3. `preventScroll: true` prevents the browser from scrolling the container into view

Good. Here's a summary of all the changes:

**Problem:** Arrow keys scrolled the list containers instead of navigating through items.

**Root cause:** Both `cardListContainer` (edit view) and `import-records-container` (import view) are scrollable (`overflow-y: auto`). Arrow key events on these containers triggered the default scroll behavior instead of item navigation.

**Fix (3 files):**

1. **`admin_cards.php`** — Added `tabindex="-1"` to both containers so they're programmatically focusable:
   - `#cardListContainer` (line 328)
   - `#importRecordsContainer` (line 511, new id)

2. **`assets/js/admin.js`** — Three changes:
   - **Card list click handler** (line 152): Now calls `cardListContainer.focus({ preventScroll: true })` after selecting a card, so focus moves to the scrollable container instead of staying on the non-focusable card item
   - **Card list keydown listener** (line 796): Single listener on `cardListContainer` — intercepts ArrowUp/Down, calls `e.preventDefault()` to stop scrolling, finds the next `.card-item`, calls `.click()` to load it, and scrolls into view
   - **Import row click handler** (line 1292): Now focuses `importRecordsContainer` after selecting a row
   - **Import keydown listener** (line 815): Same pattern on `importRecordsContainer` — finds the next `<tr>`, calls `selectImportRow()`, scrolls into view

**How it works:**
1. Click any card/row → focus moves to the scrollable container (`preventScroll: true` keeps the scroll position stable)
2. Press ArrowDown/Up → container's listener fires, `preventDefault()` blocks the browser's native scroll, then programmatically selects the next/prev item and scrolls it into view
3. Selection wraps around (down from last → first, up from first → last)
