/`static`/ folder does not exist
[...]
> While working on your website, you may be redirected to the InfinityFree 404 error page. This article explains why this typically happens and what you can do to fix this. Why do I get a 404 error When you try to access a file on a website, the server tries to find the matching file to load. By default, it works like this. Suppose you have a website http://example.com which is linked to the folder htdocs in your hosting account. If you then try to load a certain URL, like http://example.com/blo…
[...]
Verified that the files exist in the specified directories.
[...]
Did you? Because I checked your htdocs directory and there is no`static` folder there. There is also no .htaccess file that could make the server get those files from elsewhere.
[...]
Everything seems to be located in the`public` folder. That’s fine too, but then you’ll need .htaccess rules to make sure the servers gets the files from that folder.
[...]
How can I address the CORB blocking and the stylesheet loading issue?
[...]
The CORS error you get is from our 404 page. So if you fix the 404 error, the CORS error will disappear too.

Title: Weird aes.js error but on a specific scenario - Hosting Support - InfinityFree Forum
URL: https://forum.infinityfree.com/t/weird-aes-js-error-but-on-a-specific-scenario/105473/1
Published: 2025-02-04T20:30:03.000Z
Author: N/A
Highlights:
happens randomly but
[...]
AES.JS is part of InfinityFree’s security mechanism, which cannot be changed in any way. Please see:
[...]
> InfinityFree is a website hosting service. That means that the hosting accounts we provided are intended for hosting websites. Websites contain pages that are accessed through web browsers. InfinityFree is not intended to be used for file sharing, API hosting, database hosting or background tasks/tools. To help enforce this, free hosting enforces a security system that makes sure that anyone trying to access your website is using a normal web browser. This is done by checking whether the web br…
[...]
The device simulation alone isn’t enough to cause interference in the security system. The error only appears when you:
[...]
1. disable the browser’s Javascript support
2. block the cookies being used by the security system
3. block`aes.js` file using ad-blockers, network tab in developer tools, etc.
4. disable certain Javascript features required for`aes.js` to work (i.e:`ES5` features)
[...]
As far as I know, neither of these actions happen when you enter device simulation mode. Therefore, it shouldn’t be blamed for this issue.
[...]
The latter has something to do with how`aes.js` was written and browser support. The`aes.js` found on most Infinityfree websites is quite similar to the various`aes.js` implementations from open-source libraries (i.e: slowaes). It was written using`ES5` syntax or even lower.
[...]
The device simulation mode does not change the Javascript engine preference nor the maximum Ecmascript (ES) support level of your browser’s Javascript engine. It is one of the limitations of the device simulation mode. Unless the browser being used for the device simulation mode is incompatible with`ES5`, compatibility shouldn’t be an issue.
[...]
Thanks everyone for the replies, unfortunately I suspended the website temporarily for personal reasons. Yes I call that file every 5 seconds since I tried to create a live online player counter, maybe I need to redo some code or remove it. As for the 10h crash it is possible that an overload is happening since the JS code needs an urgent refactor.

[...]
Its part of the security that you agreed to when sigining up:
[...]
InfinityFree uses a security system on all free hosting accounts to ensure your website is accessed by real web browsers, not bots or automated scripts. While this protects your site from malicious traffic, it can affect certain types of access. How the security system works The system checks that visitors can execute JavaScript and accept cookies: features that all modern web browsers support. This verification happens automatically and most website visitors will never notice it. You may occa…
[...]
Don’t worry, this is normal! When you visit your website, you might notice ?i=1 added to the end of your URL. Here’s what’s happening and why. What is the ?i=1 suffix? The ?i=1 is a security check that protects your website from bots and malicious traffic. Our system needs to verify you’re using a real web browser before letting you access your site. Why does it appear? When you first visit your website, our security system: Sends a small test to your browser Checks if your browser can store…
[...]
These are specific restrictions on the free account. I know its frustrating, but its not something thats going
[...]
Basically, Infinity Free use a system called aes.js as a form of protection to try and prevent bots from attacking your website. aes.js makes it so that the browser needs Javascript to load the side (amoung other things) which helps make sure all traffic is from a browser.
[...]
This also stops users from hosting API’s that go’s against the TOS.

Title: I am getting whitescreen - Hosting Support - InfinityFree Forum
URL: https://forum.infinityfree.com/t/i-am-getting-whitescreen/84934
Published: 2023-10-21T01:16:48.000Z
Author: N/A
Highlights:
/src/main.jsx:1 Failed to load module script: Expected a JavaScript module script but the server responded with a MIME type of “”. Strict MIME type checking is enforced for module scripts per HTML spec.
[...]
It looks like your index.html file doesn’t have any visual HTML code in the body. Either that or the JavaScript module you’re trying to use is preventing it from being loaded by the web browser (likely due to the problem it’s having) What kind of script or module are you trying to use?
[...]
Apparently, our servers don’t recognize the file type`.jsx`, and so no Content-Type header is returned by the server. But it appears browsers are quite picky about getting the right Content-Type for Javascript modules and block if the content type is wrong.
[...]
Fortunately, you can declare your own Content-Types using .htaccess rules. So simply go to the htdocs folder of your site, find the file with the name`.htaccess`, or create one if it doesn’t exist, and add a line to the file like this:
[...]
```
AddType text/jsx .jsx

```
[...]
Then try reloading the page and see if that fixes anything.
[...]
I’m not sure if the`text/jsx` type is incorrect, I couldn’t really find what the correct content-type is supposed to be. If this doesn’t work, maybe`application/javascript` works instead.
[...]
The MIME type for JSX (JavaScript eXtension) files is typically “text/jsx” or “application/javascript”. JSX is commonly used in web development, especially with React, to write components that mix JavaScript and HTML-like syntax. The choice of MIME type may vary depending on the web server or platform you are using, but “text/jsx” and “application/javascript” are widely used for JSX files.
[...]
Answer “text/jsx”.
[...]
#### facebook/react/blob/f230e0a03154e6f8a616e0da1fb3d97ffa1a6472/vendor/browser-transforms.js#L210
[...]
```
    }  });};runScripts = function() {  var scripts = document.getElementsByTagName('script');  // Array.prototype.slice cannot be used on NodeList on IE8  var jsxScripts = [];  for (var i = 0; i < scripts.length; i++) {    if (scripts.item(i).type === 'text/jsx') {      jsxScripts.push(scripts.item(i));    }  }  console.warn("You are using the in-browser JSX transformer. Be sure to precompile your JSX for production - http://facebook.github.io/react/docs/tooling-integration.html#jsx");  loadScripts(jsxScripts);};if (typeof window !== "undefined" && window !== null) {
```
[...]
didnt work ,i think infinityfree not supporting
[...]
I doubt you tried everything. Setting the type to`text/jsx` didn’t fix it, but`application/javascript` did work.
[...]
However, when defining it as Javascript, it returned an error because the current code is not valid Javascript code.
[...]
We don’t have Node.js on our servers, but Javascript runs in the browser, so it can be hosted pretty much anywhere.
[...]
I just realized something: you appear to have a React app. But did you actually build the React code before uploading it?
[...]
You appear to have uploaded a node_modules folder and a package.json that contain build instructions on how to build a React app. But since our servers don’t have Node.js, those files are just served as-is without any processing.
[...]
If you want to host a React site with us, you can do that without any problem, but you must build the React project locally first (with NPM), and upload the generated files to your hosting account.
[...]
After you’ve done so, you’ll also want to get rid of the node_modules on your hosting account. It serves no purpose other than wasting disk space and inodes.

Remove that second`climb-loetschen.great-site.net` and you should be good to go!

Title: Javascripts in .js files suddenly not working - Hosting Support - InfinityFree Forum
URL: https://forum.infinityfree.com/t/javascripts-in-js-files-suddenly-not-working/83426
Published: 2023-09-28T11:33:41.000Z
Author: N/A
Highlights:
My website uses javascript extensively. Everything was working fine but now any javascripts in a .js file rather than in the html itself do not work. Is this a result of the php upgrade that is taking place or is this something else? I recently switched domain name (and provider) and acquired SSL certificates but the linked .js files use relative URLs anyway so protocol and domain change shouldn’t have broken the src= links.
[...]
If you open the developer console in your browser does it show any error messages from the page (e.g. missing file)?
[...]
I had to install Kiwi Browser on my phone so I could access the developer console and lo and behold i’d put a dodgy (although i’m not sure how?) regexp line into a .js file. I didn’t even consider this could be the issue as the line was in a function i wasn’t using on the affected pages.
[...]
(by the way the offending expression was : formula.value.replace(/(\d(+|-))/g, ‘$1’)
[...]
I don’t need this function at the moment anyway so have just removed it.
[...]
No problem. I’m glad to hear you got it working. Thanks for reporting back with your solution.

25:     function escapeHtml(str) {
26:         if (!str) return '';
27:         const map = { '&': '&amp;', '<': '&lt;', '>': '&gt;', '"': '&quot;', "'": '&#39;' };
28:         return String(str).replace(/[&<>"']/g, m => map[m]);
29:     }
30: 
31:     function getIntervalPreview(card, quality) {
32:         const p = card?.progress;
33:         const rep = p ? (parseInt(p.repetitions) || 0) : -1;
34:         const ef = p ? (parseFloat(p.ease_factor) || 2.5) : 2.5;
35:         const prev = p ? (parseInt(p.interval_days) || 0) : 0;
36:         if (quality === 0) return '1d';
37:         if (rep === -1 || rep === 0) return '1d';
38:         if (rep === 1) return '6d';
39:         return Math.round(prev * ef) + 'd';
40:     }
41: 
42:     function formatBreaks(text) {
43:         if (!text) return '';
44:         let s = String(text);
45:         s = s.replace(/\\\\/g, '\\');
46:         s = s.replace(/\\br ?/g, '<br>');
47:         s = s.replace(/\\b(.*?)\\b/g, '<b>$1</b>');
48:         s = s.replace(/\\i(.*?)\\i/g, '<i>$1</i>');
49:         s = s.replace(/\\u(.*?)\\u/g, '<u>$1</u>');
50:         s = s.replace(/\\em(.*?)\\em/g, '<em>$1</em>');
51:         s = s.replace(/\\strong(.*?)\\strong/g, '<strong>$1</strong>');
52:         return s;
53:     }
54: 
55:     function stripFormatTags(text) {
56:         if (!text) return '';
57:         let s = String(text);
58:         s = s.replace(/\\\\/g, '\\');
59:         s = s.replace(/\\b(.*?)\\b/g, '$1');
60:         s = s.replace(/\\i(.*?)\\i/g, '$1');
61:         s = s.replace(/\\u(.*?)\\u/g, '$1');
62:         s = s.replace(/\\em(.*?)\\em/g, '$1');
63:         s = s.replace(/\\strong(.*?)\\strong/g, '$1');
64:         s = s.replace(/\\br/g, ' ');
65:         s = s.replace(/\\/g, '');
66:         return s.trim();
67:     }
68: 
69:     const SoundFX = {
70:         _ctx: null,
71:         _getCtx() {
72:             if (!this._ctx) {
73:                 try { this._ctx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)(); } catch (e) {}
74:             }
75:             return this._ctx;
76:         },
77:         _play(freq, duration, type, vol) {
78:             const ctx = this._getCtx();
79:             if (!ctx) return;
80:             const osc = ctx.createOscillator();
81:             const gain = ctx.createGain();
82:             osc.type = type || 'sine';
83:             osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq, ctx.currentTime);
84:             gain.gain.setValueAtTime(vol || 0.15, ctx.currentTime);
85:             gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, ctx.currentTime + duration);
86:             osc.connect(gain);
87:             gain.connect(ctx.destination);
88:             osc.start(ctx.currentTime);
89:             osc.stop(ctx.currentTime + duration);
90:         },
91:         correct() {
92:             this._play(523.25, 0.15, 'sine', 0.12);
93:             setTimeout(() => this._play(659.25, 0.15, 'sine', 0.12), 100);
94:             setTimeout(() => this._play(783.99, 0.25, 'sine', 0.12), 200);
95:         },
96:         incorrect() {
97:             this._play(150, 0.15, 'sine', 0.12);
98:             setTimeout(() => this._play(120, 0.3, 'sine', 0.1), 100);
99:         },
100:         flip() {
101:             this._play(800, 0.08, 'sine', 0.05);
102:         },
103:         complete() {
104:             const notes = [523.25, 587.33, 659.25, 783.99, 880, 1046.5];
105:             notes.forEach((n, i) => setTimeout(() => this._play(n, 0.2, 'sine', 0.1), i * 100));
106:         },
107:         click() { this._play(600, 0.04, 'sine', 0.04); }
108:     };

110:     function loadSavedData() {
111:         if (loggedInStudent && loggedInStudent.id) {
112:             currentStudent = loggedInStudent;

114:         }

117:             if (s.selectedLevels) selectedLevels = s.selectedLevels;
118:             if (s.currentSet) currentSet = s.currentSet;
119:             if (s.isRandomMode) isRandomMode = s.isRandomMode;
120:         } catch (e) {}
121:     }

133:     async function apiCall(endpoint, method = 'GET', data = null) {
134:         try {
135:             let url = endpoint;
136:             let options = { method, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, credentials: 'same-origin' };
137:             if (data && method === 'POST') {
138:                 options.body = JSON.stringify(data);
139:             }
140:             const response = await fetch(url, options);
141:             const text = await response.text();
142:             if (!text || text.trim() === '') return null;
143:             try { return JSON.parse(text); } catch (e) { return null; }
144:         } catch (err) { return null; }
145:     }
146: 
147:     async function loadCardSetsFromAPI() {
148:         try {
149:             const res = await apiCall('api/get_sets.php?user_id=' + (currentStudent?.id || 0), 'GET');
150:             if (res && res.success && res.sets && res.sets.length > 0) {
151:                 availableCardSets = res.sets;
152:                 return availableCardSets;
153:             }
154:         } catch (e) {}
155:         if (phpCardSets && phpCardSets.length > 0) {
156:             availableCardSets = phpCardSets;
157:             return availableCardSets;
158:         }
159:         availableCardSets = [{ id: 1, name: 'English: Present Simple' }];
160:         return availableCardSets;
161:     }
162: 
163:     async function loadCardsFromAPI(setId, levels, studentId, randomMode = false, studentLevel = '') {
164:         allDueReviewed = false;
165:         try {
166:             const body = {
167:                 set_id: (randomMode || setId === null) ? '' : setId.toString(),
168:                 student_id: studentId,
169:                 levels: levels,
170:                 random_mode: randomMode ? 'true' : 'false',
171:                 student_level: studentLevel,
172:                 due_only: dueOnlyMode
173:             };
174:             if (randomMode && phpCardSets && phpCardSets.length > 0) {
175:                 const restrictedSets = currentStudent?.accessible_set_ids;
176:                 if (restrictedSets && restrictedSets.length > 0) {
177:                     body.set_ids = restrictedSets;
178:                 }
179:             }
180:             const res = await apiCall('api/get_cards.php', 'POST', body);
181:             if (res && res.success) {
182:                 if (res.all_due_reviewed) allDueReviewed = true;
183:                 if (res.cards && res.cards.length > 0) { dueOnlyMode = false; return res.cards; }
184:             }
185:         } catch (e) {}
186:         dueOnlyMode = false;
187:         return [];
188:     }
189: 
190:     async function loginOrRegister(name, password, action, fullName = '', englishLevel = 'Beginner') {
191:         const res = await apiCall('api/login.php', 'POST', { name, password, action, full_name: fullName, english_level: englishLevel });
192:         if (res && res.success && res.student) {
193:             currentStudent = res.student;
194:             currentView = 'welcome';
195:             render();
196:             return res.student;
197:         }
198:         return null;
199:     }

202:         try {
203:             const res = await apiCall('api/record_review.php', 'POST', { card_id: cardId, user_id: studentId, quality, correct: wasCorrect });
204:             if (res && res.progress !== undefined) {
205:                 currentStudent.progress = res.progress;
206:                 if (res.english_level) currentStudent.english_level = res.english_level;
207:                 if (res.streak_days !== undefined) streakDays = res.streak_days;
208:             }
209:             return res;
210:         } catch (e) {}
211:         return null;
212:     }

214:     async function loadStats() {
215:         const res = await apiCall('api/get_stats.php', 'POST', { user_id: currentStudent?.id });
216:         if (res?.stats) {

223:     function spawnConfetti(count = 60) {
224:         const colors = ['#fbbf24', '#ef4444', '#3b82f6', '#22c55e', '#a855f7', '#ec4899', '#f97316'];
225:         const container = document.body;
226:         for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
227:             const el = document.createElement('div');
228:             el.className = 'confetti-piece';
229:             el.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + 'vw';
230:             el.style.background = colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)];
231:             el.style.width = (Math.random() * 8 + 4) + 'px';
232:             el.style.height = (Math.random() * 8 + 4) + 'px';
233:             el.style.borderRadius = Math.random() > 0.5 ? '50%' : '2px';
234:             el.style.animationDuration = (Math.random() * 2 + 2) + 's';
235:             el.style.animationDelay = (Math.random() * 1.5) + 's';
236:             container.appendChild(el);
237:             setTimeout(() => el.remove(), 5000);
238:         }
239:     }
240: 
241:     let statusTimeout;
242:     function displayStatusMessage(message, type = 'info') {
243:         const existing = document.getElementById('statusMessage');
244:         if (existing) existing.remove();
245:         const colors = { success: '#16a34a', error: '#dc2626', warning: '#d97706', info: '#2563eb' };
246:         const div = document.createElement('div');
247:         div.id = 'statusMessage';
248:         div.style.cssText = `position: fixed; bottom: 20px; right: 20px; background: ${colors[type]}; color: white; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 12px; z-index: 1000; animation: fadeIn 0.2s;`;
249:         div.innerHTML = message;
250:         document.body.appendChild(div);
251:         if (statusTimeout) clearTimeout(statusTimeout);
252:         statusTimeout = setTimeout(() => div.remove(), 3000);
253:     }

313:     function getGapFillHint(card) {
314:         const title = (card.title || '').toLowerCase();
315:         const content = card.content_data || {};
316: 
317:         if (title.includes('past') || title.includes('simple past')) {
318:             return '📝 Use Simple Past tense';
319:         } else if (title.includes('present perfect')) {
320:             return '📝 Use Present Perfect (have/has + past participle)';
321:         } else if (title.includes('modal') || title.includes('can') || title.includes('could') || title.includes('should') || title.includes('must')) {
322:             return '📝 Use a modal verb (can, could, should, must, might, etc.)';
323:         } else if (title.includes('future') || title.includes('will')) {
324:             return '📝 Use Future (will + base verb)';
325:         } else if (title.includes('continuous') || title.includes('progressive')) {
326:             return '📝 Use Continuous form (am/is/are/was/were + verb-ing)';
327:         } else if (title.includes('passive')) {
328:             return '📝 Use Passive voice (be + past participle)';
329:         } else if (title.includes('conditional')) {
330:             return '📝 Use Conditional (would/could/might + base verb)';
331:         } else if (content.sentence) {
332:             if (content.sentence.includes('yesterday') || content.sentence.includes('last week') || content.sentence.includes('ago')) {
333:                 return '📝 Hint: This happened in the past → use Simple Past';
334:             } else if (content.sentence.includes('tomorrow') || content.sentence.includes('next week')) {
335:                 return '📝 Hint: This will happen in the future → use Future (will)';
336:             } else if (content.sentence.includes('every day') || content.sentence.includes('usually') || content.sentence.includes('always')) {
337:                 return '📝 Hint: This is a habit/routine → use Simple Present';
338:             } else if (content.sentence.includes('now') || content.sentence.includes('right now')) {
339:                 return '📝 Hint: This is happening now → use Present Continuous';
340:             }
341:         }
342:         return '📝 Type the correct form of the verb in parentheses';
343:     }

429:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-2">💡 Select levels, then click START to filter cards</p>
430:                     </div>
431:                     <button id="launchStudyBtn" class="w-full bg-blue-700 text-white py-3 md:py-4 text-xl md:text-2xl title-font rounded-xl shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.2)] hover:translate-y-1 transition-all">🚀 START STUDYING →</button>
432:                     <button id="switchStudentBtn" class="w-full text-gray-500 py-2 text-xs md:text-sm underline">↺ Switch student</button>
433:                 </div>
434:                 <div class="teacher-script mt-5 md:mt-6 p-2 md:p-3 text-center text-gray-500 text-xs md:text-sm bg-yellow-50 border border-yellow-200 rounded-lg">
435:                     💡 Tap any card to flip it! For multiple choice, tap your answer then flip to check.
436:                 </div>
437:             </div>
438:         `;
439:         appEl.innerHTML = html;
440: 
441:         document.querySelectorAll('.level-picker').forEach(btn => {
442:             btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
443:                 SoundFX.click();
444:                 const lvl = btn.getAttribute('data-level');
445:                 if (selectedLevels.includes(lvl)) {
446:                     selectedLevels = selectedLevels.filter(l => l !== lvl);
447:                     btn.classList.remove('bg-blue-600', 'text-white', 'border-blue-800');
448:                     btn.classList.add('bg-white', 'border-gray-400', 'hover:bg-gray-100');
449:                 } else {
450:                     selectedLevels.push(lvl);
451:                     btn.classList.add('bg-blue-600', 'text-white', 'border-blue-800');
452:                     btn.classList.remove('bg-white', 'border-gray-400', 'hover:bg-gray-100');
453:                 }
454:                 saveSessionState();
455:             });
456:         });
457: 
458:         document.getElementById('refreshSetsBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
459:             SoundFX.click();
460:             displayStatusMessage('Refreshing card sets (non-empty only)...', 'info');
461:             const freshSets = await loadCardSetsFromAPI();
462:             const selectEl = document.getElementById('setSelect');
463:             if (selectEl && freshSets.length) {
464:                 const randomSelectedNow = (currentSet === null || isRandomMode);
465:                 selectEl.innerHTML = '<option value="" ' + (randomSelectedNow ? 'selected' : '') + '>🎲 RANDOM MODE - All Sets</option>' +
466:                     freshSets.map(s => `<option value="${s.id}" ${currentSet?.id == s.id && !randomSelectedNow ? 'selected' : ''}>📚 ${escapeHtml(s.name)}</option>`).join('');
467:                 displayStatusMessage(`Loaded ${freshSets.length} card sets`, 'success');
468:             } else {
469:                 displayStatusMessage('No card sets with cards found!', 'warning');
470:             }
471:         });
472: 
473:         document.getElementById('launchStudyBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
474:             const launchBtn = document.getElementById('launchStudyBtn');
475:             if (launchBtn.disabled) return;
476:             launchBtn.disabled = true;
477:             SoundFX.click();
478:             const setSelect = document.getElementById('setSelect');
479:             const selectedValue = setSelect?.value;
480:             const randomMode = (selectedValue === "");
481:             let setId = null;
482:             if (!randomMode) setId = parseInt(selectedValue);
483: 
484:             const levelsToUse = selectedLevels.length > 0 ? selectedLevels : [];
485:             const studentLevel = currentStudent?.english_level || '';
486: 
487:             displayStatusMessage(randomMode ? 'Loading random cards from ALL sets...' : `Loading cards...`, 'info');
488: 
489:             isRandomMode = randomMode;
490:             currentSet = randomMode ? null : { id: setId };
491:             saveSessionState();
492: 
493:             if (!currentStudent) { if (launchBtn) launchBtn.disabled = false; displayStatusMessage('Not logged in', 'error'); return; }
494:             const cards = await loadCardsFromAPI(setId, levelsToUse, currentStudent.id, randomMode, studentLevel);
495:             if (!cards || cards.length === 0) {
496:                 if (allDueReviewed) {
497:                     currentCards = [];
498:                     currentIndex = 0;
499:                     currentView = 'study';
500:                     render();
501:                     return;
502:                 }
503:                 if (selectedLevels.length === 0) {
504:                     displayStatusMessage('No cards at your level. Trying all levels...', 'warning');
505:                     const fallback = await loadCardsFromAPI(setId, ['Beginner', 'Intermediate', 'Advanced'], currentStudent?.id, randomMode);
506:                     if (fallback && fallback.length > 0) {
507:                         currentCards = fallback;
508:                         currentIndex = 0;
509:                         currentView = 'study';
510:                         render();
511:                         return;
512:                     }
513:                 }
514:                 if (launchBtn) launchBtn.disabled = false;
515:                 alert('No cards found for the selected filters! Try different difficulty levels.');
516:                 return;
517:             }
518:             if (randomMode) {
519:                 for (let i = cards.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
520:                     const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
521:                     [cards[i], cards[j]] = [cards[j], cards[i]];
522:                 }
523:             }
524:             currentCards = cards;
525:             currentIndex = 0;
526:             currentView = 'study';
527:             render();
528:         });
529: 
530:         // dueReviewBtn is rendered dynamically, use event delegation
531:         document.getElementById('appRoot')?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
532:             if (e.target.id === 'dueReviewBtn') {
533:                 dueOnlyMode = true;
534:                 const setSelect = document.getElementById('setSelect');
535:                 if (setSelect) setSelect.value = '';
536:                 document.getElementById('launchStudyBtn')?.click();
537:             }
538:         });
539: 
540:         document.getElementById('switchStudentBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => clearStudent());
541:         document.getElementById('editProfileBtn')?.addEventListener('click', openEditProfileModal);
542:     }
543: 
544:     function openEditProfileModal() {
545:         const existing = document.getElementById('editProfileModal');
546:         if (existing) existing.remove();
547: 
548:         const modal = document.createElement('div');
549:         modal.id = 'editProfileModal';
550:         modal.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:1000;animation:fadeIn 0.2s;';
551:         modal.innerHTML = `
552:             <div class="whiteboard-card" style="max-width:400px;width:90%;padding:24px;">
553:                 <h3 class="text-lg marker-underline mb-3">✏️ Edit Profile</h3>
554:                 <div class="flex gap-2 mb-3">
555:                     <button id="saveProfileBtn" class="flex-1 bg-blue-700 text-white py-2 rounded-xl font-bold">💾 Save</button>
556:                     <button id="cancelProfileBtn" class="flex-1 bg-gray-300 text-gray-800 py-2 rounded-xl font-bold">Cancel</button>
557:                 </div>
558:                 <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Full Name:</label>
559:                 <input type="text" id="editProfileFullName" class="form-input w-full p-2 border-2 rounded-xl mb-3" value="${escapeHtml(currentStudent?.full_name || '')}">
560:                 <label class="block font-bold mb-1">English Level:</label>
561:                 <select id="editProfileLevel" class="form-select w-full p-2 border-2 rounded-xl mb-3 bg-white">
562:                     <option value="Beginner" ${currentStudent?.english_level === 'Beginner' ? 'selected' : ''}>🔰 Beginner</option>
563:                     <option value="Intermediate" ${currentStudent?.english_level === 'Intermediate' ? 'selected' : ''}>📚 Intermediate</option>
564:                     <option value="Advanced" ${currentStudent?.english_level === 'Advanced' ? 'selected' : ''}>🎓 Advanced</option>
565:                 </select>
566:                 <p id="editProfileError" class="text-red-600 text-center mt-2 hidden"></p>
567:             </div>
568:         `;
569:         document.body.appendChild(modal);
570: 
571:         document.getElementById('cancelProfileBtn').addEventListener('click', () => modal.remove());
572:         modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === modal) modal.remove(); });
573: 
574:         document.getElementById('saveProfileBtn').addEventListener('click', async () => {
575:             const fullName = document.getElementById('editProfileFullName').value.trim();
576:             const englishLevel = document.getElementById('editProfileLevel').value;
577: 
578:             const res = await apiCall('api/login.php', 'POST', {
579:                 action: 'update_profile',
580:                 user_id: currentStudent.id,
581:                 full_name: fullName,
582:                 english_level: englishLevel
583:             });
584:             if (res && res.success) {
585:                 currentStudent.full_name = fullName;
586:                 currentStudent.english_level = englishLevel;
587:                 modal.remove();
588:                 render();
589:             } else {
590:                 alert(res?.error || 'Error updating profile');
591:             }
592:         });
593:     }
594: 
595:     function renderCardFront(card) {
596:         const pattern = card.pattern_type;
597:         const data = card.content_data || {};
598:         const title = card.title || 'Flashcard';
599: 
600:         if (pattern === 'multiple_choice') {
601:             const options = data.options || ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C'];
602:             const gridClass = options.length > 3 ? 'grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-3' : 'space-y-3';
603:             return `
604:                 <div class="text-center">
605:                     <p class="text-lg mb-3 font-bold">❓ ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(card.question_text || 'Select the correct answer:'))}</p>
606:                     <div class="${gridClass}" id="mcqOptionsContainer">
607:                         ${options.map((opt, idx) => `<div class="quiz-option" data-idx="${idx}">${String.fromCharCode(65+idx)}. ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(opt))}</div>`).join('')}
608:                     </div>
609:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-2">👆 Tap your answer, then flip the card</p>
610:                 </div>
611:             `;
612:         } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill') {
613:             const sentence = data.sentence || 'Complete the sentence: ______';
614:             const hint = getGapFillHint(card);
615:             return `
616:                 <div class="text-center">
617:                     <p class="text-lg mb-1 font-bold">✏️ Complete the sentence:</p>
618:                     <p class="text-sm bg-gray-100 p-3 rounded-xl mb-1">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(sentence))}</p>
619:                     <div class="context-hint">${hint}</div>
620:                     <input type="text" id="gapFillInput" placeholder="Type your answer..." class="w-full p-2 text-sm border-2 rounded-xl mb-2" autocomplete="off">
621:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-1">👆 Type answer, then flip to check</p>
622:                 </div>
623:             `;
624:         } else if (pattern === 'image_mcq') {
625:             const imageUrl = data.image_url || '';
626:             const hasImage = imageUrl && (imageUrl.startsWith('http://') || imageUrl.startsWith('https://') || imageUrl.startsWith('uploads/'));
627:             const options = data.options || ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C'];
628:             return `
629:                 <div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-3 md:gap-4 h-full min-h-[200px]">
630:                     <div class="flex items-center justify-center md:w-1/2 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl p-2">
631:                         ${hasImage
632:                             ? `<img src="${escapeHtml(imageUrl)}" alt="${escapeHtml(title)}" class="max-h-48 md:max-h-full w-full object-contain rounded-lg" onerror="this.style.display='none'">`
633:                             : `<div class="text-6xl text-gray-300">🖼️</div>`
634:                         }
635:                     </div>
636:                     <div class="flex flex-col justify-center md:w-1/2 gap-2" id="mcqOptionsContainer">
637:                         <p class="text-sm font-bold text-center md:text-left mb-1">Select the correct answer:</p>
638:                         ${options.map((opt, idx) => `<div class="quiz-option text-sm md:text-base py-2 px-3" data-idx="${idx}">${String.fromCharCode(65+idx)}. ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(opt))}</div>`).join('')}
639:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1 text-center">👆 Tap your answer, then flip</p>
640:                     </div>
641:                 </div>
642:             `;
643:         } else if (pattern === 'image_description') {
644:             const imageUrl = data.image_url || '';
645:             const hasImage = imageUrl && (imageUrl.startsWith('http://') || imageUrl.startsWith('https://') || imageUrl.startsWith('uploads/'));
646:             return `
647:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full min-h-[200px]">
648:                     <h1 class="text-xl md:text-2xl text-center font-bold marker-underline mb-3">🖼️ ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h1>
649:                     ${hasImage ? `<img src="${escapeHtml(imageUrl)}" alt="${escapeHtml(title)}" class="max-h-48 md:max-h-64 rounded-xl shadow-md mb-2 object-contain" onerror="this.style.display='none'">` : `<div class="text-6xl mb-2">🖼️</div>`}
650:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-2">👆 Tap card to flip</p>
651:                 </div>
652:             `;
653:         } else if (pattern === 'audio_listening') {
654:             const audioUrl = data.audio_url || '';
655:             const hasAudio = audioUrl && (audioUrl.startsWith('http://') || audioUrl.startsWith('https://') || audioUrl.startsWith('uploads/'));
656:             const prompt = data.prompt || '';
657:             const isInteractive = !!(prompt || data.correct_answers);
658:             const isTranscription = !!data.transcript && !data.correct_answers;
659:             return `
660:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full min-h-[200px]">
661:                     <h1 class="text-xl md:text-2xl text-center font-bold marker-underline mb-3">🎧 ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h1>
662:                     ${hasAudio ? `<audio controls class="w-full max-w-xs mb-2" src="${escapeHtml(audioUrl)}">Your browser does not support audio.</audio>` : `<div class="text-6xl mb-2">🎧</div>`}
663:                     ${prompt ? `<p class="text-sm bg-gray-100 p-2 rounded-xl mb-1">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(prompt))}</p>` : ''}
664:                     ${isInteractive ? `<input type="text" id="gapFillInput" placeholder="${isTranscription ? 'Type what you hear...' : 'Type your answer...'}" class="w-full p-2 text-sm border-2 rounded-xl mb-2" autocomplete="off">` : ''}
665:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-1">👆 Tap card to flip${isInteractive ? ' after answering' : ''}</p>
666:                 </div>
667:             `;
668:         } else {
669:             return `
670:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full min-h-[200px]">
671:                     <h1 class="text-xl md:text-2xl md:text-3xl text-center font-bold marker-underline max-w-full break-words px-2">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h1>
672:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-3">👆 Tap card to flip</p>
673:                 </div>
674:             `;
675:         }
676:     }
677: 
678:     function renderCardBack(card, quizState) {
679:         const data = card.content_data || {};
680:         const pattern = card.pattern_type;
681:         const title = card.title || 'Flashcard';
682: 
683:         if (pattern === 'multiple_choice') {
684:             const options = data.options || ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C'];
685:             const correctIdx = data.correct_index !== undefined ? data.correct_index : 1;
686:             const correctAnswer = options[correctIdx];
687:             const selectedIdx = quizState?.selectedIdx;
688:             const isCorrect = (selectedIdx === correctIdx);
689:             const explanation = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.explanation || ''));
690: 
691:             return `
692:                 <div class="back-content">
693:                     <div class="text-center">
694:                         <h3 class="text-lg text-green-700 title-font marker-underline mb-2">✓ Answer</h3>
695:                         <div class="bg-green-50 p-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300 mb-2">
696:                             <p class="text-base font-bold">${String.fromCharCode(65+correctIdx)}. ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(correctAnswer))}</p>
697:                         </div>
698:                         ${selectedIdx !== null ? `
699:                         <div class="p-2 rounded-lg mb-2 ${isCorrect ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'}">
700:                             <p class="text-sm">${isCorrect ? '✅ Correct!' : `❌ Incorrect. The correct answer is ${String.fromCharCode(65+correctIdx)}.`}</p>
701:                         </div>
702:                         ` : ''}
703:                         ${explanation ? `<div class="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1 p-2 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">📝 ${explanation}</div>` : ''}
704:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">Rate your recall using the buttons below</p>
705:                     </div>
706:                 </div>
707:             `;
708:         } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill') {
709:             const correctAnswers = data.correct_answers || ['answer'];
710:             const userAnswer = quizState?.userAnswer || '';
711:             const isMatch = correctAnswers.some(ans => ans.toLowerCase() === userAnswer.toLowerCase());
712:             const example = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.example || ''));
713: 
714:             return `
715:                 <div class="back-content">
716:                     <div class="text-center">
717:                         <h3 class="text-lg text-green-700 title-font marker-underline mb-2">✓ Correct Answer</h3>
718:                         <div class="bg-green-50 p-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300 mb-2">
719:                             <p class="text-base font-bold">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(correctAnswers.join(' / ')))}</p>
720:                         </div>
721:                         ${userAnswer ? `
722:                         <div class="p-2 rounded-lg mb-2 ${isMatch ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'}">
723:                             <p class="text-sm">${isMatch ? '✅ Correct!' : `❌ Incorrect. Your answer: "${escapeHtml(userAnswer)}"`}</p>
724:                         </div>
725:                         ` : ''}
726:                         ${example ? `<div class="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1 p-2 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">📝 Example: ${example}</div>` : ''}
727:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">Rate your recall using the buttons below</p>
728:                     </div>
729:                 </div>
730:             `;
731:         } else if (pattern === 'image_mcq') {
732:             const options = data.options || ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C'];
733:             const correctIdx = data.correct_index !== undefined ? data.correct_index : 1;
734:             const correctAnswer = options[correctIdx];
735:             const selectedIdx = quizState?.selectedIdx;
736:             const isCorrect = (selectedIdx === correctIdx);
737:             const explanation = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.explanation || ''));
738: 
739:             return `
740:                 <div class="back-content">
741:                     <div class="text-center">
742:                         <h3 class="text-lg text-green-700 title-font marker-underline mb-2">✓ Answer</h3>
743:                         <div class="bg-green-50 p-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300 mb-2">
744:                             <p class="text-base font-bold">${String.fromCharCode(65+correctIdx)}. ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(correctAnswer))}</p>
745:                         </div>
746:                         ${selectedIdx !== null ? `
747:                         <div class="p-2 rounded-lg mb-2 ${isCorrect ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'}">
748:                             <p class="text-sm">${isCorrect ? '✅ Correct!' : `❌ Incorrect. The correct answer is ${String.fromCharCode(65+correctIdx)}.`}</p>
749:                         </div>
750:                         ` : ''}
751:                         ${explanation ? `<div class="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1 p-2 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">📝 ${explanation}</div>` : ''}
752:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">Rate your recall using the buttons below</p>
753:                     </div>
754:                 </div>
755:             `;
756:         } else if (pattern === 'image_description') {
757:             const description = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.description || 'No description'));
758:             return `
759:                 <div class="back-content">
760:                     <div class="text-center">
761:                         <h3 class="text-lg text-blue-700 title-font marker-underline mb-2">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h3>
762:                         <div class="card-definition bg-blue-50 p-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-300">
763:                             ${description}
764:                         </div>
765:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">Rate your recall using the buttons below</p>
766:                     </div>
767:                 </div>
768:             `;
769:         } else if (pattern === 'audio_listening') {
770:             const transcript = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.transcript || data.notes || ''));
771:             const correctAnswers = data.correct_answers || [];
772:             const userAnswer = quizState?.userAnswer || '';
773:             const isInteractive = !!(data.prompt || correctAnswers.length);
774:             let isMatch = false;
775:             if (userAnswer && correctAnswers.length) {
776:                 isMatch = correctAnswers.some(ans => ans.toLowerCase() === userAnswer.toLowerCase());
777:             } else if (userAnswer && data.transcript) {
778:                 isMatch = data.transcript.toLowerCase().trim() === userAnswer.toLowerCase().trim();
779:             }
780:             return `
781:                 <div class="back-content">
782:                     <div class="text-center">
783:                         <h3 class="text-lg text-green-700 title-font marker-underline mb-2">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h3>
784:                         ${transcript ? `<div class="card-definition bg-green-50 p-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300 mb-2">${transcript}</div>` : ''}
785:                         ${isInteractive && userAnswer ? `
786:                         <div class="p-2 rounded-lg mb-2 ${isMatch ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'}">
787:                             <p class="text-sm">${isMatch ? '✅ Correct!' : `❌ Your answer: "${escapeHtml(userAnswer)}"`}</p>
788:                         </div>
789:                         ` : isInteractive && !userAnswer ? `<p class="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-2">Type what you heard above, then flip.</p>` : ''}
790:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">Rate your recall using the buttons below</p>
791:                     </div>
792:                 </div>
793:             `;
794:         } else {
795:             const definition = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.definition || data.usage1 || 'No definition available'));
796:             const example = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.example1a || data.example || ''));
797: 
798:             return `
799:                 <div class="back-content">
800:                     <div class="text-center">
801:                         <h3 class="text-lg text-blue-700 title-font marker-underline mb-2">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h3>
802:                         <div class="card-definition bg-blue-50 p-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-300">
803:                             ${definition}
804:                         </div>
805:                         ${example ? `
806:                             <div class="mt-2 p-2 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg">
807:                                 <p class="text-sm"><strong>Example:</strong> ${example}</p>
808:                             </div>
809:                         ` : ''}
810:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">Rate your recall using the buttons below</p>
811:                     </div>
812:                 </div>
813:             `;
814:         }
815:     }
816: 
817:     function handleFlip(card, quizState, flashcardEl) {
818:         if (flashcardEl.classList.contains('flipped')) {
819:             flashcardEl.classList.remove('flipped');
820:             isFlipped = false;
821:             return;
822:         }
823: 
824:         const pattern = card.pattern_type;
825:         if (pattern === 'multiple_choice' || pattern === 'image_mcq') {
826:             const selected = document.querySelector('#mcqOptionsContainer .quiz-option.selected');
827:             if (selected) {
828:                 quizState.selectedIdx = parseInt(selected.getAttribute('data-idx'));
829:                 quizState.answered = true;
830:             }
831:         } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill' || pattern === 'audio_listening') {
832:             const input = document.getElementById('gapFillInput');
833:             if (input) {
834:                 quizState.userAnswer = input.value.trim();
835:                 quizState.answered = true;
836:             }
837:         }
838: 
839:         SoundFX.flip();
840:         isFlipped = true;
841: 
842:         const backDiv = document.getElementById('cardBack');
843:         if (backDiv && quizState.answered) {
844:             backDiv.innerHTML = renderCardBack(card, quizState);
845:         } else if (backDiv && !quizState.answered && pattern !== 'usage_cases' && pattern !== 'deep_dive' && pattern !== 'formula_table' && pattern !== 'image_description' && pattern !== 'audio_listening') {
846:             backDiv.innerHTML = renderCardBack(card, quizState);
847:         }
848: 
849:         flashcardEl.classList.add('flipped');
850:     }
851: 
852:     function handleAutoFlip(card, quizState) {
853:         setTimeout(() => {
854:             if (!isFlipped) {
855:                 SoundFX.flip();
856:                 isFlipped = true;
857:                 const flashcardEl = document.getElementById('flashcardEl');

19:     function escapeHtml(str) {
20:         if (!str) return '';
21:         const map = { '&': '&amp;', '<': '&lt;', '>': '&gt;', '"': '&quot;', "'": '&#39;' };
22:         return String(str).replace(/[&<>"']/g, m => map[m]);
23:     }
24: 
25:     function formatBreaks(text) {
26:         if (!text) return '';
27:         let s = String(text);
28:         s = s.replace(/\\\\/g, '\\');
29:         s = s.replace(/\\br ?/g, '<br>');
30:         s = s.replace(/\\b(.*?)\\b/g, '<b>$1</b>');
31:         s = s.replace(/\\i(.*?)\\i/g, '<i>$1</i>');
32:         s = s.replace(/\\u(.*?)\\u/g, '<u>$1</u>');
33:         s = s.replace(/\\em(.*?)\\em/g, '<em>$1</em>');
34:         s = s.replace(/\\strong(.*?)\\strong/g, '<strong>$1</strong>');
35:         return s;
36:     }
37: 
38:     async function loadCardSets() {
39:         const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=get_sets&t=' + Date.now(), {
40:             headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
41:         });
42:         const data = await response.json();
43:         if (data.success && data.sets) {
44:             const currentVal = setSelector.value;
45:             setSelector.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- Choose Card Set --</option>';
46:             data.sets.forEach(set => {
47:                 setSelector.innerHTML += `<option value="${set.id}">${escapeHtml(set.name)}</option>`;
48:             });
49:             if (currentVal) setSelector.value = currentVal;
50:         }
51:     }
52: 
53:     async function loadCards(setId) {
54:         if (!setId) {
55:             cardListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center text-gray-500 py-8">Select a card set to load cards</div>';
56:             return;
57:         }
58:         currentSetId = setId;
59: 
60:         const levels = [];
61:         if (document.getElementById('levelBeginner').checked) levels.push('Beginner');
62:         if (document.getElementById('levelIntermediate').checked) levels.push('Intermediate');
63:         if (document.getElementById('levelAdvanced').checked) levels.push('Advanced');
64: 
65:         const styles = [];
66:         if (document.getElementById('styleText').checked) styles.push('text');
67:         if (document.getElementById('styleMcq').checked) styles.push('mcq');
68:         if (document.getElementById('styleGap').checked) styles.push('gap');
69:         if (document.getElementById('styleImage').checked) styles.push('image');
70:         if (document.getElementById('styleAudio').checked) styles.push('audio');
71: 
72:         cardListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center py-8"><div class="loader"></div> Loading cards...</div>';
73: 
74:         const response = await fetch(`admin_cards.php?action=get_cards&set_id=${setId}&t=${Date.now()}`, {
75:             headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
76:         });
77:         const data = await response.json();
78:         if (data.success) {
79:             currentCards = data.cards;
80:             renderCardList(levels, styles);
81:         } else {
82:             cardListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center text-red-500 py-8">Error loading cards</div>';
83:         }
84:     }

86:     function getSearchTerm() {
87:         const input = document.getElementById('cardSearchInput');
88:         return input ? input.value.trim().toLowerCase() : '';
89:     }
90: 
91:     function getStyleClass(patternType) {
92:         if (patternType === 'multiple_choice') return 'mcq';
93:         if (patternType === 'image_mcq') return 'image';
94:         if (patternType === 'gap_fill') return 'gap';
95:         if (patternType === 'image_description') return 'image';
96:         if (patternType === 'audio_listening') return 'audio';
97:         return 'text';
98:     }
99: 
100:     function renderCardList(levelFilter = [], styleFilter = []) {
101:         let filteredCards = currentCards;
102: 
103:         const searchTerm = getSearchTerm();
104:         if (searchTerm) {
105:             filteredCards = filteredCards.filter(card =>
106:                 (card.title || '').toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm)
107:             );
108:         }
109: 
110:         if (levelFilter.length > 0) {
111:             filteredCards = filteredCards.filter(card => levelFilter.includes(card.level));
112:         }
113: 
114:         if (styleFilter.length > 0) {
115:             filteredCards = filteredCards.filter(card => styleFilter.includes(getStyleClass(card.pattern_type)));
116:         }
117: 
118:         _filteredCardIds = filteredCards.map(c => c.id);
119: 
120:         if (!filteredCards.length) {
121:             cardListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center text-gray-500 py-8">No cards matching filter in this set</div>';
122:             return;
123:         }
124: 
125:         let html = '';
126:         filteredCards.forEach(card => {
127:             const isSelected = (selectedCardId === card.id);
128:             const typeClass = getStyleClass(card.pattern_type);
129:             const typeLabels = { mcq: 'MCQ', gap: 'Gap', image: 'Image', audio: 'Audio', text: 'Text' };
130:             const typeLabel = typeLabels[typeClass] || 'Text';
131:             html += `
132:                 <div class="card-item ${isSelected ? 'selected' : ''}" data-id="${card.id}">
133:                     <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
134:                         <span class="card-title">${escapeHtml(card.title || 'Untitled')}</span>
135:                         <span class="card-type ${typeClass}">${typeLabel}</span>
136:                     </div>
137:                     <div class="card-meta">${escapeHtml(card.level || 'Beginner')} · ID ${card.id}</div>
138:                     <button class="card-delete-btn" title="Delete card">&times;</button>
139:                 </div>
140:             `;
141:         });
142:         cardListContainer.innerHTML = html;
143: 
144:         document.querySelectorAll('.card-item').forEach(el => {
145:             el.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
146:                 if (e.target.classList.contains('card-delete-btn')) return;
147:                 const id = parseInt(el.dataset.id);
148:                 const card = currentCards.find(c => c.id === id);
149:                 if (card) loadCardIntoEditor(card);
150:                 document.querySelectorAll('.card-item').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('selected'));
151:                 el.classList.add('selected');
152:                 selectedCardId = id;
153:             });
154:         });
155: 
156:         document.querySelectorAll('.card-delete-btn').forEach(btn => {
157:             btn.addEventListener('click', async (e) => {
158:                 e.stopPropagation();
159:                 const el = btn.closest('.card-item');
160:                 const id = parseInt(el.dataset.id);
161:                 const card = currentCards.find(c => c.id === id);
162:                 const title = card ? card.title : 'this card';
163:                 if (!confirm(`Delete "${title}"? This cannot be undone.`)) return;
164:                 const response = await fetch(`admin_cards.php?action=delete_card&card_id=${id}`, {
165:                     headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
166:                 });
167:                 const result = await response.json();
168:                 if (result.success) {
169:                     if (selectedCardId === id) newCard();
170:                     if (setSelector.value) loadCards(setSelector.value);
171:                 } else {
172:                     alert('Error deleting card');
173:                 }
174:             });
175:         });
176:     }

211:             row.image_url = importEditDefinition.value;

214:             row.audio_url = importEditDefinition.value;

217:         } else {
218:             row.example1 = extra;

220:             row.usage1 = extra;

222:     }
