25:     function escapeHtml(str) {
26:         if (!str) return '';
27:         const map = { '&': '&amp;', '<': '&lt;', '>': '&gt;', '"': '&quot;', "'": '&#39;' };
28:         return String(str).replace(/[&<>"']/g, m => map[m]);
29:     }
30: 
31:     function getIntervalPreview(card, quality) {
32:         const p = card?.progress;
33:         const rep = p ? (parseInt(p.repetitions) || 0) : -1;
34:         const ef = p ? (parseFloat(p.ease_factor) || 2.5) : 2.5;
35:         const prev = p ? (parseInt(p.interval_days) || 0) : 0;
36:         if (quality === 0) return '1d';
37:         if (rep === -1 || rep === 0) return '1d';
38:         if (rep === 1) return '6d';
39:         return Math.round(prev * ef) + 'd';
40:     }
41: 
42:     function formatBreaks(text) {
43:         if (!text) return '';
44:         let s = String(text);
45:         s = s.replace(/\\\\/g, '\\');
46:         s = s.replace(/\\br ?/g, '<br>');
47:         s = s.replace(/\\b(.*?)\\b/g, '<b>$1</b>');
48:         s = s.replace(/\\i(.*?)\\i/g, '<i>$1</i>');
49:         s = s.replace(/\\u(.*?)\\u/g, '<u>$1</u>');
50:         s = s.replace(/\\em(.*?)\\em/g, '<em>$1</em>');
51:         s = s.replace(/\\strong(.*?)\\strong/g, '<strong>$1</strong>');
52:         return s;
53:     }
54: 
55:     function stripFormatTags(text) {
56:         if (!text) return '';
57:         let s = String(text);
58:         s = s.replace(/\\\\/g, '\\');
59:         s = s.replace(/\\b(.*?)\\b/g, '$1');
60:         s = s.replace(/\\i(.*?)\\i/g, '$1');
61:         s = s.replace(/\\u(.*?)\\u/g, '$1');
62:         s = s.replace(/\\em(.*?)\\em/g, '$1');
63:         s = s.replace(/\\strong(.*?)\\strong/g, '$1');
64:         s = s.replace(/\\br/g, ' ');
65:         s = s.replace(/\\/g, '');
66:         return s.trim();
67:     }
68: 
69:     const SoundFX = {
70:         _ctx: null,
71:         _getCtx() {
72:             if (!this._ctx) {
73:                 try { this._ctx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)(); } catch (e) {}
74:             }
75:             return this._ctx;
76:         },
77:         _play(freq, duration, type, vol) {
78:             const ctx = this._getCtx();
79:             if (!ctx) return;
80:             const osc = ctx.createOscillator();
81:             const gain = ctx.createGain();
82:             osc.type = type || 'sine';
83:             osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq, ctx.currentTime);
84:             gain.gain.setValueAtTime(vol || 0.15, ctx.currentTime);
85:             gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, ctx.currentTime + duration);
86:             osc.connect(gain);
87:             gain.connect(ctx.destination);
88:             osc.start(ctx.currentTime);
89:             osc.stop(ctx.currentTime + duration);
90:         },
91:         correct() {
92:             this._play(523.25, 0.15, 'sine', 0.12);
93:             setTimeout(() => this._play(659.25, 0.15, 'sine', 0.12), 100);
94:             setTimeout(() => this._play(783.99, 0.25, 'sine', 0.12), 200);
95:         },
96:         incorrect() {
97:             this._play(150, 0.15, 'sine', 0.12);
98:             setTimeout(() => this._play(120, 0.3, 'sine', 0.1), 100);
99:         },
100:         flip() {
101:             this._play(800, 0.08, 'sine', 0.05);
102:         },
103:         complete() {
104:             const notes = [523.25, 587.33, 659.25, 783.99, 880, 1046.5];
105:             notes.forEach((n, i) => setTimeout(() => this._play(n, 0.2, 'sine', 0.1), i * 100));
106:         },
107:         click() { this._play(600, 0.04, 'sine', 0.04); }
108:     };
109: 
110:     function loadSavedData() {
111:         if (loggedInStudent && loggedInStudent.id) {
112:             currentStudent = loggedInStudent;
113:             currentView = 'welcome';
114:         }
115:         const session = sessionStorage.getItem(SESSION_STATE_KEY);
116:         if (session) try { const s = JSON.parse(session);
117:             if (s.selectedLevels) selectedLevels = s.selectedLevels;
118:             if (s.currentSet) currentSet = s.currentSet;
119:             if (s.isRandomMode) isRandomMode = s.isRandomMode;
120:         } catch (e) {}
121:     }
122: 
123:     function saveSessionState() {
124:         sessionStorage.setItem(SESSION_STATE_KEY, JSON.stringify({ selectedLevels, currentSet, isRandomMode }));
125:     }
126: 
127:     function clearStudent() {
128:         currentStudent = null;
129:         currentView = 'login';
130:         render();
131:     }
132: 
133:     async function apiCall(endpoint, method = 'GET', data = null) {
134:         try {
135:             let url = endpoint;
136:             let options = { method, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, credentials: 'same-origin' };
137:             if (data && method === 'POST') {
138:                 options.body = JSON.stringify(data);
139:             }
140:             const response = await fetch(url, options);
141:             const text = await response.text();
142:             if (!text || text.trim() === '') return null;
143:             try { return JSON.parse(text); } catch (e) { return null; }
144:         } catch (err) { return null; }
145:     }
146: 
147:     async function loadCardSetsFromAPI() {
148:         try {
149:             const res = await apiCall('api/get_sets.php?user_id=' + (currentStudent?.id || 0), 'GET');
150:             if (res && res.success && res.sets && res.sets.length > 0) {
151:                 availableCardSets = res.sets;
152:                 return availableCardSets;
153:             }
154:         } catch (e) {}
155:         if (phpCardSets && phpCardSets.length > 0) {
156:             availableCardSets = phpCardSets;
157:             return availableCardSets;
158:         }
159:         availableCardSets = [{ id: 1, name: 'English: Present Simple' }];
160:         return availableCardSets;
161:     }
162: 
163:     async function loadCardsFromAPI(setId, levels, studentId, randomMode = false, studentLevel = '') {
164:         allDueReviewed = false;
165:         try {
166:             const body = {
167:                 set_id: (randomMode || setId === null) ? '' : setId.toString(),
168:                 student_id: studentId,
169:                 levels: levels,
170:                 random_mode: randomMode ? 'true' : 'false',
171:                 student_level: studentLevel,
172:                 due_only: dueOnlyMode
173:             };
174:             if (randomMode && phpCardSets && phpCardSets.length > 0) {
175:                 const restrictedSets = currentStudent?.accessible_set_ids;
176:                 if (restrictedSets && restrictedSets.length > 0) {
177:                     body.set_ids = restrictedSets;
178:                 }
179:             }
180:             const res = await apiCall('api/get_cards.php', 'POST', body);
181:             if (res && res.success) {
182:                 if (res.all_due_reviewed) allDueReviewed = true;
183:                 if (res.cards && res.cards.length > 0) { dueOnlyMode = false; return res.cards; }
184:             }
185:         } catch (e) {}
186:         dueOnlyMode = false;
187:         return [];
188:     }
189: 
190:     async function loginOrRegister(name, password, action, fullName = '', englishLevel = 'Beginner') {
191:         const res = await apiCall('api/login.php', 'POST', { name, password, action, full_name: fullName, english_level: englishLevel });
192:         if (res && res.success && res.student) {
193:             currentStudent = res.student;
194:             currentView = 'welcome';
195:             render();
196:             return res.student;
197:         }
198:         return null;
199:     }
200: 
201:     async function recordReview(cardId, studentId, quality, wasCorrect) {
202:         try {
203:             const res = await apiCall('api/record_review.php', 'POST', { card_id: cardId, user_id: studentId, quality, correct: wasCorrect });
204:             if (res && res.progress !== undefined) {
205:                 currentStudent.progress = res.progress;
206:                 if (res.english_level) currentStudent.english_level = res.english_level;
207:                 if (res.streak_days !== undefined) streakDays = res.streak_days;
208:             }
209:             return res;
210:         } catch (e) {}
211:         return null;
212:     }
213: 
214:     async function loadStats() {
215:         const res = await apiCall('api/get_stats.php', 'POST', { user_id: currentStudent?.id });
216:         if (res?.stats) {
217:             streakDays = res.stats.streak_days || 0;
218:             if (res?.user) currentStudent.english_level = res.user.english_level;
219:         }
220:         return res?.stats || null;
221:     }
222: 
223:     function spawnConfetti(count = 60) {
224:         const colors = ['#fbbf24', '#ef4444', '#3b82f6', '#22c55e', '#a855f7', '#ec4899', '#f97316'];
225:         const container = document.body;
226:         for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
227:             const el = document.createElement('div');
228:             el.className = 'confetti-piece';
229:             el.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + 'vw';
230:             el.style.background = colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)];
231:             el.style.width = (Math.random() * 8 + 4) + 'px';
232:             el.style.height = (Math.random() * 8 + 4) + 'px';
233:             el.style.borderRadius = Math.random() > 0.5 ? '50%' : '2px';
234:             el.style.animationDuration = (Math.random() * 2 + 2) + 's';
235:             el.style.animationDelay = (Math.random() * 1.5) + 's';
236:             container.appendChild(el);
237:             setTimeout(() => el.remove(), 5000);
238:         }
239:     }
240: 
241:     let statusTimeout;
242:     function displayStatusMessage(message, type = 'info') {
243:         const existing = document.getElementById('statusMessage');
244:         if (existing) existing.remove();
245:         const colors = { success: '#16a34a', error: '#dc2626', warning: '#d97706', info: '#2563eb' };
246:         const div = document.createElement('div');
247:         div.id = 'statusMessage';
248:         div.style.cssText = `position: fixed; bottom: 20px; right: 20px; background: ${colors[type]}; color: white; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 12px; z-index: 1000; animation: fadeIn 0.2s;`;
249:         div.innerHTML = message;
250:         document.body.appendChild(div);
251:         if (statusTimeout) clearTimeout(statusTimeout);
252:         statusTimeout = setTimeout(() => div.remove(), 3000);
253:     }
254: 
255:     const appEl = document.getElementById('appRoot');
256: 
257:     if (!appEl) {
258:         console.error('Flashcard Studio: #appRoot element not found');
259:     }
260: 
261:     function render() {
262:         if (!appEl) return;
263:         if (currentView === 'login') renderLoginScreen();
264:         else if (currentView === 'welcome') renderWelcomeScreen();
265:         else renderStudyScreen();
266:     }
267: 
268:     function renderLoginScreen() {
269:         appEl.innerHTML = `
270:             <div class="whiteboard-card p-4 md:p-6 shadow-2xl screen-fade-in">
271:                 <div class="text-center mb-4 md:mb-5">
272:                     <h1 class="text-2xl md:text-4xl text-blue-900 marker-underline"><span class="text-3xl md:text-4xl">🎓</span> Flashcard Studio <span class="text-xl md:text-2xl">✏️</span></h1>
273:                     <p class="text-gray-600 text-sm md:text-lg mt-1">sign in to start studying</p>
274:                 </div>
275:                 <div class="space-y-4 md:space-y-5 max-w-md mx-auto">
276:                     <div class="marker-border p-3 md:p-4 bg-white/80">
277:                         <label class="text-lg md:text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 title-font">👤 Username</label>
278:                         <input type="text" id="authNameInput" placeholder="Username (max 30 chars)" maxlength="30" class="w-full p-2 md:p-2 text-base md:text-lg border-2 rounded-xl mt-1">
279:                     </div>
280:                     <div class="marker-border p-3 md:p-4 bg-white/80">
281:                         <label class="text-lg md:text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 title-font">🔒 Password</label>
282:                         <input type="password" id="authPasswordInput" placeholder="Enter password" class="w-full p-2 md:p-2 text-base md:text-lg border-2 rounded-xl mt-1">
283:                     </div>
284:                     <button id="loginBtn" class="w-full bg-blue-700 text-white py-2 md:py-3 text-lg md:text-xl title-font rounded-xl shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.2)] hover:translate-y-1 transition-all">🔑 LOG IN</button>
285:                     <p id="authError" class="text-red-600 text-center hidden"></p>
286:                 </div>
287:             </div>
288:         `;
289: 
290:         const showError = (msg) => {
291:             const el = document.getElementById('authError');
292:             if (el) { el.textContent = msg; el.classList.remove('hidden'); }
293:         };
294: 
295:         document.getElementById('loginBtn').addEventListener('click', async () => {
296:             const btn = document.getElementById('loginBtn');
297:             if (btn.disabled) return;
298:             const name = document.getElementById('authNameInput').value.trim();
299:             const password = document.getElementById('authPasswordInput').value;
300:             if (!name || !password) { showError('Please fill in all fields'); return; }
301:             btn.disabled = true;
302:             btn.textContent = '⏳ Signing in...';
303:             SoundFX.click();
304:             const result = await loginOrRegister(name, password, 'login');
305:             if (!result) { showError('Invalid name or password'); btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = '🔑 LOG IN'; }
306:         });
307: 
308:         document.getElementById('authPasswordInput').addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
309:             if (e.key === 'Enter') document.getElementById('loginBtn').click();
310:         });
311:     }
312: 
313:     function getGapFillHint(card) {
314:         const title = (card.title || '').toLowerCase();
315:         const content = card.content_data || {};
316: 
317:         if (title.includes('past') || title.includes('simple past')) {
318:             return '📝 Use Simple Past tense';
319:         } else if (title.includes('present perfect')) {
320:             return '📝 Use Present Perfect (have/has + past participle)';
321:         } else if (title.includes('modal') || title.includes('can') || title.includes('could') || title.includes('should') || title.includes('must')) {
322:             return '📝 Use a modal verb (can, could, should, must, might, etc.)';
323:         } else if (title.includes('future') || title.includes('will')) {
324:             return '📝 Use Future (will + base verb)';
325:         } else if (title.includes('continuous') || title.includes('progressive')) {
326:             return '📝 Use Continuous form (am/is/are/was/were + verb-ing)';
327:         } else if (title.includes('passive')) {
328:             return '📝 Use Passive voice (be + past participle)';
329:         } else if (title.includes('conditional')) {
330:             return '📝 Use Conditional (would/could/might + base verb)';
331:         } else if (content.sentence) {
332:             if (content.sentence.includes('yesterday') || content.sentence.includes('last week') || content.sentence.includes('ago')) {
333:                 return '📝 Hint: This happened in the past → use Simple Past';
334:             } else if (content.sentence.includes('tomorrow') || content.sentence.includes('next week')) {
335:                 return '📝 Hint: This will happen in the future → use Future (will)';
336:             } else if (content.sentence.includes('every day') || content.sentence.includes('usually') || content.sentence.includes('always')) {
337:                 return '📝 Hint: This is a habit/routine → use Simple Present';
338:             } else if (content.sentence.includes('now') || content.sentence.includes('right now')) {
339:                 return '📝 Hint: This is happening now → use Present Continuous';
340:             }
341:         }
342:         return '📝 Type the correct form of the verb in parentheses';
343:     }
344: 
345:     async function renderWelcomeScreen() {
346:         appEl.innerHTML = `<div class="whiteboard-card p-4 text-center screen-fade-in"><div class="loader mx-auto mb-2"></div><p>Loading card sets...</p></div>`;
347:         const sets = await loadCardSetsFromAPI();
348:         const randomSelected = (currentSet === null || isRandomMode);
349:         const setsHtml = `<option value="" ${randomSelected ? 'selected' : ''}>🎲 RANDOM MODE - All Sets</option>` +
350:             sets.map(s => `<option value="${s.id}" ${currentSet?.id == s.id && !randomSelected ? 'selected' : ''}>📚 ${escapeHtml(s.name)}</option>`).join('');
351: 
352:         const stats = await loadStats();
353: 
354:         const streakHtml = streakDays > 0
355:             ? `<div class="streak-badge">${streakDays} day${streakDays > 1 ? 's' : ''}</div>`
356:             : '';
357: 
358:         const html = `
359:             <div class="whiteboard-card p-4 md:p-6 shadow-2xl screen-fade-in">
360:                 <div class="text-center mb-4 md:mb-5">
361:                     <h1 class="text-2xl md:text-4xl text-blue-900 marker-underline"><span class="text-3xl md:text-4xl">🎓</span> Flashcard Studio <span class="text-xl md:text-2xl">✏️</span></h1>
362:                     <p class="text-gray-600 text-sm md:text-lg mt-1">spaced repetition · tap card to flip</p>
363:                 </div>
364:                 <div class="space-y-4 md:space-y-5">
365:                     <div class="md:grid md:grid-cols-2 md:gap-5">
366:                     <div class="marker-border p-4 md:p-5 bg-white/80">
367:                         <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-2 flex-wrap gap-2">
368:                             <label class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800 title-font">👤 Student</label>
369:                             <div class="flex gap-2 items-center">
370:                                 <span class="student-badge">✅ ${escapeHtml(currentStudent?.username || currentStudent?.name)}</span>
371:                                 <button id="editProfileBtn" class="text-xs text-blue-600 underline whitespace-nowrap">✏️ Edit</button>
372:                             </div>
373:                         </div>
374:                         <div class="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">📝 ${escapeHtml(currentStudent?.full_name || currentStudent?.username)}</div>
375:                         <div class="flex gap-4 mt-2 text-sm items-center flex-wrap">
376:                             <span>🎯 Level: <strong>${escapeHtml(currentStudent?.english_level || 'Beginner')}</strong></span>
377:                             ${streakHtml}
378:                             <a href="?logout=1" class="text-xs text-red-600 underline ml-auto">Logout</a>
379:                         </div>
380:                     </div>
381:                     ${stats ? `
382:                     <div class="marker-border p-4 md:p-5 bg-white/80">
383:                         <label class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800 mb-3 title-font">📈 Study Stats</label>
384:                         <div class="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-2 md:gap-3">
385:                             <div class="bg-blue-50 p-2 md:p-3 rounded-xl flex md:block items-center gap-2 md:gap-0">
386:                                 <div class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold text-blue-700">${stats.total_reviews}</div>
387:                                 <div class="text-2xs md:text-xs text-gray-600 whitespace-nowrap">Total Reviews</div>
388:                             </div>
389:                             <div class="bg-green-50 p-2 md:p-3 rounded-xl flex md:block items-center gap-2 md:gap-0">
390:                                 <div class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold text-green-700">${stats.correct_count}</div>
391:                                 <div class="text-2xs md:text-xs text-gray-600 whitespace-nowrap">Correct</div>
392:                             </div>
393:                             <div class="bg-red-50 p-2 md:p-3 rounded-xl flex md:block items-center gap-2 md:gap-0">
394:                                 <div class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold text-red-700">${stats.incorrect_count}</div>
395:                                 <div class="text-2xs md:text-xs text-gray-600 whitespace-nowrap">Incorrect</div>
396:                             </div>
397:                             <div class="bg-purple-50 p-2 md:p-3 rounded-xl flex md:block items-center gap-2 md:gap-0">
398:                                 <div class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold text-purple-700">${stats.learned_count}</div>
399:                                 <div class="text-2xs md:text-xs text-gray-600 whitespace-nowrap">Cards Learned</div>
400:                             </div>
401:                         </div>
402:                         <div class="mt-3">
403:                             <div class="flex justify-between text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">
404:                                 <span>📊 Learning Progress:</span>
405:                                 <span>${stats.learned_count}/${stats.total_cards}</span>
406:                             </div>
407:                             <div class="progress-bar-container" style="max-width:100%;">
408:                                 <div class="progress-bar-fill ${stats.progress < 100 ? 'progress-pulse' : ''}" style="width: ${stats.progress || 0}%"></div>
409:                                 <span class="pct-label">${stats.progress || 0}%</span>
410:                             </div>
411:                         </div>
412:                         ${stats.due_today > 0 ? `<button id="dueReviewBtn" class="text-2xs md:text-xs text-orange-600 mt-2 font-bold cursor-pointer hover:text-orange-800 underline" style="background:none;border:none;padding:0;font:inherit;">📅 ${stats.due_today} card${stats.due_today > 1 ? 's' : ''} due for review today!</button>` : ''}
413:                     </div>
414:                     ` : ''}
415:                     </div>
416:                     <div class="marker-border p-4 md:p-5 bg-white/80">
417:                         <label class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800 mb-2 title-font">📖 Card Set</label>
418:                         <select id="setSelect" class="w-full p-2 md:p-3 text-base md:text-lg border-2 rounded-xl bg-white">${setsHtml}</select>
419:                         <button id="refreshSetsBtn" class="mt-2 text-xs text-blue-600 underline">⟳ Refresh (show non-empty sets)</button>
420:                     </div>
421:                     <div class="whiteboard-card p-4 md:p-5">
422:                         <label class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800 mb-3 title-font">🎯 Difficulty Levels</label>
423:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-2">Leave unselected to auto-pick your level (${escapeHtml(currentStudent?.english_level || 'Beginner')})</p>
424:                         <div class="flex flex-nowrap gap-1 md:gap-4 justify-center">
425:                             ${['Beginner', 'Intermediate', 'Advanced'].map(lvl => `
426:                                 <button data-level="${lvl}" class="level-picker px-2 md:px-6 py-1 md:py-2 text-2xs md:text-xl rounded-full border-2 transition-all flex-1 md:flex-none ${selectedLevels.includes(lvl) ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white border-blue-800' : 'bg-white border-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-100'}">${lvl}</button>
427:                             `).join('')}
428:                         </div>
429:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-2">💡 Select levels, then click START to filter cards</p>
430:                     </div>
431:                     <button id="launchStudyBtn" class="w-full bg-blue-700 text-white py-3 md:py-4 text-xl md:text-2xl title-font rounded-xl shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.2)] hover:translate-y-1 transition-all">🚀 START STUDYING →</button>
432:                     <button id="switchStudentBtn" class="w-full text-gray-500 py-2 text-xs md:text-sm underline">↺ Switch student</button>
433:                 </div>
434:                 <div class="teacher-script mt-5 md:mt-6 p-2 md:p-3 text-center text-gray-500 text-xs md:text-sm bg-yellow-50 border border-yellow-200 rounded-lg">
435:                     💡 Tap any card to flip it! For multiple choice, tap your answer then flip to check.
436:                 </div>
437:             </div>
438:         `;
439:         appEl.innerHTML = html;
440: 
441:         document.querySelectorAll('.level-picker').forEach(btn => {
442:             btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
443:                 SoundFX.click();
444:                 const lvl = btn.getAttribute('data-level');
445:                 if (selectedLevels.includes(lvl)) {
446:                     selectedLevels = selectedLevels.filter(l => l !== lvl);
447:                     btn.classList.remove('bg-blue-600', 'text-white', 'border-blue-800');
448:                     btn.classList.add('bg-white', 'border-gray-400', 'hover:bg-gray-100');
449:                 } else {
450:                     selectedLevels.push(lvl);
451:                     btn.classList.add('bg-blue-600', 'text-white', 'border-blue-800');
452:                     btn.classList.remove('bg-white', 'border-gray-400', 'hover:bg-gray-100');
453:                 }
454:                 saveSessionState();
455:             });
456:         });
457: 
458:         document.getElementById('refreshSetsBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
459:             SoundFX.click();
460:             displayStatusMessage('Refreshing card sets (non-empty only)...', 'info');
461:             const freshSets = await loadCardSetsFromAPI();
462:             const selectEl = document.getElementById('setSelect');
463:             if (selectEl && freshSets.length) {
464:                 const randomSelectedNow = (currentSet === null || isRandomMode);
465:                 selectEl.innerHTML = '<option value="" ' + (randomSelectedNow ? 'selected' : '') + '>🎲 RANDOM MODE - All Sets</option>' +
466:                     freshSets.map(s => `<option value="${s.id}" ${currentSet?.id == s.id && !randomSelectedNow ? 'selected' : ''}>📚 ${escapeHtml(s.name)}</option>`).join('');
467:                 displayStatusMessage(`Loaded ${freshSets.length} card sets`, 'success');
468:             } else {
469:                 displayStatusMessage('No card sets with cards found!', 'warning');
470:             }
471:         });
472: 
473:         document.getElementById('launchStudyBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
474:             const launchBtn = document.getElementById('launchStudyBtn');
475:             if (launchBtn.disabled) return;
476:             launchBtn.disabled = true;
477:             SoundFX.click();
478:             const setSelect = document.getElementById('setSelect');
479:             const selectedValue = setSelect?.value;
480:             const randomMode = (selectedValue === "");
481:             let setId = null;
482:             if (!randomMode) setId = parseInt(selectedValue);
483: 
484:             const levelsToUse = selectedLevels.length > 0 ? selectedLevels : [];
485:             const studentLevel = currentStudent?.english_level || '';
486: 
487:             displayStatusMessage(randomMode ? 'Loading random cards from ALL sets...' : `Loading cards...`, 'info');
488: 
489:             isRandomMode = randomMode;
490:             currentSet = randomMode ? null : { id: setId };
491:             saveSessionState();
492: 
493:             if (!currentStudent) { if (launchBtn) launchBtn.disabled = false; displayStatusMessage('Not logged in', 'error'); return; }
494:             const cards = await loadCardsFromAPI(setId, levelsToUse, currentStudent.id, randomMode, studentLevel);
495:             if (!cards || cards.length === 0) {
496:                 if (allDueReviewed) {
497:                     currentCards = [];
498:                     currentIndex = 0;
499:                     currentView = 'study';
500:                     render();
501:                     return;
502:                 }
503:                 if (selectedLevels.length === 0) {
504:                     displayStatusMessage('No cards at your level. Trying all levels...', 'warning');
505:                     const fallback = await loadCardsFromAPI(setId, ['Beginner', 'Intermediate', 'Advanced'], currentStudent?.id, randomMode);
506:                     if (fallback && fallback.length > 0) {
507:                         currentCards = fallback;
508:                         currentIndex = 0;
509:                         currentView = 'study';
510:                         render();
511:                         return;
512:                     }
513:                 }
514:                 if (launchBtn) launchBtn.disabled = false;
515:                 alert('No cards found for the selected filters! Try different difficulty levels.');
516:                 return;
517:             }
518:             if (randomMode) {
519:                 for (let i = cards.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
520:                     const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
521:                     [cards[i], cards[j]] = [cards[j], cards[i]];
522:                 }
523:             }
524:             currentCards = cards;
525:             currentIndex = 0;
526:             currentView = 'study';
527:             render();
528:         });
529: 
530:         // dueReviewBtn is rendered dynamically, use event delegation
531:         document.getElementById('appRoot')?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
532:             if (e.target.id === 'dueReviewBtn') {
533:                 dueOnlyMode = true;
534:                 const setSelect = document.getElementById('setSelect');
535:                 if (setSelect) setSelect.value = '';
536:                 document.getElementById('launchStudyBtn')?.click();
537:             }
538:         });
539: 
540:         document.getElementById('switchStudentBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => clearStudent());
541:         document.getElementById('editProfileBtn')?.addEventListener('click', openEditProfileModal);
542:     }
543: 
544:     function openEditProfileModal() {
545:         const existing = document.getElementById('editProfileModal');
546:         if (existing) existing.remove();
547: 
548:         const modal = document.createElement('div');
549:         modal.id = 'editProfileModal';
550:         modal.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:1000;animation:fadeIn 0.2s;';
551:         modal.innerHTML = `
552:             <div class="whiteboard-card" style="max-width:400px;width:90%;padding:24px;">
553:                 <h3 class="text-lg marker-underline mb-3">✏️ Edit Profile</h3>
554:                 <div class="flex gap-2 mb-3">
555:                     <button id="saveProfileBtn" class="flex-1 bg-blue-700 text-white py-2 rounded-xl font-bold">💾 Save</button>
556:                     <button id="cancelProfileBtn" class="flex-1 bg-gray-300 text-gray-800 py-2 rounded-xl font-bold">Cancel</button>
557:                 </div>
558:                 <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Full Name:</label>
559:                 <input type="text" id="editProfileFullName" class="form-input w-full p-2 border-2 rounded-xl mb-3" value="${escapeHtml(currentStudent?.full_name || '')}">
560:                 <label class="block font-bold mb-1">English Level:</label>
561:                 <select id="editProfileLevel" class="form-select w-full p-2 border-2 rounded-xl mb-3 bg-white">
562:                     <option value="Beginner" ${currentStudent?.english_level === 'Beginner' ? 'selected' : ''}>🔰 Beginner</option>
563:                     <option value="Intermediate" ${currentStudent?.english_level === 'Intermediate' ? 'selected' : ''}>📚 Intermediate</option>
564:                     <option value="Advanced" ${currentStudent?.english_level === 'Advanced' ? 'selected' : ''}>🎓 Advanced</option>
565:                 </select>
566:                 <p id="editProfileError" class="text-red-600 text-center mt-2 hidden"></p>
567:             </div>
568:         `;
569:         document.body.appendChild(modal);
570: 
571:         document.getElementById('cancelProfileBtn').addEventListener('click', () => modal.remove());
572:         modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === modal) modal.remove(); });
573: 
574:         document.getElementById('saveProfileBtn').addEventListener('click', async () => {
575:             const fullName = document.getElementById('editProfileFullName').value.trim();
576:             const englishLevel = document.getElementById('editProfileLevel').value;
577: 
578:             const res = await apiCall('api/login.php', 'POST', {
579:                 action: 'update_profile',
580:                 user_id: currentStudent.id,
581:                 full_name: fullName,
582:                 english_level: englishLevel
583:             });
584:             if (res && res.success) {
585:                 currentStudent.full_name = fullName;
586:                 currentStudent.english_level = englishLevel;
587:                 modal.remove();
588:                 render();
589:             } else {
590:                 alert(res?.error || 'Error updating profile');
591:             }
592:         });
593:     }
594: 
595:     function renderCardFront(card) {
596:         const pattern = card.pattern_type;
597:         const data = card.content_data || {};
598:         const title = card.title || 'Flashcard';
599: 
600:         if (pattern === 'multiple_choice') {
601:             const options = data.options || ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C'];
602:             const gridClass = options.length > 3 ? 'grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-3' : 'space-y-3';
603:             return `
604:                 <div class="text-center">
605:                     <p class="text-lg mb-3 font-bold">❓ ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(card.question_text || 'Select the correct answer:'))}</p>
606:                     <div class="${gridClass}" id="mcqOptionsContainer">
607:                         ${options.map((opt, idx) => `<div class="quiz-option" data-idx="${idx}">${String.fromCharCode(65+idx)}. ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(opt))}</div>`).join('')}
608:                     </div>
609:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-2">👆 Tap your answer, then flip the card</p>
610:                 </div>
611:             `;
612:         } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill') {
613:             const sentence = data.sentence || 'Complete the sentence: ______';
614:             const hint = getGapFillHint(card);
615:             return `
616:                 <div class="text-center">
617:                     <p class="text-lg mb-1 font-bold">✏️ Complete the sentence:</p>
618:                     <p class="text-sm bg-gray-100 p-3 rounded-xl mb-1">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(sentence))}</p>
619:                     <div class="context-hint">${hint}</div>
620:                     <input type="text" id="gapFillInput" placeholder="Type your answer..." class="w-full p-2 text-sm border-2 rounded-xl mb-2" autocomplete="off">
621:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-1">👆 Type answer, then flip to check</p>
622:                 </div>
623:             `;
624:         } else if (pattern === 'image_description') {
625:             const imageUrl = data.image_url || '';
626:             const hasImage = imageUrl && (imageUrl.startsWith('http://') || imageUrl.startsWith('https://') || imageUrl.startsWith('uploads/'));
627:             return `
628:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full min-h-[200px]">
629:                     <h1 class="text-xl md:text-2xl text-center font-bold marker-underline mb-3">🖼️ ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h1>
630:                     ${hasImage ? `<img src="${escapeHtml(imageUrl)}" alt="${escapeHtml(title)}" class="max-h-48 md:max-h-64 rounded-xl shadow-md mb-2 object-contain" onerror="this.style.display='none'">` : `<div class="text-6xl mb-2">🖼️</div>`}
631:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-2">👆 Tap card to flip</p>
632:                 </div>
633:             `;
634:         } else if (pattern === 'audio_listening') {
635:             const audioUrl = data.audio_url || '';
636:             const hasAudio = audioUrl && (audioUrl.startsWith('http://') || audioUrl.startsWith('https://') || audioUrl.startsWith('uploads/'));
637:             const prompt = data.prompt || '';
638:             const isInteractive = !!(prompt || data.correct_answers);
639:             const isTranscription = !!data.transcript && !data.correct_answers;
640:             return `
641:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full min-h-[200px]">
642:                     <h1 class="text-xl md:text-2xl text-center font-bold marker-underline mb-3">🎧 ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h1>
643:                     ${hasAudio ? `<audio controls class="w-full max-w-xs mb-2" src="${escapeHtml(audioUrl)}">Your browser does not support audio.</audio>` : `<div class="text-6xl mb-2">🎧</div>`}
644:                     ${prompt ? `<p class="text-sm bg-gray-100 p-2 rounded-xl mb-1">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(prompt))}</p>` : ''}
645:                     ${isInteractive ? `<input type="text" id="gapFillInput" placeholder="${isTranscription ? 'Type what you hear...' : 'Type your answer...'}" class="w-full p-2 text-sm border-2 rounded-xl mb-2" autocomplete="off">` : ''}
646:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-1">👆 Tap card to flip${isInteractive ? ' after answering' : ''}</p>
647:                 </div>
648:             `;
649:         } else {
650:             return `
651:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full min-h-[200px]">
652:                     <h1 class="text-xl md:text-2xl md:text-3xl text-center font-bold marker-underline max-w-full break-words px-2">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h1>
653:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-3">👆 Tap card to flip</p>
654:                 </div>
655:             `;
656:         }
657:     }
658: 
659:     function renderCardBack(card, quizState) {
660:         const data = card.content_data || {};
661:         const pattern = card.pattern_type;
662:         const title = card.title || 'Flashcard';
663: 
664:         if (pattern === 'multiple_choice') {
665:             const options = data.options || ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C'];
666:             const correctIdx = data.correct_index !== undefined ? data.correct_index : 1;
667:             const correctAnswer = options[correctIdx];
668:             const selectedIdx = quizState?.selectedIdx;
669:             const isCorrect = (selectedIdx === correctIdx);
670:             const explanation = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.explanation || ''));
671: 
672:             return `
673:                 <div class="back-content">
674:                     <div class="text-center">
675:                         <h3 class="text-lg text-green-700 title-font marker-underline mb-2">✓ Answer</h3>
676:                         <div class="bg-green-50 p-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300 mb-2">
677:                             <p class="text-base font-bold">${String.fromCharCode(65+correctIdx)}. ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(correctAnswer))}</p>
678:                         </div>
679:                         ${selectedIdx !== null ? `
680:                         <div class="p-2 rounded-lg mb-2 ${isCorrect ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'}">
681:                             <p class="text-sm">${isCorrect ? '✅ Correct!' : `❌ Incorrect. The correct answer is ${String.fromCharCode(65+correctIdx)}.`}</p>
682:                         </div>
683:                         ` : ''}
684:                         ${explanation ? `<div class="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1 p-2 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">📝 ${explanation}</div>` : ''}
685:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">Rate your recall using the buttons below</p>
686:                     </div>
687:                 </div>
688:             `;
689:         } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill') {
690:             const correctAnswers = data.correct_answers || ['answer'];
691:             const userAnswer = quizState?.userAnswer || '';
692:             const isMatch = correctAnswers.some(ans => ans.toLowerCase() === userAnswer.toLowerCase());
693:             const example = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.example || ''));
694: 
695:             return `
696:                 <div class="back-content">
697:                     <div class="text-center">
698:                         <h3 class="text-lg text-green-700 title-font marker-underline mb-2">✓ Correct Answer</h3>
699:                         <div class="bg-green-50 p-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300 mb-2">
700:                             <p class="text-base font-bold">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(correctAnswers.join(' / ')))}</p>
701:                         </div>
702:                         ${userAnswer ? `
703:                         <div class="p-2 rounded-lg mb-2 ${isMatch ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'}">
704:                             <p class="text-sm">${isMatch ? '✅ Correct!' : `❌ Incorrect. Your answer: "${escapeHtml(userAnswer)}"`}</p>
705:                         </div>
706:                         ` : ''}
707:                         ${example ? `<div class="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1 p-2 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">📝 Example: ${example}</div>` : ''}
708:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">Rate your recall using the buttons below</p>
709:                     </div>
710:                 </div>
711:             `;
712:         } else if (pattern === 'image_description') {
713:             const description = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.description || 'No description'));
714:             return `
715:                 <div class="back-content">
716:                     <div class="text-center">
717:                         <h3 class="text-lg text-blue-700 title-font marker-underline mb-2">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h3>
718:                         <div class="card-definition bg-blue-50 p-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-300">
719:                             ${description}
720:                         </div>
721:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">Rate your recall using the buttons below</p>
722:                     </div>
723:                 </div>
724:             `;
725:         } else if (pattern === 'audio_listening') {
726:             const transcript = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.transcript || data.notes || ''));
727:             const correctAnswers = data.correct_answers || [];
728:             const userAnswer = quizState?.userAnswer || '';
729:             const isInteractive = !!(data.prompt || correctAnswers.length);
730:             let isMatch = false;
731:             if (userAnswer && correctAnswers.length) {
732:                 isMatch = correctAnswers.some(ans => ans.toLowerCase() === userAnswer.toLowerCase());
733:             } else if (userAnswer && data.transcript) {
734:                 isMatch = data.transcript.toLowerCase().trim() === userAnswer.toLowerCase().trim();
735:             }
736:             return `
737:                 <div class="back-content">
738:                     <div class="text-center">
739:                         <h3 class="text-lg text-green-700 title-font marker-underline mb-2">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h3>
740:                         ${transcript ? `<div class="card-definition bg-green-50 p-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300 mb-2">${transcript}</div>` : ''}
741:                         ${isInteractive && userAnswer ? `
742:                         <div class="p-2 rounded-lg mb-2 ${isMatch ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'}">
743:                             <p class="text-sm">${isMatch ? '✅ Correct!' : `❌ Your answer: "${escapeHtml(userAnswer)}"`}</p>
744:                         </div>
745:                         ` : isInteractive && !userAnswer ? `<p class="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-2">Type what you heard above, then flip.</p>` : ''}
746:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">Rate your recall using the buttons below</p>
747:                     </div>
748:                 </div>
749:             `;
750:         } else {
751:             const definition = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.definition || data.usage1 || 'No definition available'));
752:             const example = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.example1a || data.example || ''));
753: 
754:             return `
755:                 <div class="back-content">
756:                     <div class="text-center">
757:                         <h3 class="text-lg text-blue-700 title-font marker-underline mb-2">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h3>
758:                         <div class="card-definition bg-blue-50 p-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-300">
759:                             ${definition}
760:                         </div>
761:                         ${example ? `
762:                             <div class="mt-2 p-2 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg">
763:                                 <p class="text-sm"><strong>Example:</strong> ${example}</p>
764:                             </div>
765:                         ` : ''}
766:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">Rate your recall using the buttons below</p>
767:                     </div>
768:                 </div>
769:             `;
770:         }
771:     }
772: 
773:     function handleFlip(card, quizState, flashcardEl) {
774:         if (flashcardEl.classList.contains('flipped')) {
775:             flashcardEl.classList.remove('flipped');
776:             isFlipped = false;
777:             return;
778:         }
779: 
780:         const pattern = card.pattern_type;
781:         if (pattern === 'multiple_choice') {
782:             const selected = document.querySelector('#mcqOptionsContainer .quiz-option.selected');
783:             if (selected) {
784:                 quizState.selectedIdx = parseInt(selected.getAttribute('data-idx'));
785:                 quizState.answered = true;
786:             }
787:         } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill' || pattern === 'audio_listening') {
788:             const input = document.getElementById('gapFillInput');
789:             if (input) {
790:                 quizState.userAnswer = input.value.trim();
791:                 quizState.answered = true;
792:             }
793:         }
794: 
795:         SoundFX.flip();
796:         isFlipped = true;
797: 
798:         const backDiv = document.getElementById('cardBack');
799:         if (backDiv && quizState.answered) {
800:             backDiv.innerHTML = renderCardBack(card, quizState);
801:         } else if (backDiv && !quizState.answered && pattern !== 'usage_cases' && pattern !== 'deep_dive' && pattern !== 'formula_table' && pattern !== 'image_description' && pattern !== 'audio_listening') {
802:             backDiv.innerHTML = renderCardBack(card, quizState);
803:         }
804: 
805:         flashcardEl.classList.add('flipped');
806:     }
807: 
808:     function handleAutoFlip(card, quizState) {
809:         setTimeout(() => {
810:             if (!isFlipped) {
811:                 SoundFX.flip();
812:                 isFlipped = true;
813:                 const flashcardEl = document.getElementById('flashcardEl');
814:                 if (flashcardEl) {
815:                     const backDiv = document.getElementById('cardBack');
816:                     if (backDiv) backDiv.innerHTML = renderCardBack(card, quizState);
817:                     flashcardEl.classList.add('flipped');
818:                 }
819:             }
820:         }, 400);
821:     }
822: 
823:     function renderStudyScreen() {
824:         if (!currentCards.length || currentIndex >= currentCards.length) {
825:             const isAllDue = allDueReviewed;
826:             const msg = isAllDue
827:                 ? `<div class="text-5xl md:text-6xl mb-2 celebration-pop">🎉📚</div><h2 class="text-2xl md:text-3xl text-blue-800 marker-underline mb-2">All cards viewed!</h2><p class="text-sm md:text-base mb-3">You've seen all due cards for this set.<br>Try another set or come back later!</p>`
828:                 : `<div class="text-5xl md:text-6xl mb-2 celebration-pop">🏆✨</div><h2 class="text-2xl md:text-3xl text-green-800 marker-underline mb-2">All caught up!</h2><p class="text-sm md:text-base mb-3">Great job, ${escapeHtml(currentStudent?.username || currentStudent?.name || 'student')}!</p>`;
829:             appEl.innerHTML = `<div class="whiteboard-card p-4 md:p-8 text-center screen-fade-in">${msg}${streakDays > 1 ? `<div class="streak-badge text-lg my-3">${streakDays} day streak!</div>` : ''}<button id="backToWelcomeBtn" class="bg-gray-800 text-white px-4 md:px-6 py-1 md:py-2 text-base md:text-lg rounded-xl btn-chalk">← Back</button></div>`;
830:             document.getElementById('backToWelcomeBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => { currentView = 'welcome'; render(); });
831:             SoundFX.complete();
832:             if (!isAllDue) spawnConfetti(80);
833:             return;
834:         }
835: 
836:         currentCardObj = currentCards[currentIndex];
837:         const card = currentCardObj;
838:         const pattern = card.pattern_type || 'usage_cases';
839:         const progressPercent = ((currentIndex + 1) / currentCards.length) * 100;
840:         isFlipped = false;
841: 
842:         currentQuizState = { selectedIdx: null, userAnswer: '', answered: false, isCorrect: false };
843: 
844:         const html = `
845:             <div class="whiteboard-card p-3 md:p-4 screen-fade-in">
846:                 <div class="flex justify-between items-center flex-wrap gap-1 mb-2">
847:                     <div class="flex gap-2 items-center">
848:                         <span class="level-chip">${escapeHtml(card.level || 'Beginner')}</span>
849:                         <span class="text-xs text-gray-500">${currentIndex + 1}/${currentCards.length}</span>
850:                         ${streakDays > 0 ? `<span class="streak-badge" style="font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;">${streakDays}d</span>` : ''}
851:                     </div>
852:                     <div class="flex gap-2 items-center">
853:                         <span class="kb-hint">space</span>
854:                         <button id="flipCardBtn" class="flip-btn px-3 py-1 md:px-4 md:py-1 rounded-xl text-xs md:text-xs font-bold">🔄 FLIP</button>
855:                         ${currentStudent?.is_admin ? `<a href="admin_cards.php?focus_card=${card.id}&return_url=${encodeURIComponent(window.location.href)}" target="_blank" class="text-xs p-1 text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-800 font-bold" title="Edit this card">✏️</a>` : ''}
856:                         <button id="exitStudyBtn" class="text-red-600 font-bold bg-red-50 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs">Exit</button>
857:                     </div>
858:                 </div>
859:                 <div class="progress-bar-container mb-1" style="height:10px;">
860:                     <div class="progress-bar-fill" style="width: ${progressPercent}%"></div>
861:                     <span class="pct-label">${currentIndex + 1}/${currentCards.length}</span>
862:                 </div>
863:                 <div class="text-center mb-1 max-w-full overflow-hidden flex items-center justify-center gap-1 flex-nowrap">
864:                     <span class="text-sm md:text-lg text-gray-600 title-font font-bold truncate whitespace-nowrap overflow-hidden">📚 ${escapeHtml(card.set_name || '')}${card.title ? ` — ${escapeHtml(stripFormatTags(card.title))}` : ''}</span>
865:                 </div>
866:                 <div class="flashcard-container relative w-full" style="min-height: ${isMobile ? '340px' : '400px'};">
867:                     <div class="flashcard relative w-full" id="flashcardEl" style="min-height: ${isMobile ? '340px' : '400px'};">
868:                         <div class="card-front p-4 md:p-5 overflow-y-auto border-4 border-gray-700 shadow-xl" id="cardFront">
869:                             ${renderCardFront(card)}
870:                         </div>
871:                         <div class="card-back p-4 md:p-5 overflow-y-auto border-4 border-blue-300 shadow-xl" id="cardBack">
872:                             ${renderCardBack(card, currentQuizState)}
873:                         </div>
874:                     </div>
875:                 </div>
876:                 <div class="flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-1 md:gap-2 mt-2">
877:                     <button id="againBtn" class="bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white px-3 md:px-4 py-1 rounded-xl text-xs md:text-sm font-bold btn-chalk">${!isMobile ? '<span class="kb-hint" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);border-color:transparent;">1</span> ' : ''}Again <span class="text-2xs md:text-xs opacity-80">(${getIntervalPreview(card, 0)})</span></button>
878:                     <button id="goodBtn" class="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white px-3 md:px-4 py-1 rounded-xl text-xs md:text-sm font-bold btn-chalk">${!isMobile ? '<span class="kb-hint" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);border-color:transparent;">2</span> ' : ''}Good <span class="text-2xs md:text-xs opacity-80">(${getIntervalPreview(card, 2)})</span></button>

(Output capped at 50 KB. Showing lines 1-878. Use offset=879 to continue.)

1: (function () {
