```
19:     function escapeHtml(str) {
20:         if (!str) return '';
21:         const map = { '&': '&amp;', '<': '&lt;', '>': '&gt;', '"': '&quot;', "'": '&#39;' };
22:         return String(str).replace(/[&<>"']/g, m => map[m]);
23:     }
24: 
25:     function formatBreaks(text) {
26:         if (!text) return '';
27:         let s = String(text);
28:         s = s.replace(/\\\\/g, '\\');
29:         s = s.replace(/\\br ?/g, '<br>');
30:         s = s.replace(/\\b(.*?)\\b/g, '<b>$1</b>');
31:         s = s.replace(/\\i(.*?)\\i/g, '<i>$1</i>');
32:         s = s.replace(/\\u(.*?)\\u/g, '<u>$1</u>');
33:         s = s.replace(/\\em(.*?)\\em/g, '<em>$1</em>');
34:         s = s.replace(/\\strong(.*?)\\strong/g, '<strong>$1</strong>');
35:         return s;
36:     }
37: 
38:     async function loadCardSets() {
39:         const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=get_sets&t=' + Date.now(), {
40:             headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
41:         });
42:         const data = await response.json();
43:         if (data.success && data.sets) {
44:             const currentVal = setSelector.value;
45:             setSelector.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- Choose Card Set --</option>';
46:             data.sets.forEach(set => {
47:                 setSelector.innerHTML += `<option value="${set.id}">${escapeHtml(set.name)}</option>`;
48:             });
49:             if (currentVal) setSelector.value = currentVal;
50:         }
51:     }
52: 
53:     async function loadCards(setId) {
54:         if (!setId) {
55:             cardListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center text-gray-500 py-8">Select a card set to load cards</div>';
56:             return;
57:         }
58:         currentSetId = setId;
59: 
60:         const levels = [];
61:         if (document.getElementById('levelBeginner').checked) levels.push('Beginner');
62:         if (document.getElementById('levelIntermediate').checked) levels.push('Intermediate');
63:         if (document.getElementById('levelAdvanced').checked) levels.push('Advanced');
64: 
65:         const styles = [];
66:         if (document.getElementById('styleText').checked) styles.push('text');
67:         if (document.getElementById('styleMcq').checked) styles.push('mcq');
68:         if (document.getElementById('styleGap').checked) styles.push('gap');
69:         if (document.getElementById('styleImage').checked) styles.push('image');
70:         if (document.getElementById('styleAudio').checked) styles.push('audio');
71: 
72:         cardListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center py-8"><div class="loader"></div> Loading cards...</div>';
73: 
74:         const response = await fetch(`admin_cards.php?action=get_cards&set_id=${setId}&t=${Date.now()}`, {
75:             headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
76:         });
77:         const data = await response.json();
78:         if (data.success) {
79:             currentCards = data.cards;
80:             renderCardList(levels, styles);
81:         } else {
82:             cardListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center text-red-500 py-8">Error loading cards</div>';
83:         }
84:     }
85: 
86:     function getSearchTerm() {
87:         const input = document.getElementById('cardSearchInput');
88:         return input ? input.value.trim().toLowerCase() : '';
89:     }
90: 
91:     function getStyleClass(patternType) {
92:         if (patternType === 'multiple_choice') return 'mcq';
93:         if (patternType === 'gap_fill') return 'gap';
94:         if (patternType === 'image_description') return 'image';
95:         if (patternType === 'audio_listening') return 'audio';
96:         return 'text';
97:     }
98: 
99:     function renderCardList(levelFilter = [], styleFilter = []) {
100:         let filteredCards = currentCards;
101: 
102:         const searchTerm = getSearchTerm();
103:         if (searchTerm) {
104:             filteredCards = filteredCards.filter(card =>
105:                 (card.title || '').toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm)
106:             );
107:         }
108: 
109:         if (levelFilter.length > 0) {
110:             filteredCards = filteredCards.filter(card => levelFilter.includes(card.level));
111:         }
112: 
113:         if (styleFilter.length > 0) {
114:             filteredCards = filteredCards.filter(card => styleFilter.includes(getStyleClass(card.pattern_type)));
115:         }
116: 
117:         _filteredCardIds = filteredCards.map(c => c.id);
118: 
119:         if (!filteredCards.length) {
120:             cardListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center text-gray-500 py-8">No cards matching filter in this set</div>';
121:             return;
122:         }
123: 
124:         let html = '';
125:         filteredCards.forEach(card => {
126:             const isSelected = (selectedCardId === card.id);
127:             const typeClass = getStyleClass(card.pattern_type);
128:             const typeLabels = { mcq: 'MCQ', gap: 'Gap', image: 'Image', audio: 'Audio', text: 'Text' };
129:             const typeLabel = typeLabels[typeClass] || 'Text';
130:             html += `
131:                 <div class="card-item ${isSelected ? 'selected' : ''}" data-id="${card.id}">
132:                     <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
133:                         <span class="card-title">${escapeHtml(card.title || 'Untitled')}</span>
134:                         <span class="card-type ${typeClass}">${typeLabel}</span>
135:                     </div>
136:                     <div class="card-meta">${escapeHtml(card.level || 'Beginner')} · ID ${card.id}</div>
137:                     <button class="card-delete-btn" title="Delete card">&times;</button>
138:                 </div>
139:             `;
140:         });
141:         cardListContainer.innerHTML = html;
142: 
143:         document.querySelectorAll('.card-item').forEach(el => {
144:             el.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
145:                 if (e.target.classList.contains('card-delete-btn')) return;
146:                 const id = parseInt(el.dataset.id);
147:                 const card = currentCards.find(c => c.id === id);
148:                 if (card) loadCardIntoEditor(card);
149:                 document.querySelectorAll('.card-item').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('selected'));
150:                 el.classList.add('selected');
151:                 selectedCardId = id;
152:                 cardListContainer.focus({ preventScroll: true });
153:             });
154:         });
155: 
156:         document.querySelectorAll('.card-delete-btn').forEach(btn => {
157:             btn.addEventListener('click', async (e) => {
158:                 e.stopPropagation();
159:                 const el = btn.closest('.card-item');
160:                 const id = parseInt(el.dataset.id);
161:                 const card = currentCards.find(c => c.id === id);
162:                 const title = card ? card.title : 'this card';
163:                 if (!confirm(`Delete "${title}"? This cannot be undone.`)) return;
164:                 const response = await fetch(`admin_cards.php?action=delete_card&card_id=${id}`, {
165:                     headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
166:                 });
167:                 const result = await response.json();
168:                 if (result.success) {
169:                     if (selectedCardId === id) newCard();
170:                     if (setSelector.value) loadCards(setSelector.value);
171:                 } else {
172:                     alert('Error deleting card');
173:                 }
174:             });
175:         });
176: 
177:     }
178: 
179:     function loadCardIntoEditor(card) {
180:         currentEditingCard = card;
181:         editCardId.value = card.id;
182:         editTitle.value = card.title || '';
183:         editPatternType.value = card.pattern_type || 'usage_cases';
184:         editLevel.value = card.level || 'Beginner';
185:         if (editSetId) editSetId.value = card.set_id || 1;
186: 
187:         let contentData = card.content_data || {};
188:         if (typeof contentData === 'string') {
189:             try { contentData = JSON.parse(contentData); } catch (e) { contentData = {}; }
190:         }
191: 
192:         renderEditFields(card.pattern_type || 'usage_cases', contentData);
193:         updatePreviews();
194:     }
195: 
196:     function renderEditFields(patternType, contentData) {
197:         let html = '';
198: 
199:         if (patternType === 'multiple_choice') {
200:             const options = (contentData.options || ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C']).join(', ');
201:             const correctIdx = contentData.correct_index !== undefined ? contentData.correct_index : 1;
202:             html = `
203:                 <div class="mt-2">
204:                     <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Question Text:</label>
205:                     <input type="text" id="editQuestionText" class="form-input" value="${escapeHtml(contentData.question_text || '')}" placeholder="What is the question?">
206:                 </div>
207:                 <div>
208:                     <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Options (comma separated):</label>
209:                     <input type="text" id="editOptions" class="form-input" value="${escapeHtml(options)}" placeholder="Option A, Option B, Option C">
210:                     <div class="help-text">Example: Go, Goes, Going, Went</div>
211:                 </div>
212:                 <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
213:                     <div>
214:                         <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Correct Index (0,1,2...):</label>
215:                         <input type="number" id="editCorrectIndex" class="form-input" value="${correctIdx}" min="0">
216:                     </div>
217:                 </div>
218:                 <div>
219:                     <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Explanation (optional):</label>
220:                     <textarea id="editExplanation" class="form-textarea" rows="3" placeholder="Explain why this is correct...\brUse \br for line breaks">${escapeHtml(contentData.explanation || '')}</textarea>
221:                 </div>
222:             `;
223:         } else if (patternType === 'gap_fill') {
224:             const correctAnswers = (contentData.correct_answers || ['answer']).join(', ');
225:             html = `
226:                 <div class="mt-2">
227:                     <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Sentence with ______ (blank):</label>
228:                     <textarea id="editSentence" class="form-textarea" rows="3" placeholder="They ______ to school every day.\brI ______ (study) more for the test.">${escapeHtml(contentData.sentence || '')}</textarea>
229:                     <div class="help-text">Use ______ to indicate the blank space</div>
230:                 </div>
231:                 <div>
232:                     <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Correct Answer(s) (comma separated):</label>
233:                     <input type="text" id="editCorrectAnswers" class="form-input" value="${escapeHtml(correctAnswers)}" placeholder="go, goes">
234:                     <div class="help-text">Multiple possible answers: go, goes, went</div>
235:                 </div>
236:                 <div>
237:                     <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Example Sentence (optional):</label>
238:                     <textarea id="editExample" class="form-textarea" rows="2" placeholder="Example showing correct usage\brUse \br for line breaks">${escapeHtml(contentData.example || '')}</textarea>
239:                 </div>
240:             `;
241:         } else if (patternType === 'image_description') {
242:             html = `
243:                 <div class="mt-2">
244:                     <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Image URL:</label>
245:                     <div class="flex gap-2">
246:                         <input type="url" id="editImageUrl" class="form-input flex-1" value="${escapeHtml(contentData.image_url || '')}" placeholder="https://example.com/image.jpg">
247:                         <input type="file" id="editImageUpload" accept="image/jpeg,image/png,image/gif,image/webp" style="display:none">
248:                         <button type="button" id="editImageUploadBtn" class="px-3 py-1 bg-gray-200 rounded-xl text-xs hover:bg-gray-300 whitespace-nowrap">📁 Upload</button>
249:                     </div>
250:                     <div class="help-text">Paste a URL or upload a local image (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP)</div>
251:                 </div>
252:                 <div>
253:                     <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Description (shown on back):</label>
254:                     <textarea id="editDescription" class="form-textarea" rows="5" placeholder="Describe the image, what it shows, or what the student should learn from it...\brUse \br for line breaks">${escapeHtml(contentData.description || '')}</textarea>
255:                 </div>
256:             `;
257:         } else if (patternType === 'audio_listening') {
258:             html = `
259:                 <div class="mt-2">
260:                     <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Audio URL:</label>
261:                     <div class="flex gap-2">
262:                         <input type="url" id="editAudioUrl" class="form-input flex-1" value="${escapeHtml(contentData.audio_url || '')}" placeholder="https://example.com/audio.mp3">
263:                         <input type="file" id="editAudioUpload" accept="audio/mpeg,audio/wav,audio/ogg,audio/mp4" style="display:none">
264:                         <button type="button" id="editAudioUploadBtn" class="px-3 py-1 bg-gray-200 rounded-xl text-xs hover:bg-gray-300 whitespace-nowrap">📁 Upload</button>
265:                     </div>
266:                     <div class="help-text">Paste a URL or upload a local audio file (MP3, WAV, OGG)</div>
267:                 </div>
268:                 <div>
269:                     <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Prompt / Question (optional):</label>
270:                     <textarea id="editPrompt" class="form-textarea" rows="2" placeholder="Fill in the blank: I ______ to school every day.">${escapeHtml(contentData.prompt || '')}</textarea>
271:                     <div class="help-text">If empty, this works as a listening exercise. If filled, user types an answer.</div>
272:                 </div>
273:                 <div>
274:                     <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Correct Answer(s) (comma separated, optional):</label>
275:                     <input type="text" id="editCorrectAnswers" class="form-input" value="${escapeHtml((contentData.correct_answers || []).join(', '))}" placeholder="go, goes">
276:                     <div class="help-text">Leave empty for transcription mode (matches full transcript)</div>
277:                 </div>
278:                 <div>
279:                     <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Transcript / Notes (shown on back):</label>
280:                     <textarea id="editTranscript" class="form-textarea" rows="4" placeholder="Full transcript or notes about the audio...\brUse \br for line breaks">${escapeHtml(contentData.transcript || contentData.notes || '')}</textarea>
281:                 </div>
282:             `;
283:         } else {
284:             html = `
285:                 <div class="mt-2">
286:                     <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Definition / Description:</label>
287:                     <textarea id="editDefinition" class="form-textarea" rows="5" placeholder="Enter the definition or description...\brUse \br to create line breaks">${escapeHtml(contentData.definition || contentData.usage1 || '')}</textarea>
288:                 </div>
289:                 <div>
290:                     <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Example (optional):</label>
291:                     <textarea id="editExample" class="form-textarea" rows="3" placeholder="Example sentence showing usage\brUse \br for line breaks">${escapeHtml(contentData.example1a || contentData.example || '')}</textarea>
292:                 </div>
293:             `;
294:         }
295: 
296:         editFieldsContainer.innerHTML = html;
297:         setupUploadHandlers(patternType);
298:     }
299: 
300:     function setupUploadHandlers(patternType) {
301:         const btnId = patternType === 'image_description' ? 'editImageUploadBtn' : patternType === 'audio_listening' ? 'editAudioUploadBtn' : null;
302:         const fileId = patternType === 'image_description' ? 'editImageUpload' : patternType === 'audio_listening' ? 'editAudioUpload' : null;
303:         const urlId = patternType === 'image_description' ? 'editImageUrl' : patternType === 'audio_listening' ? 'editAudioUrl' : null;
304:         if (!btnId || !fileId || !urlId) return;
305: 
306:         const btn = document.getElementById(btnId);
307:         const fileInput = document.getElementById(fileId);
308:         const urlInput = document.getElementById(urlId);
309:         if (!btn || !fileInput || !urlInput) return;
310: 
311:         btn.addEventListener('click', () => fileInput.click());
312:         fileInput.addEventListener('change', async () => {
313:             const file = fileInput.files?.[0];
314:             if (!file) return;
315:             btn.textContent = '⏳ Uploading...';
316:             btn.disabled = true;
317:             try {
318:                 const fd = new FormData();
319:                 fd.append('type', patternType === 'image_description' ? 'image' : 'audio');
320:                 fd.append(patternType === 'image_description' ? 'image' : 'audio', file);
321:                 const res = await fetch('api/upload.php', { method: 'POST', body: fd });
322:                 const data = await res.json();
323:                 if (data.success) {
324:                     urlInput.value = data.url;
325:                     updatePreviews();
326:                 } else {
327:                     alert('Upload failed: ' + (data.error || 'Unknown error'));
328:                 }
329:             } catch (e) {
330:                 alert('Upload error: ' + e.message);
331:             }
332:             btn.textContent = '📁 Upload';
333:             btn.disabled = false;
334:             fileInput.value = '';
335:         });
336:         urlInput.addEventListener('blur', () => updatePreviews());
337:         urlInput.addEventListener('change', () => updatePreviews());
338:     }
339: 
340:     function getCurrentContentData() {
341:         const patternType = editPatternType.value;
342:         const contentData = {};
343: 
344:         if (patternType === 'multiple_choice') {
345:             const optionsInput = document.getElementById('editOptions');
346:             const options = optionsInput ? optionsInput.value.split(',').map(s => s.trim()) : ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C'];
347:             const correctIdx = document.getElementById('editCorrectIndex');
348:             contentData.options = options;
349:             contentData.correct_index = correctIdx ? parseInt(correctIdx.value) : 1;
350:             contentData.question_text = document.getElementById('editQuestionText')?.value || '';
351:             contentData.explanation = document.getElementById('editExplanation')?.value || '';
352:         } else if (patternType === 'gap_fill') {
353:             const answersInput = document.getElementById('editCorrectAnswers');
354:             contentData.sentence = document.getElementById('editSentence')?.value || '';
355:             contentData.correct_answers = answersInput ? answersInput.value.split(',').map(s => s.trim()) : ['answer'];
356:             contentData.example = document.getElementById('editExample')?.value || '';
357:         } else if (patternType === 'image_description') {
358:             contentData.image_url = document.getElementById('editImageUrl')?.value || '';
359:             contentData.description = document.getElementById('editDescription')?.value || '';
360:         } else if (patternType === 'audio_listening') {
361:             contentData.audio_url = document.getElementById('editAudioUrl')?.value || '';
362:             contentData.prompt = document.getElementById('editPrompt')?.value || '';
363:             contentData.transcript = document.getElementById('editTranscript')?.value || '';
364:             const answersInput = document.getElementById('editCorrectAnswers');
365:             const answers = answersInput ? answersInput.value.split(',').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean) : [];
366:             if (answers.length) contentData.correct_answers = answers;
367:         } else {
368:             contentData.definition = document.getElementById('editDefinition')?.value || '';
369:             contentData.example = document.getElementById('editExample')?.value || '';
370:         }
371: 
372:         return contentData;
373:     }
374: 
375:     function updatePreviews() {
376:         const patternType = editPatternType.value;
377:         const title = editTitle.value || 'Flashcard';
378:         const contentData = getCurrentContentData();
379: 
380:         let frontHtml = '';
381:         if (patternType === 'multiple_choice') {
382:             const options = contentData.options || ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C'];
383:             frontHtml = `
384:                 <div class="text-center">
385:                     <div class="text-4xl mb-3">❓</div>
386:                     <p class="text-lg mb-4 font-bold">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(contentData.question_text || 'Select the correct answer:'))}</p>
387:                     ${options.map((opt, idx) => `<div class="quiz-option-preview text-base">${String.fromCharCode(65+idx)}. ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(opt))}</div>`).join('')}
388:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-3">👆 Tap card to flip</p>
389:                 </div>
390:             `;
391:         } else if (patternType === 'gap_fill') {
392:             frontHtml = `
393:                 <div class="text-center">
394:                     <div class="text-4xl mb-3">✏️</div>
395:                     <p class="text-lg mb-4 font-bold">Complete the sentence:</p>
396:                     <p class="text-base bg-gray-100 p-3 rounded-xl">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(contentData.sentence || 'Complete: ______'))}</p>
397:                     <input type="text" placeholder="Type answer..." class="w-full p-2 text-base border-2 rounded-xl mt-3" disabled style="background:#f3f4f6">
398:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-3">👆 Tap card to flip</p>
399:                 </div>
400:             `;
401:         } else if (patternType === 'image_description') {
402:             const imgUrl = contentData.image_url || '';
403:             const hasImg = imgUrl && (imgUrl.startsWith('http://') || imgUrl.startsWith('https://') || imgUrl.startsWith('uploads/'));
404:             frontHtml = `
405:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[200px]">
406:                     <div class="text-4xl mb-2">🖼️</div>
407:                     <div class="text-center font-bold text-xl mb-2">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</div>
408:                     ${hasImg ? `<img src="${escapeHtml(imgUrl)}" alt="" class="max-h-32 rounded-lg shadow mb-2" onerror="this.style.display='none'">` : `<div class="text-gray-400 text-sm mb-2">(no image URL)</div>`}
409:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">👆 Tap card to flip</p>
410:                 </div>
411:             `;
412:         } else if (patternType === 'audio_listening') {
413:             const audUrl = contentData.audio_url || '';
414:             const hasAud = audUrl && (audUrl.startsWith('http://') || audUrl.startsWith('https://') || audUrl.startsWith('uploads/'));
415:             frontHtml = `
416:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[200px]">
417:                     <div class="text-4xl mb-2">🎧</div>
418:                     <div class="text-center font-bold text-xl mb-2">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</div>
419:                     ${hasAud ? `<audio controls class="w-full max-w-xs mb-2" src="${escapeHtml(audUrl)}"></audio>` : `<div class="text-gray-400 text-sm mb-2">(no audio URL)</div>`}
420:                     ${contentData.prompt ? `<p class="text-sm bg-gray-100 p-2 rounded-xl">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(contentData.prompt))}</p>` : ''}
421:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-3">👆 Tap card to flip</p>
422:                 </div>
423:             `;
424:         } else {
425:             frontHtml = `
426:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[200px]">
427:                     <div class="text-4xl text-center font-bold">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</div>
428:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-4">👆 Tap card to flip</p>
429:                 </div>
430:             `;
431:         }
432: 
433:         let backHtml = '';
434:         if (patternType === 'multiple_choice') {
435:             const options = contentData.options || ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C'];
436:             const correctIdx = contentData.correct_index || 1;
437:             backHtml = `
438:                 <div class="text-center">
439:                     <h3 class="text-xl text-green-700 marker-underline mb-3">✓ Answer</h3>
440:                     <div class="bg-green-50 p-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300 mb-3">
441:                         <p class="text-xl font-bold">${String.fromCharCode(65+correctIdx)}. ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(options[correctIdx] || 'Correct Answer'))}</p>
442:                     </div>
443:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-600">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(contentData.explanation || 'Explanation would appear here.'))}</p>
444:                 </div>
445:             `;
446:         } else if (patternType === 'gap_fill') {
447:             const answers = contentData.correct_answers || ['answer'];
448:             backHtml = `
449:                 <div class="text-center">
450:                     <h3 class="text-xl text-green-700 marker-underline mb-3">✓ Correct Answer</h3>
451:                     <div class="bg-green-50 p-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300">
452:                         <p class="text-xl font-bold">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(answers.join(' / ')))}</p>
453:                     </div>
454:                     ${contentData.example ? `<p class="text-md text-gray-600 mt-3">📝 Example: ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(contentData.example))}</p>` : ''}
455:                 </div>
456:             `;
457:         } else if (patternType === 'image_description') {
458:             backHtml = `
459:                 <div class="text-center">
460:                     <h3 class="text-2xl text-blue-700 marker-underline mb-3">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h3>
461:                     <div class="bg-blue-50 p-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-300">
462:                         <p class="text-lg">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(contentData.description || 'Description'))}</p>
463:                     </div>
464:                 </div>
465:             `;
466:         } else if (patternType === 'audio_listening') {
467:             const transcript = contentData.transcript || contentData.notes || '';
468:             backHtml = `
469:                 <div class="text-center">
470:                     <h3 class="text-xl text-green-700 marker-underline mb-3">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h3>
471:                     ${transcript ? `<div class="bg-green-50 p-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300 mb-3"><p class="text-lg">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(transcript))}</p></div>` : `<p class="text-gray-400">Transcript not provided</p>`}
472:                 </div>
473:             `;
474:         } else {
475:             backHtml = `
476:                 <div class="text-center">
477:                     <h3 class="text-2xl text-blue-700 marker-underline mb-3">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h3>
478:                     <div class="bg-blue-50 p-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-300">
479:                         <p class="text-lg">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(contentData.definition || 'Definition would appear here.'))}</p>
480:                     </div>
481:                     ${contentData.example ? `<p class="text-md text-gray-600 mt-3">📝 Example: ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(contentData.example))}</p>` : ''}
482:                 </div>
483:             `;
484:         }
485: 
486:         frontPreviewContent.innerHTML = frontHtml;
487:         backPreviewContent.innerHTML = backHtml;
488:     }
489: 
490:     async function saveCard() {
491:         const patternType = editPatternType.value;
492:         const contentData = getCurrentContentData();
493: 
494:         const cardData = {
495:             id: parseInt(editCardId.value) || 0,
496:             set_id: editSetId ? parseInt(editSetId.value) : (parseInt(setSelector.value) || 1),
497:             title: editTitle.value,
498:             pattern_type: patternType,
499:             level: editLevel.value,
500:             question_text: patternType === 'multiple_choice' ? contentData.question_text : '',
501:             content_data: contentData
502:         };
503: 
504:         const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=save_card', {
505:             method: 'POST',
506:             headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' },
507:             body: JSON.stringify(cardData)
508:         });
509:         const result = await response.json();
510:         if (result.success) {
511:             alert('Card saved successfully!');
512:             if (setSelector.value) loadCards(setSelector.value);
513:             if (result.id && (!editCardId.value || editCardId.value == 0)) {
514:                 editCardId.value = result.id;
515:             }
516:         } else {
517:             alert('Error saving card');
518:         }
519:     }
520: 
521:     async function deleteCard() {
522:         const cardId = parseInt(editCardId.value);
523:         if (!cardId) {
524:             alert('No card selected to delete');
525:             return;
526:         }
527:         if (confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this card? This action cannot be undone.')) {
528:             const response = await fetch(`admin_cards.php?action=delete_card&card_id=${cardId}`, {
529:                 headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
530:             });
531:             const result = await response.json();
532:             if (result.success) {
533:                 alert('Card deleted successfully!');
534:                 newCard();
535:                 if (setSelector.value) loadCards(setSelector.value);
536:             } else {
537:                 alert('Error deleting card');
538:             }
539:         }
540:     }
541: 
542:     function newCard() {
543:         editCardId.value = '0';
544:         editTitle.value = '';
545:         editPatternType.value = 'usage_cases';
546:         editLevel.value = 'Beginner';
547:         if (editSetId) editSetId.value = setSelector.value || '1';
548:         renderEditFields('usage_cases', {});
549:         updatePreviews();
550:         selectedCardId = null;
551:         document.querySelectorAll('.card-item').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('selected'));
552:     }
553: 
554:     function revertCard() {
555:         if (selectedCardId && currentEditingCard) {
556:             loadCardIntoEditor(currentEditingCard);
557:         } else {
558:             newCard();
559:         }
560:     }
561: 
562:     const cardEditorSection = document.getElementById('cardEditorSection');
563:     const userManagementSection = document.getElementById('userManagementSection');
564:     const userListContainer = document.getElementById('userListContainer');
565: 
566:     function showCardEditor() {
567:         if (cardEditorSection) cardEditorSection.classList.remove('hidden');
568:         if (userManagementSection) userManagementSection.classList.add('hidden');
569:     }
570: 
571:     function showUserManagement() {
572:         if (cardEditorSection) cardEditorSection.classList.add('hidden');
573:         if (userManagementSection) userManagementSection.classList.remove('hidden');
574:         loadUsers();
575:     }
576: 
577:     async function loadUsers() {
578:         if (!userListContainer) return;
579:         userListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center py-4"><div class="loader"></div> Loading users...</div>';
580: 
581:         const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=get_users&t=' + Date.now(), {
582:             headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
583:         });
584:         const data = await response.json();
585:         if (data.success && data.users) {
586:             renderUsers(data.users);
587:         } else {
588:             userListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center text-red-500 py-4">Error loading users</div>';
589:         }
590:     }
591: 
592:     function renderUsers(users) {
593:         if (!users.length) {
594:             userListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center text-gray-500 py-4">No users found</div>';
595:             return;
596:         }
597: 
598:         let html = '<table class="users-table">';
599:         html += '<tr><th>Name</th><th>Username</th><th>Role</th><th>Progress</th><th>Level</th><th>Actions</th></tr>';
600:         users.forEach(user => {
601:             html += `<tr>
602:                 <td>${escapeHtml(user.full_name || user.username)}</td>
603:                 <td>${escapeHtml(user.username)}</td>
604:                 <td>${user.is_admin ? '<span class="card-type mcq">Admin</span>' : '<span class="card-type text">Student</span>'}</td>
605:                 <td>${user.progress || 0}%</td>
606:                 <td>${escapeHtml(user.english_level || 'Beginner')}</td>
607:                 <td>
608:                     <button class="edit-user-btn btn btn-primary btn-xs" data-id="${user.id}" data-username="${escapeHtml(user.username)}" data-fullname="${escapeHtml(user.full_name || '')}" data-level="${escapeHtml(user.english_level || 'Beginner')}" data-admin="${user.is_admin}">✏️</button>
609:                     <button class="reset-user-btn btn btn-warning btn-xs" data-id="${user.id}">🔄</button>
610:                     <button class="delete-user-btn btn btn-danger btn-xs" data-id="${user.id}">🗑</button>
611:                 </td>
612:             </tr>`;
613:         });
614:         html += '</table>';
615: 
616:         userListContainer.innerHTML = html;
617: 
618:         document.querySelectorAll('.edit-user-btn').forEach(btn => {
619:             btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
620:                 openEditUserModal(btn.dataset);
621:             });
622:         });
623: 
624:         document.querySelectorAll('.delete-user-btn').forEach(btn => {
625:             btn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
626:                 const userId = parseInt(btn.dataset.id);
627:                 if (confirm('Delete this user? This action cannot be undone.')) {
628:                     const response = await fetch(`admin_cards.php?action=delete_user&user_id=${userId}`, {
629:                         headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
630:                     });
631:                     const result = await response.json();
632:                     if (result.success) {
633:                         loadUsers();
634:                     } else {
635:                         alert(result.error || 'Error deleting user');
636:                     }
637:                 }
638:             });
639:         });
640: 
641:         document.querySelectorAll('.reset-user-btn').forEach(btn => {
642:             btn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
643:                 const userId = parseInt(btn.dataset.id);
644:                 if (confirm('Reset all progress for this user? This will clear review history and progress.')) {
645:                     const response = await fetch(`admin_cards.php?action=reset_user_progress&user_id=${userId}`, {
646:                         headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
647:                     });
648:                     const result = await response.json();
649:                     if (result.success) {
650:                         alert('Progress reset successfully');
651:                         loadUsers();
652:                     } else {
653:                         alert(result.error || 'Error resetting progress');
654:                     }
655:                 }
656:             });
657:         });
658:     }
659: 
660:     function openEditUserModal(data) {
661:         const existing = document.getElementById('editUserModal');
662:         if (existing) existing.remove();
663: 
664:         const modal = document.createElement('div');
665:         modal.id = 'editUserModal';
666:         modal.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:1000;';
667:         modal.innerHTML = `
668:             <div class="whiteboard-card" style="max-width:500px;width:90%;padding:24px;max-height:80vh;overflow-y:auto;">
669:                 <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
670:                     <h3 class="text-lg marker-underline">✏️ Edit User</h3>
671:                     <div class="flex gap-2">
672:                         <button id="saveEditUserBtn" class="btn btn-success">💾 Save</button>
673:                         <button id="cancelEditUserBtn" class="btn btn-secondary">Cancel</button>
674:                     </div>
675:                 </div>
676:                 <p id="editUserError" class="text-red-600 text-center mt-2 hidden" style="display:none"></p>
677:                 <input type="hidden" id="editUserId" value="${data.id}">
678:                 <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Username:</label>
679:                 <input type="text" id="editUserUsername" class="form-input" value="${data.username}" maxlength="30">
680:                 <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Full Name:</label>
681:                 <input type="text" id="editUserFullName" class="form-input" value="${data.fullname}">
682:                 <label class="block font-bold mb-1">English Level:</label>
683:                 <select id="editUserLevel" class="form-select">
684:                     <option value="Beginner" ${data.level === 'Beginner' ? 'selected' : ''}>🔰 Beginner</option>
685:                     <option value="Intermediate" ${data.level === 'Intermediate' ? 'selected' : ''}>📚 Intermediate</option>
686:                     <option value="Advanced" ${data.level === 'Advanced' ? 'selected' : ''}>🎓 Advanced</option>
687:                 </select>
688:                 <label class="flex items-center gap-2 my-2">
689:                     <input type="checkbox" id="editUserIsAdmin" value="1" ${data.admin === 'true' || data.admin === '1' ? 'checked' : ''}>
690:                     <span class="font-bold">Admin privileges</span>
691:                 </label>
692:                 <div class="mt-3 mb-2">
693:                     <label class="block font-bold mb-1">📚 Visible Card Sets:</label>
694:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-2">Leave all unchecked to show all sets</p>
695:                     <div id="userSetAccessContainer" class="space-y-1">
696:                         <div class="text-sm text-gray-400">Loading sets...</div>
697:                     </div>
698:                 </div>
699:             </div>
700:         `;
701:         document.body.appendChild(modal);
702: 
703:         document.getElementById('cancelEditUserBtn').addEventListener('click', () => modal.remove());
704:         modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === modal) modal.remove(); });
705: 
706:         const saveBtn = document.getElementById('saveEditUserBtn');
707:         (async () => {
708:             const [setsRes, accessRes] = await Promise.all([
709:                 fetch('admin_cards.php?action=get_sets&t=' + Date.now(), { headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' } }),
710:                 fetch(`admin_cards.php?action=get_user_sets&user_id=${data.id}&t=${Date.now()}`, { headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' } })
711:             ]);
712:             const setsData = await setsRes.json();
713:             const accessData = await accessRes.json();
714:             const allSets = setsData.success ? setsData.sets : [];
715:             const userSetIds = accessData.success ? accessData.set_ids : [];
716:             const container = document.getElementById('userSetAccessContainer');
717:             if (allSets.length === 0) {
718:                 container.innerHTML = '<div class="text-sm text-gray-400">No card sets available</div>';
719:             } else {
720:                 container.innerHTML = allSets.map(set => `
721:                     <label class="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm cursor-pointer">
722:                         <input type="checkbox" class="user-set-checkbox" value="${set.id}" ${userSetIds.includes(set.id) ? 'checked' : ''}>
723:                         ${escapeHtml(set.name)}
724:                     </label>
725:                 `).join('');
726:             }
727:         })().then(() => {
728:             saveBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
729:                 const id = parseInt(document.getElementById('editUserId').value);
730:                 const username = document.getElementById('editUserUsername').value.trim();
731:                 const fullName = document.getElementById('editUserFullName').value.trim();
732:                 const englishLevel = document.getElementById('editUserLevel').value;
733:                 const isAdmin = document.getElementById('editUserIsAdmin').checked;
734: 
735:                 if (!username) { alert('Username is required'); return; }
736: 
737:                 const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=update_user', {
738:                     method: 'POST',
739:                     headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' },
740:                     body: JSON.stringify({ id, username, full_name: fullName, english_level: englishLevel, is_admin: isAdmin })
741:                 });
742:                 const result = await response.json();
743:                 if (!result.success) { alert(result.error || 'Error saving user'); return; }
744: 
745:                 const checkedSets = [...document.querySelectorAll('.user-set-checkbox:checked')].map(cb => parseInt(cb.value));
746:                 await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=set_user_sets', {
747:                     method: 'POST',
748:                     headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' },
749:                     body: JSON.stringify({ user_id: id, set_ids: checkedSets })
750:                 });
751: 
752:                 modal.remove();
753:                 loadUsers();
754:             });
755:         });
756:     }
757: 
758:     async function createUser() {
759:         const username = document.getElementById('newUserUsername')?.value.trim();
760:         const fullName = document.getElementById('newUserFullName')?.value.trim();
761:         const password = document.getElementById('newUserPassword')?.value;
762:         const englishLevel = document.getElementById('newUserLevel')?.value || 'Beginner';
763:         const isAdmin = document.getElementById('newUserIsAdmin')?.checked || false;
764: 
765:         if (!username) { alert('Username is required'); return; }
766:         if (!password || password.length < 6) { alert('Password must be at least 6 characters'); return; }
767: 
768:         const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=create_user', {
769:             method: 'POST',
770:             headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' },
771:             body: JSON.stringify({ username, full_name: fullName, password, english_level: englishLevel, is_admin: isAdmin })
772:         });
773:         const result = await response.json();
774:         if (result.success) {
775:             alert('User created successfully!');
776:             document.getElementById('newUserUsername').value = '';
777:             document.getElementById('newUserFullName').value = '';
778:             document.getElementById('newUserPassword').value = '';
779:             document.getElementById('newUserLevel').value = 'Beginner';
780:             document.getElementById('newUserIsAdmin').checked = false;
781:             loadUsers();
782:         } else {
783:             alert(result.error || 'Error creating user');
784:         }
785:     }
786: 
787:     setSelector.addEventListener('change', () => {
788:         if (setSelector.value) {
789:             loadCards(setSelector.value);
790:             newCard();
791:         } else {
792:             cardListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center text-gray-500 py-8">Select a card set to load cards</div>';
793:         }
794:     });
795: 
796:     cardListContainer.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
797:         if (e.key !== 'ArrowDown' && e.key !== 'ArrowUp') return;
798:         e.preventDefault();
799:         const items = this.querySelectorAll('.card-item');
800:         if (items.length === 0) return;
801:         const cur = this.querySelector('.card-item.selected');
802:         const curIdx = cur ? [...items].indexOf(cur) : -1;
803:         let nextIdx;
804:         if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') {
805:             nextIdx = curIdx < items.length - 1 ? curIdx + 1 : 0;
806:         } else {
807:             nextIdx = curIdx > 0 ? curIdx - 1 : items.length - 1;
808:         }
809:         items[nextIdx].click();
810:         items[nextIdx].scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' });
811:     });
812: 
813:     const importRecordsContainer = document.getElementById('importRecordsContainer');
814:     if (importRecordsContainer) {
815:         importRecordsContainer.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
816:             if (e.key !== 'ArrowDown' && e.key !== 'ArrowUp') return;
817:             e.preventDefault();
818:             const rows = importPreviewBody.querySelectorAll('tr');
819:             if (rows.length === 0) return;
820:             const cur = this.querySelector('tr.selected');
821:             const curIdx = cur ? [...rows].indexOf(cur) : -1;
822:             let nextIdx;
823:             if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') {
824:                 nextIdx = curIdx < rows.length - 1 ? curIdx + 1 : 0;
825:             } else {
826:                 nextIdx = curIdx > 0 ? curIdx - 1 : rows.length - 1;
827:             }
828:             selectImportRow(parseInt(rows[nextIdx].dataset.idx));
829:             rows[nextIdx].scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' });
830:         });
831:     }
832: 
833:     editPatternType.addEventListener('change', () => {
834:         const currentContent = getCurrentContentData();
835:         renderEditFields(editPatternType.value, currentContent);
836:         updatePreviews();
837:     });
838: 
839:     editTitle.addEventListener('input', () => updatePreviews());
840: 
841:     document.getElementById('saveCardBtn').addEventListener('click', saveCard);
842:     document.getElementById('revertCardBtn').addEventListener('click', revertCard);
843:     document.getElementById('newCardBtn').addEventListener('click', newCard);
844:     document.getElementById('deleteCardBtn').addEventListener('click', deleteCard);
845:     document.getElementById('filterCardsBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
846:         if (setSelector.value) loadCards(setSelector.value);

848: 
849:     const searchInput = document.getElementById('cardSearchInput');
850:     if (searchInput) {
851:         let searchTimeout;
852:         searchInput.addEventListener('input', () => {
853:             clearTimeout(searchTimeout);
854:             searchTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
855:                 const levels = [];
856:                 if (document.getElementById('levelBeginner').checked) levels.push('Beginner');
857:                 if (document.getElementById('levelIntermediate').checked) levels.push('Intermediate');
858:                 if (document.getElementById('levelAdvanced').checked) levels.push('Advanced');
859:                 const styles = [];

862:                 if (document.getElementById('styleGap').checked) styles.push('gap');
863:                 if (document.getElementById('styleImage').checked) styles.push('image');
864:                 if (document.getElementById('styleAudio').checked) styles.push('audio');
865:                 renderCardList(levels, styles);
866:             }, 200);
867:         });
868:     }
869: 
870:     setInterval(() => {
871:         if (document.activeElement && (document.activeElement.classList?.contains('form-input') ||
872:             document.activeElement.classList?.contains('form-textarea'))) {
873:             updatePreviews();
874:         }
875:     }, 500);
876:
```

```
879:                     <button id="easyBtn" class="bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white px-3 md:px-4 py-1 rounded-xl text-xs md:text-sm font-bold btn-chalk">${!isMobile ? '<span class="kb-hint" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);border-color:transparent;">3</span> ' : ''}Easy <span class="text-2xs md:text-xs opacity-80">(${getIntervalPreview(card, 3)})</span></button>
880:                 </div>
881:                 <p class="text-center text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">💡 Tap card or press <span class="kb-hint">Space</span> to flip · <span class="kb-hint">1</span><span class="kb-hint">2</span><span class="kb-hint">3</span> to rate</p>
882:             </div>
883:         `;
884:         appEl.innerHTML = html;
885: 
886:         const flashcard = document.getElementById('flashcardEl');
887: 
888:         function flipHandler() {
889:             handleFlip(card, currentQuizState, flashcard);
890:         }
891: 
892:         document.getElementById('flipCardBtn')?.addEventListener('click', flipHandler);
893: 
894:         flashcard?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
895:             if (e.target.closest('.quiz-option') || e.target.closest('#gapFillInput') || e.target.closest('.btn-chalk') || e.target.closest('#flipCardBtn')) {
896:                 return;
897:             }
898:             flipHandler();
899:         });
900: 
901:         if (pattern === 'multiple_choice') {
902:             const options = document.querySelectorAll('#mcqOptionsContainer .quiz-option');
903:             options.forEach(opt => {
904:                 opt.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
905:                     e.stopPropagation();
906:                     SoundFX.click();
907:                     options.forEach(o => o.classList.remove('selected'));
908:                     opt.classList.add('selected');
909:                     currentQuizState.selectedIdx = parseInt(opt.getAttribute('data-idx'));
910:                     currentQuizState.answered = true;
911:                     handleAutoFlip(card, currentQuizState);
912:                 });
913:             });
914:         }
915: 
916:         if (pattern === 'gap_fill') {
917:             const input = document.getElementById('gapFillInput');
918:             if (input) {
919:                 input.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
920:                     if (e.key === 'Enter') {
921:                         e.preventDefault();
922:                         currentQuizState.userAnswer = input.value.trim();
923:                         currentQuizState.answered = true;
924:                         handleAutoFlip(card, currentQuizState);
925:                     }
926:                 });
927:             }
928:         }
929: 
930:         document.getElementById('exitStudyBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => { currentView = 'welcome'; render(); });
931: 
932:         const handleReview = async (quality) => {
933:             SoundFX.click();
934:             let wasCorrect = false;
935:             if (pattern === 'multiple_choice') {
936:                 const correctIdx = card.content_data?.correct_index ?? 1;
937:                 wasCorrect = (currentQuizState.selectedIdx === correctIdx);
938:             } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill') {
939:                 const correctAnswers = card.content_data?.correct_answers || ['answer'];
940:                 wasCorrect = correctAnswers.some(ans => ans.toLowerCase() === currentQuizState.userAnswer.toLowerCase());
941:             } else if (pattern === 'audio_listening') {
942:                 const correctAnswers = card.content_data?.correct_answers || [];
943:                 const transcript = card.content_data?.transcript || '';
944:                 const userAnswer = currentQuizState?.userAnswer || '';
945:                 if (correctAnswers.length) {
946:                     wasCorrect = correctAnswers.some(ans => ans.toLowerCase() === userAnswer.toLowerCase());
947:                 } else if (transcript) {
948:                     wasCorrect = transcript.toLowerCase().trim() === userAnswer.toLowerCase().trim();
949:                 } else {
950:                     wasCorrect = true;
951:                 }
952:             } else {
953:                 wasCorrect = true;
954:             }
955: 
956:             if (wasCorrect) SoundFX.correct();
957:             else SoundFX.incorrect();
958: 
959:             if (!currentStudent) { displayStatusMessage('Not logged in', 'error'); return; }
960:             const res = await recordReview(card.id, currentStudent.id, quality, wasCorrect);
961:             if (res?.streak_days !== undefined) streakDays = res.streak_days;
962:             currentIndex++;
963:             render();
964:         };
965: 
966:         document.getElementById('againBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => handleReview(0));
967:         document.getElementById('goodBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => handleReview(2));
968:         document.getElementById('easyBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => handleReview(3));
969:     }
970: 
971:     // Global keyboard shortcuts
972:     document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
973:         if (e.target.tagName === 'INPUT' || e.target.tagName === 'TEXTAREA' || e.target.tagName === 'SELECT') return;
974:         if (e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey || e.altKey) return;
975: 
976:         if (currentView === 'study') {
977:             switch (e.key) {
978:                 case ' ':
979:                     e.preventDefault();
980:                     const flipBtn = document.getElementById('flipCardBtn');
981:                     if (flipBtn) {
982:                         flipBtn.click();
983:                     } else if (!document.getElementById('flashcardEl')?.classList.contains('flipped')) {
984:                         const el = document.getElementById('flashcardEl');
985:                         if (el && currentCardObj) handleFlip(currentCardObj, currentQuizState, el);
986:                     }
987:                     break;
988:                 case '1':
989:                     document.getElementById('againBtn')?.click();
990:                     break;
991:                 case '2':
992:                     document.getElementById('goodBtn')?.click();
993:                     break;
994:                 case '3':
995:                     document.getElementById('easyBtn')?.click();
996:                     break;
997:                 case 'Escape':
998:                     document.getElementById('exitStudyBtn')?.click();
999:                     break;
1000:             }
1001:         } else if (currentView === 'welcome') {
1002:             if (e.key === 'Enter') {
1003:                 document.getElementById('launchStudyBtn')?.click();
1004:             }
1005:         }
1006:     });
1007: 
1008:     loadSavedData();
1009:     render();
1010: })();

(End of file - total 1010 lines)
</content>
```

```
<path>/home/leonardo/Documents/Personal/Inglês/Aulas/materialLeo/ankiCards/flashcards/import/import_cards.php</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: <?php
2: /**
3:  * CSV Importer for Flashcard System
4:  * - Reads card_sets.csv and cards.csv
5:  * - Inserts records into database using src/ classes
6:  */
7: 
8: header('Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8');
9: 
10: require_once __DIR__ . '/../src/Database.php';
11: 
12: $setsFile = __DIR__ . '/card_sets.csv';
13: $cardsFile = __DIR__ . '/cards.csv';
14: 
15: echo '<!DOCTYPE html>
16: <html>
17: <head>
18:     <title>CSV Importer</title>
19:     <style>
20:         body { font-family: monospace; background: #f1f5f9; padding: 20px; }
21:         .container { max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; background: white; border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; }
22:         .success { color: #16a34a; background: #dcfce7; padding: 8px 12px; margin: 4px 0; border-left: 4px solid #16a34a; }
23:         .error { color: #dc2626; background: #fee2e2; padding: 8px 12px; margin: 4px 0; border-left: 4px solid #dc2626; }
24:         .info { color: #2563eb; background: #dbeafe; padding: 8px 12px; margin: 4px 0; border-left: 4px solid #2563eb; }
25:         .warning { color: #d97706; background: #fef3c7; padding: 8px 12px; margin: 4px 0; border-left: 4px solid #d97706; }
26:         h1 { color: #1e293b; }
27:         hr { margin: 20px 0; }
28:     </style>
29: </head>
30: <body>
31: <div class="container">
32:     <h1>📥 CSV Importer for Flashcard System</h1>
33:     <hr>
34: ';
35: 
36: function display($msg, $type = 'info') {
37:     echo "<div class='$type'>$msg</div>";
38:     flush();
39: }
40: 
41: try {
42:     $pdo = Database::getConnection();
43:     display("✅ Connected to database", 'success');
44: } catch (PDOException $e) {
45:     display("❌ Connection failed: " . $e->getMessage(), 'error');
46:     exit;
47: }
48: 
49: // ============ IMPORT CARD SETS ============
50: display("📚 Importing card sets from: card_sets.csv", 'info');
51: 
52: if (!file_exists($setsFile)) {
53:     display("❌ File not found: card_sets.csv", 'error');
54: } else {
55:     $handle = fopen($setsFile, 'r');
56:     if ($handle === false) {
57:         display("❌ Could not open file: card_sets.csv", 'error');
58:     } else {
59:         $header = fgetcsv($handle, 0, ',', '"', '\\');
60:         display("Header columns: " . implode(', ', $header), 'info');
61: 
62:         $inserted = 0;
63:         $skipped = 0;
64: 
65:         while (($row = fgetcsv($handle, 0, ',', '"', '\\')) !== false) {
66:             if (count($row) < 3) continue;
67: 
68:             $id = $row[0];
69:             $name = $row[1];
70:             $description = $row[2] ?? '';
71: 
72:             $stmt = $pdo->prepare("SELECT id FROM card_sets WHERE id = ? OR name = ?");
73:             $stmt->execute([$id, $name]);
74:             if ($stmt->fetch()) {
75:                 display("⏭️ Skipped (exists): ID $id - $name", 'warning');
76:                 $skipped++;
77:                 continue;
78:             }
79: 
80:             try {
81:                 $stmt = $pdo->prepare("INSERT INTO card_sets (id, name, description) VALUES (?, ?, ?)");
82:                 $stmt->execute([$id, $name, $description]);
83:                 display("✅ Inserted: ID $id - $name", 'success');
84:                 $inserted++;
85:             } catch (PDOException $e) {
86:                 display("❌ Error: " . $e->getMessage(), 'error');
87:             }
88:         }
89:         fclose($handle);
90:         display("📊 Card sets: $inserted inserted, $skipped skipped", 'info');
91:     }
92: }
93: 
94: // ============ IMPORT CARDS ============
95: display("<hr>📇 Importing cards from: cards.csv", 'info');
96: 
97: if (!file_exists($cardsFile)) {
98:     display("❌ File not found: cards.csv", 'error');
99: } else {
100:     $handle = fopen($cardsFile, 'r');
101:     if ($handle === false) {
102:         display("❌ Could not open file: cards.csv", 'error');
103:     } else {
104:         $header = fgetcsv($handle, 0, ',', '"', '\\');
105:         display("Header columns: " . implode(', ', $header), 'info');
106: 
107:         $inserted = 0;
108:         $skipped = 0;
109:         $errors = 0;
110:         $lineNum = 1;
111: 
112:         while (($row = fgetcsv($handle, 0, ',', '"', '\\')) !== false) {
113:             $lineNum++;
114:             if (count($row) < 6) {
115:                 display("⚠️ Line $lineNum: Skipped (only " . count($row) . " columns)", 'warning');
116:                 $skipped++;
117:                 continue;
118:             }
119: 
120:             $set_id = $row[0];
121:             $title = $row[1];
122:             $pattern_type = $row[2];
123:             $level = $row[3];
124:             $question_text = $row[4];
125:             $content_data = $row[5];
126: 
127:             if (!json_decode($content_data)) {
128:                 $content_data = str_replace("'", '"', $content_data);
129:                 if (!json_decode($content_data)) {
130:                     display("⚠️ Line $lineNum: Invalid JSON for '{$title}'", 'warning');
131:                     $errors++;
132:                     continue;
133:                 }
134:             }
135: 
136:             $stmt = $pdo->prepare("SELECT id FROM cards WHERE set_id = ? AND title = ?");
137:             $stmt->execute([$set_id, $title]);
138:             if ($stmt->fetch()) {
139:                 $skipped++;
140:                 continue;
141:             }
142: 
143:             try {
144:                 $stmt = $pdo->prepare("INSERT INTO cards (set_id, title, pattern_type, level, question_text, content_data) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)");
145:                 $stmt->execute([$set_id, $title, $pattern_type, $level, $question_text, $content_data]);
146:                 $inserted++;
147:                 if ($inserted % 100 == 0) {
148:                     display("📈 Progress: $inserted cards inserted...", 'info');
149:                 }
150:             } catch (PDOException $e) {
151:                 display("❌ Error on line $lineNum: " . $e->getMessage(), 'error');
152:                 $errors++;
153:             }
154:         }
155:         fclose($handle);
156:         display("<hr>📊 Final results: $inserted inserted, $skipped skipped, $errors errors", 'info');
157:     }
158: }
159: 
160: // ============ VERIFICATION ============
161: display("<hr>🔍 Verification", 'info');
162: $setCount = $pdo->query("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM card_sets")->fetchColumn();
163: $cardCount = $pdo->query("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cards")->fetchColumn();
164: display("📊 Database now has: $setCount card sets and $cardCount cards", 'success');
165: 
166: echo '</div></body></html>';

(End of file - total 166 lines)
</content>
```

```
74: if ($isAjax && isset($_GET['action'])) {

84:         if ($action === 'preview_csv') {

86:                 echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'CSV file required']);

88:             }
89:             $handle = fopen($_FILES['csv']['tmp_name'], 'r');
90:             if (!$handle) {
91:                 echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Cannot read file']);
92:                 exit;
93:             }
94:             $header = fgetcsv($handle);
95:             if (!$header) {
96:                 fclose($handle);
97:                 echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Empty CSV']);
98:                 exit;
99:             }
100:             $header = array_map('trim', $header);

105:             $rows = [];

221:             Review::setAccessibleSets($userId, $setIds);
222:             echo json_encode(['success' => true]);
223:         } else {
224:             echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid action']);
225:         }
226:     } catch (Exception $e) {
227:         echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => $e->getMessage()]);
228:     }
229: 
230:     exit;
231: }
232: 
233: if (!$isLoggedIn) {
234:     if (isset($dbError) && $needsSetup) {
235:         $setupError = $dbError;
236:     } elseif (isset($dbError)) {
237:         $loginError = $dbError;
238:     }
239:     if ($needsSetup) {
240:         require __DIR__ . '/src/templates/admin_setup.php';
241:     } else {
242:         require __DIR__ . '/src/templates/admin_login.php';
243:     }
244:     exit;
245: }
246: 
247: $dbConnected = Database::testConnection();
248: $cardSets = $dbConnected ? CardSet::getAll() : [];
249: ?>
```
