1215:     async function loadCsvPreview(file) {
1216:         importFileHandle = file;
1217:         importFileName.textContent = file.name;
1218: 
1219:         const formData = new FormData();
1220:         formData.append('csv', file);
1221: 
1222:         importPreviewBody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="7" class="text-center py-4"><div class="loader"></div> Parsing CSV...</td></tr>';
1223: 
1224:         try {
1225:             const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=preview_csv&t=' + Date.now(), {
1226:                 method: 'POST',
1227:                 body: formData,
1228:                 headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
1229:             });
1230:             const result = await response.json();
1231: 
1232:             if (!result.success) {
1233:                 alert('❌ ' + (result.error || 'Failed to parse CSV'));
1234:                 return;
1235:             }
1236: 
1237:             importHeader = result.header || [];
1238:             importRows = (result.rows || []).map(row => {
1239:                 const levelMap = {
1240:                     'beginner': 'Beginner', 'a1': 'Beginner', 'a2': 'Beginner',
1241:                     'intermediate': 'Intermediate', 'b1': 'Intermediate', 'b2': 'Intermediate',
1242:                     'advanced': 'Advanced', 'c1': 'Advanced', 'c2': 'Advanced',
1243:                 };
1244:                 let level = (row.level || 'Beginner').trim();
1245:                 level = levelMap[level.toLowerCase()] || level;
1246:                 let type = (row.type || 'usage_cases').trim().toLowerCase();
1247:                 const validTypes = ['usage_cases', 'deep_dive', 'formula_table', 'multiple_choice', 'gap_fill', 'image_description', 'audio_listening'];
1248:                 if (!validTypes.includes(type)) type = 'usage_cases';
1249:                 return {
1250:                     ...row,
1251:                     _setName: (row.set || '').trim(),
1252:                     _selected: true,
1253:                     type: type,
1254:                     level: level,
1255:                 };
1256:             });
1257: 
1258:             importRowCount.textContent = `(${result.total} rows)`;
1259:             renderImportPreview();
1260:             importStepFile.classList.add('hidden');
1261:             importStepPreview.classList.remove('hidden');
1262: 
1263:         } catch (err) {
1264:             alert('❌ Network error during CSV preview');
1265:         }
1266:     }
1267: 
1268:     function renderImportPreview() {
1269:         const styleLabels = {
1270:             usage_cases: '📘 Usage Cases',
1271:             deep_dive: '🧠 Deep Dive',
1272:             formula_table: '📐 Formula Table',
1273:             multiple_choice: '❓ MCQ',
1274:             gap_fill: '✏️ Gap Fill',
1275:             image_description: '🖼️ Image Description',
1276:             audio_listening: '🎧 Audio Listening',
1277:         };
1278: 
1279:         let selectedCount = 0;
1280:         let html = '';
1281:         importRows.forEach((row, idx) => {
1282:             const isSelected = idx === importSelectedIdx;
1283:             const style = row.type || 'usage_cases';
1284:             const title = row.title || 'Untitled';
1285:             const level = row.level || 'Beginner';
1286:             const setName = row._setName || '';
1287:             const preview = row.definition || row.question_text || row.sentence || '';
1288:             const previewTrim = preview.length > 60 ? preview.substring(0, 60) + '...' : preview;
1289:             const styleClass = style === 'multiple_choice' ? 'mcq' : (style === 'gap_fill' ? 'gap' : (style === 'image_description' ? 'image' : (style === 'audio_listening' ? 'audio' : 'text')));
1290:             const checked = row._selected !== false;
1291:             if (checked) selectedCount++;
1292: 
1293:             html += `<tr class="${isSelected ? 'selected' : ''} ${!checked ? 'dimmed' : ''}" data-idx="${idx}">
1294:                 <td><input type="checkbox" class="import-row-checkbox" data-idx="${idx}" ${checked ? 'checked' : ''}></td>
1295:                 <td class="text-gray-400 text-xs">${idx + 1}</td>
1296:                 <td>${escapeHtml(setName)}</td>
1297:                 <td><span class="card-type ${styleClass}">${styleLabels[style] || style}</span></td>
1298:                 <td class="import-row-title">${escapeHtml(title)}</td>
1299:                 <td><span class="text-xs bg-gray-100 px-2 py-0.5 rounded">${escapeHtml(level)}</span></td>
1300:                 <td class="text-gray-500 text-xs">${escapeHtml(previewTrim)}</td>
1301:             </tr>`;
1302:         });
1303: 
1304:         importPreviewBody.innerHTML = html;
1305:         updateImportRowCount(selectedCount);
1306: 
1307:         // Row click (excluding checkbox clicks)
1308:         importPreviewBody.querySelectorAll('tr').forEach(tr => {
1309:             tr.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
1310:                 if (e.target.type === 'checkbox') return;
1311:                 const idx = parseInt(tr.dataset.idx);
1312:                 selectImportRow(idx);
1313:                 const container = document.getElementById('importRecordsContainer');
1314:                 if (container) container.focus({ preventScroll: true });
1315:             });
1316:         });
1317: 
1318:         // Checkbox toggle
1319:         importPreviewBody.querySelectorAll('.import-row-checkbox').forEach(cb => {
1320:             cb.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
1321:                 const idx = parseInt(e.target.dataset.idx);
1322:                 if (idx >= 0 && idx < importRows.length) {
1323:                     importRows[idx]._selected = e.target.checked;
1324:                 }
1325:                 renderImportPreview();
1326:                 if (importSelectedIdx >= 0) selectImportRow(importSelectedIdx);
1327:                 updateImportSelectAll();
1328:             });
1329:         });
1330: 
1331:         if (importRows.length > 0 && importSelectedIdx < 0) {
1332:             selectImportRow(0);
1333:         } else if (importSelectedIdx >= 0 && importSelectedIdx < importRows.length) {
1334:             renderImportCardPreview(importRows[importSelectedIdx]);
1335:         }
1336:     }
1337: 
1338:     function updateImportRowCount(selectedCount) {
1339:         const total = importRows.length;
1340:         importRowCount.textContent = selectedCount === total
1341:             ? `(${total} rows)`
1342:             : `(${selectedCount}/${total} selected)`;
1343:     }
1344: 
1345:     function updateImportSelectAll() {
1346:         if (!importSelectAll) return;
1347:         const allChecked = importRows.every(r => r._selected !== false);
1348:         importSelectAll.checked = allChecked;
1349:         importSelectAll.indeterminate = !allChecked && importRows.some(r => r._selected !== false);
1350:     }
1351: 
1352:     function selectImportRow(idx) {
1353:         if (idx < 0 || idx >= importRows.length) return;
1354:         importSelectedIdx = idx;
1355:         const row = importRows[idx];
1356: 
1357:         importEditTitle.value = row.title || '';
1358:         importEditStyle.value = row.type || 'usage_cases';
1359:         importEditLevel.value = row.level || 'Beginner';
1360: 
1361:         // Try to determine the best set_id from _setName
1362:         const setName = row._setName || '';
1363:         let matchedSetId = '';
1364:         if (setName) {
1365:             const options = importEditSetId.options;
1366:             for (let i = 0; i < options.length; i++) {
1367:                 if (options[i].text === setName) {
1368:                     matchedSetId = options[i].value;
1369:                     break;
1370:                 }
1371:             }
1372:         }
1373:         importEditSetId.value = matchedSetId || '';
1374: 
1375:         // Content fields
1376:         const def = row.definition || row.question_text || row.sentence || '';
1377:         let extra;
1378:         if (row.type === 'gap_fill') {
1379:             extra = row.correct_answer || row.example1 || '';
1380:         } else if (row.type === 'multiple_choice') {
1381:             extra = row.explanation || row.example1 || '';
1382:         } else {
1383:             extra = row.example1 || row.usage1 || row.tip || '';
1384:         }
1385: 
1386:         importEditDefinition.value = def;
1387:         importEditExtra.value = extra;
1388: 
1389:         // Type-specific fields
1390:         if (row.type === 'multiple_choice') {
1391:             if (importEditOpt1) importEditOpt1.value = row.opt1 || '';
1392:             if (importEditOpt2) importEditOpt2.value = row.opt2 || '';
1393:             if (importEditOpt3) importEditOpt3.value = row.opt3 || '';
1394:             if (importEditOpt4) importEditOpt4.value = row.opt4 || '';
1395:             if (importEditCorrectIdx) importEditCorrectIdx.value = row.correct_answer || '0';
1396:         }
1397:         updateImportEditorFields();
1398:         importPreviewBody.querySelectorAll('tr').forEach(tr => {
1399:             tr.classList.toggle('selected', parseInt(tr.dataset.idx) === idx);
1400:         });
1401: 
1402:         renderImportCardPreview(row);
1403:     }
1404: 
1405:     function openImportTestCardModal() {
1406:         if (importSelectedIdx < 0 || !importRows[importSelectedIdx]) {
1407:             alert('Select a row first');
1408:             return;
1409:         }
1410:         const row = importRows[importSelectedIdx];
1411:         const pattern = row.type || 'usage_cases';
1412:         const contentData = {};
1413: 
1414:         if (pattern === 'multiple_choice') {
1415:             const opts = [row.opt1, row.opt2, row.opt3, row.opt4].filter(Boolean);
1416:             contentData.options = opts.length ? opts : ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C'];
1417:             contentData.correct_index = parseInt(row.correct_answer) || 0;
1418:             contentData.question_text = row.question_text || row.definition || 'Select the correct answer:';
1419:             contentData.explanation = row.explanation || '';
1420:         } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill') {
1421:             contentData.sentence = row.sentence || row.definition || 'Complete: ______';
1422:             contentData.correct_answers = (row.correct_answer || 'answer').split(',').map(s => s.trim());
1423:             contentData.example = row.example1 || '';
1424:         } else if (pattern === 'image_description') {
1425:             contentData.image_url = row.image_url || '';
1426:             contentData.description = row.description || row.definition || 'No description';
1427:         } else if (pattern === 'audio_listening') {
1428:             contentData.audio_url = row.audio_url || '';
1429:             contentData.prompt = row.prompt || row.question_text || '';
1430:             contentData.transcript = row.transcript || row.correct_answer || '';
1431:             if (row.correct_answer && !row.transcript) {
1432:                 contentData.correct_answers = row.correct_answer.split(',').map(s => s.trim());
1433:             }
1434:         } else {
1435:             contentData.definition = row.definition || row.question_text || 'No definition';
1436:             contentData.usage1 = row.usage1 || '';
1437:             contentData.example1a = row.example1 || '';
1438:             contentData.tip = row.tip || '';
1439:         }
1440: 
1441:         openTestCardModal({
1442:             title: row.title || 'Flashcard',
1443:             pattern_type: pattern,
1444:             question_text: pattern === 'multiple_choice' ? (contentData.question_text || '') : '',
1445:             content_data: contentData,
1446:         });
1447:     }
1448: 
1449:     function updateRowFromEditor(idx) {
1450:         if (idx < 0 || idx >= importRows.length) return;
1451:         const row = importRows[idx];
1452:         row.title = importEditTitle.value;
1453:         row.type = importEditStyle.value;
1454:         row.level = importEditLevel.value;
1455: 
1456:         const setId = importEditSetId.value;
1457:         const setName = importEditSetId.options[importEditSetId.selectedIndex]?.text || '';
1458:         if (setId) {
1459:             row._setName = setName;
1460:             row.set_id = setId;
1461:         } else {
1462:             row._setName = '';
1463:             row.set_id = '';
1464:         }
1465: 
1466:         row.definition = importEditDefinition.value;
1467:         row.question_text = importEditDefinition.value;
1468:         row.sentence = importEditDefinition.value;
1469: 
1470:         const extra = importEditExtra.value;
1471:         if (row.type === 'gap_fill') {
1472:             row.correct_answer = extra;
1473:         } else if (row.type === 'multiple_choice') {
1474:             row.question_text = importEditDefinition.value;
1475:             row.opt1 = importEditOpt1 ? importEditOpt1.value : '';
1476:             row.opt2 = importEditOpt2 ? importEditOpt2.value : '';
1477:             row.opt3 = importEditOpt3 ? importEditOpt3.value : '';
1478:             row.opt4 = importEditOpt4 ? importEditOpt4.value : '';
1479:             row.correct_answer = importEditCorrectIdx ? importEditCorrectIdx.value : '0';
1480:         } else if (row.type === 'image_description') {
1481:             row.image_url = importEditDefinition.value;
1482:             row.description = extra;
1483:         } else if (row.type === 'audio_listening') {
1484:             row.audio_url = importEditDefinition.value;
1485:             row.transcript = extra;
1486:             row.correct_answer = extra;
1487:         } else {
1488:             row.example1 = extra;
1489:             row.tip = extra;
1490:             row.usage1 = extra;
1491:         }
1492:     }
1493: 
1494:     function renderImportCardPreview(row) {
1495:         if (!importCardPreview || !row) { resetImportCardPreview(); return; }
1496:         const style = row.type || 'usage_cases';
1497:         const title = row.title || 'Flashcard';
1498:         const definition = row.definition || row.question_text || row.sentence || '';
1499:         let extra;
1500:         if (style === 'gap_fill') {
1501:             extra = row.correct_answer || '';
1502:         } else if (style === 'multiple_choice') {
1503:             extra = row.correct_answer || row.tip || '';
1504:         } else {
1505:             extra = row.example1 || row.usage1 || row.tip || '';
1506:         }
1507:         const example = row.example1 || row.usage1 || row.tip || '';
1508: 
1509:         let frontHtml = '';
1510:         let backHtml = '';
1511: 
1512:         if (style === 'multiple_choice') {
1513:             const opts = [row.opt1, row.opt2, row.opt3, row.opt4].filter(Boolean);
1514:             const correctIdx = parseInt(row.correct_answer) || 0;
1515:             const correctText = opts[correctIdx] || extra;
1516:             frontHtml = `
1517:                 <div class="text-center">
1518:                     <div class="text-3xl mb-1">❓</div>
1519:                     <p class="text-lg font-bold">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</p>
1520:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(definition || 'Select the correct answer:'))}</p>
1521:                     <div class="mt-2 text-left text-xs space-y-1">
1522:                         ${opts.map((o, i) => `<div class="bg-gray-100 p-1.5 rounded ${i === correctIdx ? 'ring-2 ring-green-400' : ''}">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(o))}</div>`).join('')}
1523:                     </div>
1524:                 </div>
1525:             `;
1526:             backHtml = `
1527:                 <div class="text-center">
1528:                     <div class="text-base text-green-700 marker-underline mb-1">✓ Correct Answer</div>
1529:                     <div class="bg-green-50 p-2 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300">
1530:                         <p class="text-base font-bold">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(correctText))}</p>
1531:                     </div>
1532:                 </div>
1533:             `;
1534:         } else if (style === 'gap_fill') {
1535:             frontHtml = `
1536:                 <div class="text-center">
1537:                     <div class="text-3xl mb-1">✏️</div>
1538:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Complete the sentence:</p>
1539:                     <p class="text-sm bg-gray-100 p-2 rounded-lg">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(definition || 'Complete: ______'))}</p>
1540:                 </div>
1541:             `;
1542:             backHtml = `
1543:                 <div class="text-center">
1544:                     <div class="text-base text-green-700 marker-underline mb-1">✓ Correct</div>
1545:                     <div class="bg-green-50 p-2 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300">
1546:                         <p class="text-base font-bold">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(extra || 'Answer'))}</p>
1547:                     </div>
1548:                     ${example ? `<p class="text-xs text-gray-600 mt-1">📝 ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(example))}</p>` : ''}
1549:                 </div>
1550:             `;
1551:         } else if (style === 'image_description') {
1552:             const imageUrl = row.image_url || '';
1553:             const description = row.description || definition || 'Description';
1554:             frontHtml = `
1555:                 <div class="text-center">
1556:                     <div class="text-3xl mb-1">🖼️</div>
1557:                     <p class="text-sm font-bold">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</p>
1558:                     ${imageUrl ? `<img src="${escapeHtml(imageUrl)}" alt="${escapeHtml(title)}" class="mx-auto mt-2 max-h-32 rounded-lg border" onerror="this.alt='Image not found'" />` : `<div class="mx-auto mt-2 w-24 h-24 bg-gray-200 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400 text-xs">No image</div>`}
1559:                 </div>
1560:             `;
1561:             backHtml = `
1562:                 <div class="text-center">
1563:                     <div class="text-base text-blue-700 marker-underline mb-1">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</div>
1564:                     <div class="bg-blue-50 p-2 rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-300">
1565:                         <p class="text-sm">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(description))}</p>
1566:                     </div>
1567:                 </div>
1568:             `;
1569:         } else if (style === 'audio_listening') {
1570:             const transcript = row.transcript || row.correct_answer || '';
1571:             const prompt = row.question_text || definition || 'Listen and answer:';
1572:             frontHtml = `
1573:                 <div class="text-center">
1574:                     <div class="text-3xl mb-1">🎧</div>
1575:                     <p class="text-sm font-bold">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</p>
1576:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(prompt))}</p>
1577:                 </div>
1578:             `;
1579:             backHtml = `
1580:                 <div class="text-center">
1581:                     <div class="text-base text-green-700 marker-underline mb-1">✓ Transcript</div>
1582:                     <div class="bg-green-50 p-2 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300">
1583:                         <p class="text-sm">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(transcript || 'Transcript not provided'))}</p>
1584:                     </div>
1585:                 </div>
1586:             `;
1587:         } else {
1588:             frontHtml = `
1589:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center">
1590:                     <div class="text-2xl text-center font-bold">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</div>
1591:                 </div>
1592:             `;
1593:             backHtml = `
1594:                 <div class="text-center">
1595:                     <div class="text-base text-blue-700 marker-underline mb-1">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</div>
1596:                     <div class="bg-blue-50 p-2 rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-300">
1597:                         <p class="text-sm">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(definition || 'Definition'))}</p>
1598:                     </div>
1599:                     ${example ? `<p class="text-xs text-gray-600 mt-1">📝 ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(example))}</p>` : ''}
1600:                 </div>
1601:             `;
1602:         }
1603: 
1604:         importCardPreview.innerHTML = `
1605:             <div class="import-flip-front">${frontHtml}</div>
1606:             <div class="import-flip-back">${backHtml}</div>
1607:         `;
1608:     }
1609: 
1610:     document.getElementById('importApplyCardBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
1611:         if (importSelectedIdx < 0) { alert('Select a row first'); return; }
1612:         updateRowFromEditor(importSelectedIdx);
1613:         renderImportPreview();
1614:         selectImportRow(importSelectedIdx);
1615:     });
1616: 
1617:     document.getElementById('importDeleteCardBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
1618:         if (importSelectedIdx < 0) { alert('Select a row first'); return; }
1619:         if (!confirm('Remove this row from import?')) return;
1620:         importRows.splice(importSelectedIdx, 1);
1621:         importSelectedIdx = -1;
1622:         renderImportPreview();
1623:         if (importRows.length > 0) selectImportRow(0);
1624:     });
1625: 
1626:     document.getElementById('importTestCardBtn')?.addEventListener('click', openImportTestCardModal);
1627: 
1628:     // Create new set from mapping bar
1629:     document.getElementById('importCreateSetBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
1630:         const name = importNewSetName.value.trim();
1631:         if (!name) { alert('Enter a set name'); return; }
1632:         const descInput = document.getElementById('importNewSetDesc');
1633:         const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=create_set', {
1634:             method: 'POST',
1635:             headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' },
1636:             body: JSON.stringify({ name, description: descInput ? descInput.value.trim() : '' })
1637:         });
1638:         const result = await response.json();
1639:         if (result.success) {
1640:             // Refresh both selectors
1641:             const setsRes = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=get_sets&t=' + Date.now(), {
1642:                 headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
1643:             });
1644:             const setsData = await setsRes.json();
1645:             if (setsData.success && setsData.sets) {
1646:                 const populateSelect = (sel, val) => {
1647:                     const cur = sel.value;
1648:                     sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- Select Set --</option>';
1649:                     setsData.sets.forEach(s => {
1650:                         sel.innerHTML += `<option value="${s.id}">${escapeHtml(s.name)}</option>`;
1651:                     });
1652:                     if (cur) sel.value = cur;
1653:                 };
1654:                 populateSelect(importSetSelector);
1655:                 populateSelect(importEditSetId);
1656:                 importSetSelector.value = String(result.id);
1657:             }
1658:             importNewSetName.value = '';
1659:             if (descInput) descInput.value = '';
1660:         } else {
1661:             alert(result.error || 'Error creating set');
1662:         }
1663:     });
1664: 
1665:     // Apply set mapping to all rows
1666:     importApplySetAll.addEventListener('change', () => {
1667:         if (importApplySetAll.checked && importSetSelector.value) {
1668:             const setName = importSetSelector.options[importSetSelector.selectedIndex]?.text || '';
1669:             importRows.forEach(row => {
1670:                 row._setName = setName;
1671:                 row.set_id = importSetSelector.value;
1672:             });
1673:             renderImportPreview();
1674:         }
1675:     });
1676: 
1677:     importSetSelector.addEventListener('change', () => {
1678:         if (importApplySetAll.checked && importSetSelector.value) {
1679:             const setName = importSetSelector.options[importSetSelector.selectedIndex]?.text || '';
1680:             importRows.forEach(row => {
1681:                 row._setName = setName;
1682:                 row.set_id = importSetSelector.value;
1683:             });
1684:             renderImportPreview();
1685:         }
1686:     });
1687: 
1688:     // Live preview update on editor field changes
1689:     function refreshImportPreviewFromEditor() {
1690:         if (importSelectedIdx >= 0 && importRows[importSelectedIdx]) {
1691:             const style = importEditStyle.value;
1692:             const extra = importEditExtra.value;
1693:             let correctAnswer = extra;
1694:             let example = extra;
1695:             if (style === 'multiple_choice') {
1696:                 correctAnswer = importEditCorrectIdx ? importEditCorrectIdx.value : '0';
1697:                 example = '';
1698:             }
1699:             const base = {
1700:                 title: importEditTitle.value,
1701:                 type: style,
1702:                 level: importEditLevel.value,
1703:                 definition: importEditDefinition.value,
1704:                 question_text: importEditDefinition.value,
1705:                 sentence: importEditDefinition.value,
1706:                 example1: example,
1707:                 usage1: example,
1708:                 tip: example,
1709:                 correct_answer: correctAnswer,
1710:             };
1711:             if (style === 'image_description') {
1712:                 base.image_url = importEditDefinition.value;
1713:                 base.description = extra;
1714:             } else if (style === 'audio_listening') {
1715:                 base.audio_url = importEditDefinition.value;
1716:                 base.transcript = extra;
1717:                 base.correct_answer = extra;
1718:             }
1719:             renderImportCardPreview(base);
1720:         }
1721:     }
1722:     function updateImportEditorFields() {
1723:         const style = importEditStyle.value;
1724:         if (!importEditDefGroup || !importEditExtraGroup || !importEditMcqFields) return;
1725:         const defLabel = importEditDefGroup.querySelector('.field-label');
1726:         const extraLabel = importEditExtraGroup.querySelector('.field-label');
1727:         importEditMcqFields.classList.add('hidden');
1728:         if (style === 'multiple_choice') {
1729:             importEditMcqFields.classList.remove('hidden');
1730:             if (defLabel) defLabel.textContent = 'Question Text';
1731:             if (extraLabel) extraLabel.textContent = 'Explanation';
1732:             importEditDefinition.placeholder = 'Question text for the MCQ...';
1733:             importEditExtra.placeholder = 'Explanation shown after answering...';
1734:         } else if (style === 'gap_fill') {
1735:             if (defLabel) defLabel.textContent = 'Sentence';
1736:             if (extraLabel) extraLabel.textContent = 'Correct Answers';
1737:             importEditDefinition.placeholder = 'Sentence with blank (_______)';
1738:             importEditExtra.placeholder = 'Comma-separated correct answers...';
1739:         } else if (style === 'image_description') {
1740:             if (defLabel) defLabel.textContent = 'Image URL';
1741:             if (extraLabel) extraLabel.textContent = 'Description';
1742:             importEditDefinition.placeholder = 'https://example.com/image.jpg';
1743:             importEditExtra.placeholder = 'Description shown on back...';
1744:         } else if (style === 'audio_listening') {
1745:             if (defLabel) defLabel.textContent = 'Audio URL';
1746:             if (extraLabel) extraLabel.textContent = 'Transcript / Answer';
1747:             importEditDefinition.placeholder = 'https://example.com/audio.mp3';
1748:             importEditExtra.placeholder = 'Transcript or comma-separated answers...';
1749:         } else {
1750:             if (defLabel) defLabel.textContent = 'Definition';
1751:             if (extraLabel) extraLabel.textContent = 'Example / Tip';
1752:             importEditDefinition.placeholder = 'Definition, notes...';
1753:             importEditExtra.placeholder = 'Example, usage1, or tip...';
1754:         }
1755:     }
1756: 
1757:     importEditStyle.addEventListener('change', () => {
1758:         updateImportEditorFields();
1759:         refreshImportPreviewFromEditor();
1760:     });
1761:     importEditTitle.addEventListener('input', refreshImportPreviewFromEditor);
1762:     importEditLevel.addEventListener('change', refreshImportPreviewFromEditor);
1763:     importEditDefinition.addEventListener('input', refreshImportPreviewFromEditor);
1764:     importEditExtra.addEventListener('input', refreshImportPreviewFromEditor);
1765:     [importEditOpt1, importEditOpt2, importEditOpt3, importEditOpt4, importEditCorrectIdx].forEach(el => {
1766:         if (el) el.addEventListener('input', refreshImportPreviewFromEditor);
1767:     });
1768: 
1769:     // Execute import
1770:     document.getElementById('importExecuteBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
1771:         const selectedRows = importRows.filter(r => r._selected !== false);
1772:         if (selectedRows.length === 0) { alert('No rows selected for import'); return; }
1773:         if (!confirm(`Import ${selectedRows.length} card${selectedRows.length > 1 ? 's' : ''}?`)) return;
1774: 
1775:         // Build CSV from selected rows
1776:         const csvCols = ['id', 'set', 'set_id', 'type', 'title', 'level', 'definition', 'question_text', 'sentence', 'example1', 'example2', 'usage1', 'tip', 'correct_answer', 'explanation', 'opt1', 'opt2', 'opt3', 'opt4', 'image_url', 'description', 'audio_url', 'prompt', 'transcript'];
1777:         const csvRows = [csvCols.join(',')];
1778: 
1779:         selectedRows.forEach(row => {
1780:             const vals = csvCols.map(col => {
1781:                 let val = '';
1782:                 if (col === 'id') {
1783:                     val = row.id || '';
1784:                 } else if (col === 'set') {
1785:                     val = row._setName || '';
1786:                 } else if (col === 'set_id') {
1787:                     val = row.set_id || '';
1788:                 } else if (col === 'type') {
1789:                     val = row.type || 'usage_cases';
1790:                 } else if (col === 'level') {
1791:                     val = row.level || 'Beginner';
1792:                 } else if (col === 'title') {
1793:                     val = row.title || '';
1794:                 } else if (col === 'definition' || col === 'question_text' || col === 'sentence') {
1795:                     val = row.definition || row.question_text || row.sentence || '';
1796:                 } else if (col === 'usage1' || col === 'tip') {
1797:                     val = row.usage1 || row.tip || '';
1798:                 } else if (col === 'example1' || col === 'example2') {
1799:                     val = row.example1 || row.example2 || '';
1800:                 } else if (col === 'image_url') {
1801:                     val = row.image_url || '';
1802:                 } else if (col === 'description') {
1803:                     val = row.description || '';
1804:                 } else if (col === 'audio_url') {
1805:                     val = row.audio_url || '';
1806:                 } else if (col === 'prompt') {
1807:                     val = row.prompt || '';
1808:                 } else if (col === 'transcript') {
1809:                     val = row.transcript || '';
1810:                 } else if (col === 'correct_answer') {
1811:                     val = row.correct_answer || '';
1812:                 } else if (col === 'opt1' || col === 'opt2' || col === 'opt3' || col === 'opt4') {
1813:                     val = row[col] || '';
1814:                 } else {
1815:                     val = row[col] || '';
1816:                 }
1817:                 // Escape CSV value
1818:                 if (val.includes(',') || val.includes('"') || val.includes('\n')) {
1819:                     val = '"' + val.replace(/"/g, '""') + '"';
1820:                 }
1821:                 return val;
1822:             });
1823:             csvRows.push(vals.join(','));
1824:         });
1825: 
1826:         const csvContent = csvRows.join('\n');
1827:         const blob = new Blob([csvContent], { type: 'text/csv' });
1828:         const formData = new FormData();
1829:         formData.append('csv', blob, (importFileHandle ? importFileHandle.name : 'import.csv'));
1830: 
1831:         try {
1832:             const response = await fetch('api/import_csv.php', { method: 'POST', body: formData });
1833:             const result = await response.json();
1834:             if (result.success) {
1835:                 let msg = `✅ Imported ${result.imported} cards.`;
1836:                 if (result.skipped > 0) msg += `\n⏭️ ${result.skipped} duplicate(s) skipped.`;
1837:                 if (result.errors.length) msg += `\n⚠️ ${result.errors.length} errors:\n` + result.errors.slice(0, 10).join('\n');
1838:                 if (result.errors.length > 10) msg += `\n...and ${result.errors.length - 10} more`;
1839:                 alert(msg);
1840:                 closeImportModal();
1841:                 await refreshSets();
1842:                 if (setSelector.value) loadCards(setSelector.value);
1843:             } else {
1844:                 alert('❌ Import failed: ' + (result.error || 'Unknown error'));
1845:             }
1846:         } catch (err) {
1847:             alert('❌ Network error during import');
1848:         }
1849:     });
1850: 
1851:     // === Test Card Popup ===
1852:     const testCardModal = document.getElementById('testCardModal');
1853:     const closeTestCardBtn = document.getElementById('closeTestCardBtn');
1854:     const testCardFront = document.getElementById('testCardFront');
1855:     const testCardBack = document.getElementById('testCardBack');
1856:     const testFlipBtn = document.getElementById('testFlipBtn');
1857:     const testMissBtn = document.getElementById('testMissBtn');
1858:     const testHitBtn = document.getElementById('testHitBtn');
1859:     const testCardFeedback = document.getElementById('testCardFeedback');
1860:     const testCardFeedbackMsg = document.getElementById('testCardFeedbackMsg');
1861:     const testCardFeedbackDetail = document.getElementById('testCardFeedbackDetail');
1862:     let testQuizState = {};
1863:     let testFlipped = false;
1864:     let testAnswered = false;
1865:     let _testCardData = null;
1866: 
1867:     function renderTestCardFront(card) {
1868:         const pattern = card.pattern_type;
1869:         const data = card.content_data || {};
1870:         const title = card.title || 'Flashcard';
1871: 
1872:         if (pattern === 'multiple_choice') {
1873:             const options = data.options || ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C'];
1874:             const gridClass = options.length > 3 ? 'grid gap-2' : 'space-y-2';
1875:             return `
1876:                 <div class="text-center w-full">
1877:                     <p class="text-base mb-2 font-bold">❓ ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(card.question_text || 'Select the correct answer:'))}</p>
1878:                     <div class="${gridClass}" id="testMcqOptions">
1879:                         ${options.map((opt, idx) => `<div class="quiz-option text-sm" data-idx="${idx}">${String.fromCharCode(65+idx)}. ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(opt))}</div>`).join('')}
1880:                     </div>
1881:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">👆 Tap your answer, then flip</p>
1882:                 </div>
1883:             `;
1884:         } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill') {
1885:             const sentence = data.sentence || 'Complete the sentence: ______';
1886:             return `
1887:                 <div class="text-center w-full">
1888:                     <p class="text-base mb-1 font-bold">✏️ Complete the sentence:</p>
1889:                     <p class="text-sm bg-gray-100 p-3 rounded-xl mb-1">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(sentence))}</p>
1890:                     <input type="text" id="testGapFillInput" placeholder="Type your answer..." class="w-full p-2 text-sm border-2 rounded-xl" autocomplete="off">
1891:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">👆 Type answer, then flip</p>
1892:                 </div>
1893:             `;
1894:         } else if (pattern === 'image_description') {
1895:             const imageUrl = data.image_url || '';
1896:             const hasImage = imageUrl && (imageUrl.startsWith('http://') || imageUrl.startsWith('https://'));
1897:             return `
1898:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[200px]">
1899:                     <h1 class="text-lg text-center font-bold marker-underline mb-2">🖼️ ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h1>
1900:                     ${hasImage ? `<img src="${escapeHtml(imageUrl)}" alt="${escapeHtml(title)}" class="max-h-32 rounded-lg shadow mb-1 object-contain" onerror="this.style.display='none'">` : `<div class="text-4xl mb-1">🖼️</div>`}
1901:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">👆 Tap card to flip</p>
1902:                 </div>
1903:             `;
1904:         } else if (pattern === 'audio_listening') {
1905:             const audioUrl = data.audio_url || '';
1906:             const hasAudio = audioUrl && (audioUrl.startsWith('http://') || audioUrl.startsWith('https://') || audioUrl.startsWith('uploads/'));
1907:             const prompt = data.prompt || '';
1908:             const isInteractive = !!(prompt || (data.correct_answers && data.correct_answers.length));
1909:             return `
1910:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[200px] w-full">
1911:                     <h1 class="text-lg text-center font-bold marker-underline mb-2">🎧 ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h1>
1912:                     ${hasAudio ? `<audio controls class="w-full max-w-xs mb-1" src="${escapeHtml(audioUrl)}">Your browser does not support audio.</audio>` : `<div class="text-4xl mb-1">🎧</div>`}
1913:                     ${prompt ? `<p class="text-xs bg-gray-100 p-2 rounded-xl mb-1">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(prompt))}</p>` : ''}
1914:                     ${isInteractive ? `<input type="text" id="testGapFillInput" placeholder="${data.transcript && !data.correct_answers ? 'Type what you hear...' : 'Type your answer...'}" class="w-full p-2 text-sm border-2 rounded-xl" autocomplete="off">` : ''}
1915:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">👆 Tap card to flip${isInteractive ? ' after answering' : ''}</p>

1922:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-3">👆 Tap card to flip</p>
1923:                 </div>
1924:             `;
1925:         }
1926:     }
1927: 
1928:     function renderTestCardBack(card) {
1929:         const data = card.content_data || {};
1930:         const pattern = card.pattern_type;
1931:         const title = card.title || 'Flashcard';
1932: 
1933:         if (pattern === 'multiple_choice') {
1934:             const options = data.options || ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C'];
1935:             const correctIdx = data.correct_index !== undefined ? data.correct_index : 1;
1936:             const correctAnswer = options[correctIdx];
1937:             const selectedIdx = testQuizState.selectedIdx;
1938:             const isCorrect = (selectedIdx === correctIdx);
1939:             const explanation = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.explanation || ''));
1940:             return `
1941:                 <div class="text-center w-full">
1942:                     <h3 class="text-base text-green-700 marker-underline mb-2">✓ Answer</h3>
1943:                     <div class="bg-green-50 p-2 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300 mb-2">
1944:                         <p class="text-sm font-bold">${String.fromCharCode(65+correctIdx)}. ${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(correctAnswer))}</p>
1945:                     </div>
1946:                     ${selectedIdx !== undefined && selectedIdx !== null ? `
1947:                     <div class="p-2 rounded-lg mb-2 ${isCorrect ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'}">
1948:                         <p class="text-sm">${isCorrect ? '✅ Correct!' : '❌ Incorrect'}</p>
1949:                     </div>
1950:                     ` : '<p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-2">You did not select an answer.</p>'}
1951:                     ${explanation ? `<div class="text-xs text-gray-600 mt-1 p-2 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">📝 ${explanation}</div>` : ''}
1952:                 </div>
1953:             `;
1954:         } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill') {
1955:             const correctAnswers = data.correct_answers || ['answer'];
1956:             const userAnswer = testQuizState.userAnswer || '';
1957:             const isMatch = correctAnswers.some(ans => ans.toLowerCase() === userAnswer.toLowerCase());
1958:             const example = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.example || ''));
1959:             return `
1960:                 <div class="text-center w-full">
1961:                     <h3 class="text-base text-green-700 marker-underline mb-2">✓ Correct Answer</h3>
1962:                     <div class="bg-green-50 p-2 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300 mb-2">
1963:                         <p class="text-sm font-bold">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(correctAnswers.join(' / ')))}</p>
1964:                     </div>
1965:                     ${userAnswer ? `
1966:                     <div class="p-2 rounded-lg mb-2 ${isMatch ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'}">
1967:                         <p class="text-sm">${isMatch ? '✅ Correct!' : '❌ Incorrect'}</p>
1968:                     </div>
1969:                     ` : '<p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-2">You did not type an answer.</p>'}
1970:                     ${example ? `<div class="text-xs text-gray-600 mt-1 p-2 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">📝 Example: ${example}</div>` : ''}
1971:                 </div>
1972:             `;
1973:         } else if (pattern === 'image_description') {
1974:             const description = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.description || 'No description'));
1975:             return `
1976:                 <div class="text-center w-full">
1977:                     <h3 class="text-base text-blue-700 marker-underline mb-2">${formatBreaks(escapeHtml(title))}</h3>
1978:                     <div class="bg-blue-50 p-2 rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-300">
1979:                         <p class="text-sm">${description}</p>
1980:                     </div>
1981:                 </div>
1982:             `;
1983:         } else if (pattern === 'audio_listening') {

1985:             const correctAnswers = data.correct_answers || [];
1986:             const userAnswer = testQuizState.userAnswer || '';
1987:             let isMatch = false;

14: try {
15:     $setId = null;
16:     $studentId = 0;
17:     $selectedLevels = [];
18:     $studentLevel = null;
19:     $randomMode = false;
20:     $setIds = [];
21: 
22:     $input = json_decode(file_get_contents('php://input'), true);
23:     if ($input) {
24:         $setId = isset($input['set_id']) ? (int) $input['set_id'] : null;
25:         $studentId = isset($input['student_id']) ? (int) $input['student_id'] : 0;
26:         $selectedLevels = isset($input['levels']) ? $input['levels'] : [];
27:         $randomMode = isset($input['random_mode']) && ($input['random_mode'] === true || $input['random_mode'] === 'true');
28:         $studentLevel = isset($input['student_level']) ? $input['student_level'] : null;
29:         $setIds = isset($input['set_ids']) ? (array) $input['set_ids'] : [];
30:         $dueOnly = !empty($input['due_only']) && $input['due_only'] !== 'false';
31:     }
32: 
33:     if (!$input) {
34:         $dueOnly = false;
35:         $setId = isset($_POST['set_id']) ? (int) $_POST['set_id'] : (isset($_GET['set_id']) ? (int) $_GET['set_id'] : null);
36:         $studentId = isset($_POST['student_id']) ? (int) $_POST['student_id'] : (isset($_GET['student_id']) ? (int) $_GET['student_id'] : 0);
37:         $randomMode = isset($_POST['random_mode']) ? ($_POST['random_mode'] === 'true') : (isset($_GET['random_mode']) ? ($_GET['random_mode'] === 'true') : false);
38:         $studentLevel = isset($_POST['student_level']) ? $_POST['student_level'] : (isset($_GET['student_level']) ? $_GET['student_level'] : null);
39: 
40:         if (isset($_POST['levels'])) {
41:             if (is_array($_POST['levels'])) {
42:                 $selectedLevels = $_POST['levels'];
43:             } else {
44:                 $selectedLevels = json_decode($_POST['levels'], true);
45:                 if (!is_array($selectedLevels)) {
46:                     $selectedLevels = explode(',', $_POST['levels']);
47:                 }
48:             }
49:         } elseif (isset($_GET['levels'])) {
50:             if (is_array($_GET['levels'])) {
51:                 $selectedLevels = $_GET['levels'];
52:             } else {
53:                 $selectedLevels = explode(',', $_GET['levels']);
54:             }
55:         }
56:         if (isset($_POST['set_ids'])) {
57:             $setIds = is_array($_POST['set_ids']) ? $_POST['set_ids'] : explode(',', $_POST['set_ids']);
58:         } elseif (isset($_GET['set_ids'])) {
59:             $setIds = explode(',', $_GET['set_ids']);
60:         }
61:         $dueOnly = !empty($_POST['due_only']) || !empty($_GET['due_only']);
62:     }
63: 
64:     if (empty($selectedLevels)) {
65:         if ($studentLevel && $studentLevel !== '') {
66:             $selectedLevels = [$studentLevel, 'Beginner', 'Intermediate', 'Advanced'];
67:         } else {
68:             $selectedLevels = ['Beginner', 'Intermediate', 'Advanced'];
69:         }
70:     }
71: 
72:     Review::ensureTable();
73:     Review::checkAndResetCycle($studentId);
74: 
75:     $totalAvailable = 0;
76:     $pdo = Database::getConnection();
77:     $countSql = "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cards c WHERE 1=1";
78:     $countParams = [];
79: 
80:     if (!$randomMode && $setId !== null && $setId > 0) {
81:         $countSql .= " AND c.set_id = ?";
82:         $countParams[] = $setId;
83:     } elseif (!$randomMode && ($setId === null || $setId === 0)) {
84:         $countSql .= " AND c.set_id = 1";
85:     }
86:     if ($randomMode && !empty($setIds)) {
87:         $placeholders = implode(',', array_fill(0, count($setIds), '?'));
88:         $countSql .= " AND c.set_id IN ($placeholders)";
89:         foreach ($setIds as $sid) {
90:             $countParams[] = (int) $sid;
91:         }
92:     }
93:     if (!empty($selectedLevels)) {
94:         $placeholders = implode(',', array_fill(0, count($selectedLevels), '?'));
95:         $countSql .= " AND c.level IN ($placeholders)";
96:         foreach ($selectedLevels as $lvl) {
97:             $countParams[] = $lvl;
98:         }
99:     }
100:     $stmt = $pdo->prepare($countSql);
101:     $stmt->execute($countParams);
102:     $totalAvailable = (int) $stmt->fetchColumn();
103: 
104:     $cards = Card::getBySetAndLevels($setId, $selectedLevels, $randomMode, 500, $studentId, !empty($setIds) ? $setIds : null);
105: 
106:     if ($dueOnly && $studentId > 0) {
107:         $dueStmt = $pdo->prepare("SELECT card_id FROM user_card_progress WHERE user_id = ? AND next_review <= CURDATE()");
108:         $dueStmt->execute([$studentId]);
109:         $dueIds = $dueStmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_COLUMN);
110:         $dueIds = array_map('intval', $dueIds);
111:         $cards = array_values(array_filter($cards, fn($c) => in_array((int)$c['id'], $dueIds)));
112:     }
113: 
114:     // Attach progress data for interval previews on rating buttons
115:     if ($studentId > 0 && !empty($cards)) {
116:         $ids = array_column($cards, 'id');
117:         $ph = implode(',', array_fill(0, count($ids), '?'));
118:         $ps = $pdo->prepare("SELECT card_id, ease_factor, interval_days, repetitions FROM user_card_progress WHERE user_id = ? AND card_id IN ($ph)");
119:         $ps->execute(array_merge([$studentId], $ids));
120:         $pmap = [];
121:         foreach ($ps->fetchAll() as $r) { $pmap[$r['card_id']] = $r; }
122:         foreach ($cards as &$c) { $c['progress'] = $pmap[$c['id']] ?? null; }
123:         unset($c);
124:     }
125: 
126:     $allDueReviewed = $totalAvailable > 0 && empty($cards);
127: 
128:     $setName = null;
129:     if (!$randomMode && $setId !== null && $setId > 0) {
130:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
131:         $stmt = $pdo->prepare("SELECT name FROM card_sets WHERE id = ?");
132:         $stmt->execute([$setId]);
133:         $row = $stmt->fetch();
134:         $setName = $row ? $row['name'] : null;
135:     }
136: 
137:     echo json_encode([
138:         'success' => true,
139:         'cards' => $cards,
140:         'count' => count($cards),
141:         'set_id' => $setId,
142:         'set_name' => $setName,
143:         'random_mode' => $randomMode,
144:         'levels_used' => $selectedLevels,
145:         'all_due_reviewed' => $allDueReviewed,
146:         'total_available' => $totalAvailable,
147:     ]);

150:         'success' => false,
151:         'error' => 'Database error: ' . $e->getMessage(),
152:         'cards' => [],
153:     ]);
154: }

1: -- Migration: Add full_name to users table
2: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS full_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER username;
3: 
4: -- Change username length from 50 to 30 (if needed)
5: ALTER TABLE users MODIFY username VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL;
6: 
7: -- Set full_name to username for existing records where full_name is empty
8: UPDATE users SET full_name = username WHERE full_name = '' OR full_name IS NULL;
9: 
10: -- Create review_history table for full audit trail
11: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS review_history (
12:     id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
13:     user_id INT NOT NULL,
14:     card_id INT NOT NULL,
15:     quality INT NOT NULL,
16:     was_correct TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,
17:     reviewed_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
18:     FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
19:     FOREIGN KEY (card_id) REFERENCES cards(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
20: );
21: 
22: -- Create student_set_access table for per-student set visibility
23: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS student_set_access (
24:     user_id INT NOT NULL,
25:     set_id INT NOT NULL,
26:     PRIMARY KEY (user_id, set_id),
27:     FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
28:     FOREIGN KEY (set_id) REFERENCES card_sets(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
29: );

<path>/home/leonardo/Documents/Personal/Inglês/Aulas/materialLeo/ankiCards/flashcards/import/CSV_STRUCTURE_FOR_AI.md</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: # CSV Structure for Flashcard Import
2: 
3: ## Common Columns (all card types)
4: 
5: | Column   | Description |
6: |----------|------------|
7: | `id`     | Leave empty for new cards, or set an existing ID to update |
8: | `set`    | Card set name — if the set doesn't exist, it is **created automatically** during import |
9: | `set_id` | Optional numeric set ID. If both `set` and `set_id` are given, `set` takes priority |
10: | `type`   | Card pattern: `usage_cases`, `deep_dive`, `formula_table`, `multiple_choice`, `gap_fill`  |
11: | `title`  | The word, phrase, or main subject of the card |
12: | `level`  | `A1` `A2` `B1` `B2` `C1` `C2` (will be mapped to Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced on import) |
13: 
14: ## Level Mapping
15: 
16: | CSV value    | Stored as      |
17: |--------------|----------------|
18: | `A1` or `A2` | `Beginner`     |
19: | `B1` or `B2` | `Intermediate` |
20: | `C1` or `C2` | `Advanced`     |
21: 
22: You can also use `Beginner`, `Intermediate`, `Advanced` directly.
23: 
24: ## Type-Specific Fields
25: 
26: ### usage_cases (Pure Text — Usage Cases)
27: Shows the word, then reveals definition, usage context, example, and tip.
28: 
29: | Column       | Required | Description |
30: |--------------|----------|-------------|
31: | `definition` | yes      | The definition or explanation of the word |
32: | `usage1`     | yes      | Usage context (when/where to use this word) |
33: | `example1`   | yes      | Example sentence (max 4: `example1` to `example4`) |
34: | `tip`        | if >=b2  | Extra tip or memory aid |
35: 
36: ### deep_dive (Pure Text — Deep Dive)
37: Shows the word, then reveals definition and example.
38: 
39: | Column       | Required | Description |
40: |--------------|----------|-------------|
41: | `definition` | yes      | Deep definition or explanation |
42: | `example1`   | yes      | Example sentence (max 4: `example1` to `example4`) |
43: | `tip`        | yes      | Extra note |
44: 
45: ### formula_table (Pure Text — Formula Table)
46: Shows the word, then reveals definition and example.
47: 
48: | Column       | Required | Description |
49: |--------------|----------|-------------|
50: | `definition` | yes      | The formula, structure, or rule |
51: | `example1`   | yes      | Example sentence (max 4: `example1` to `example4`) |
52: | `tip`        | yes      | Extra note |
53: 
54: ### multiple_choice (Quiz)
55: Shows a question with clickable answer options.
56: 
57: | Column           | Required | Description |
58: |------------------|----------|-------------|
59: | `question_text`  | yes      | The question to display (e.g. "Which tense is correct?") |
60: | `opt1`           | yes      | Answer option 1 (max 4 options: `opt1` to `opt4`) |
61: | `opt2`           | yes      | Answer option 2 |
62: | `opt3`           | no       | Answer option 3 |
63: | `opt4`           | no       | Answer option 4 |
64: | `correct_answer` | yes      | Zero-based index of the correct option (0, 1, 2, or 3) |
65: | `explanation`    | no       | Text shown after answering explaining why it's correct |
66: 
67: ### gap_fill (Quiz)
68: Shows a sentence with a blank, user types the answer.
69: 
70: | Column           | Required | Description |
71: |------------------|----------|-------------|
72: | `sentence`       | yes      | The sentence with `______` indicating the blank |
73: | `correct_answer` | yes      | One correct answer, or multiple comma-separated (e.g. `go,goes,went`) |
74: | `example1`       | no       | Example sentence (max 4) |
75: 
76: ## Example CSV
77: 
78: ```
79: id,set,type,title,level,question_text,definition,sentence,opt1,opt2,opt3,opt4,correct_answer,explanation,example1,example2,usage1,tip
80: ,Phrasal Verbs,usage_cases,break down,A1,,"To stop functioning (machine) or to lose control emotionally",,,,,,,,"The car broke down on the highway","My computer broke down",When talking about machines or emotions,
81: ,Phrasal Verbs,gap_fill,break up,B1,,,"They decided to ______ after five years",break up,,,,,,"She broke up with him last week",,
82: ,Tenses,multiple_choice,Present Perfect,B1,"Which sentence uses Present Perfect correctly?",,,,,opt1,opt2,opt3,opt4,2,"Present Perfect uses 'have/has + past participle'",,,,
83: ```
84: 
85: ## Notes
86: - Empty cells are fine for unused fields
87: - The import automatically creates any set name that doesn't exist yet
88: - Text fields support `\br` (backslash + br) for line breaks
89: - Max 4 example sentences (`example1`–`example4`) and max 4 multiple-choice options (`opt1`–`opt4`)
90: - The `correct_answer` for gap_fill accepts comma-separated alternatives: `go,goes,went`
91: - Import endpoint: `api/import_csv.php` (admin-only, via the admin panel)

(End of file - total 91 lines)
</content>
```

28:     .level-picker { font-size: clamp(0.7rem, 3vw, 0.85rem); padding: 4px 12px; }

32:     .back-content h3 { font-size: clamp(1rem, 4vw, 1.2rem) !important; }

37: }

40:     background-image: radial-gradient(#f0f0f0 1px, transparent 0);
41:     background-size: 30px 30px;
42:     border: 8px solid #374151;
43:     border-radius: 4px;
44:     box-shadow: inset 0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.03), 12px 12px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
45:     animation: cardFadeIn 0.3s ease-out;
46: }
47: @keyframes cardFadeIn {
48:     from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(12px); }
49:     to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
50: }
51: @keyframes fadeIn {
52:     from { opacity: 0; }
53:     to { opacity: 1; }
54: }
55: @keyframes confettiFall {
56:     0% { transform: translateY(-10vh) rotate(0deg); opacity: 1; }
57:     100% { transform: translateY(110vh) rotate(720deg); opacity: 0; }
58: }
59: @keyframes popIn {
60:     0% { transform: scale(0); opacity: 0; }
61:     70% { transform: scale(1.15); }
62:     100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
63: }
64: @keyframes streakGlow {
65:     0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.5); }
66:     50% { box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.8); }
67: }
68: .confetti-piece {
69:     position: fixed;
70:     width: 10px;
71:     height: 10px;
72:     z-index: 9999;
73:     pointer-events: none;
74:     animation: confettiFall 3s ease-in forwards;
75: }
76: .streak-badge {
77:     animation: streakGlow 2s infinite;
78:     background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fbbf24, #f59e0b);
79:     border-radius: 40px;
80:     padding: 4px 14px;
81:     display: inline-block;
82:     font-weight: bold;
83:     color: #78350f;
84: }
85: .streak-badge::before {
86:     content: '🔥 ';
87: }
88: .screen-fade-in {
89:     animation: fadeIn 0.25s ease-in;
90: }
91: .celebration-pop {
92:     animation: popIn 0.5s ease-out;
93: }
94: .marker-border { border: 3px solid #1f2937; border-radius: 255px 15px 225px 15px/15px 225px 15px 255px; }
95: .marker-underline { display: inline-block; position: relative; }
96: .marker-underline::after { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 0; bottom: -6px; width: 100%; height: 6px; background: #be123c; border-radius: 100% 5% 100% 5%; opacity: 0.7; }
97: .flashcard-container { perspective: 1600px; }
98: .flashcard { transition: transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); transform-style: preserve-3d; min-height: 400px; position: relative; cursor: pointer; }
99: .flashcard.flipped { transform: rotateY(180deg); }
100: .card-front, .card-back { backface-visibility: hidden; border-radius: 1rem; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; overflow-y: auto; }
101: .card-front { transform: rotateY(0deg); z-index: 2; background: white; }
102: .card-back { transform: rotateY(180deg); background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fef9e8, #ffffff); overflow-y: auto; }
103: 
104: .card-back::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; }
105: .card-back::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #f1f1f1; border-radius: 10px; }
106: .card-back::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #cbd5e1; border-radius: 10px; }
107: 
108: .quiz-option { 
109:     transition: all 0.2s; 
110:     border: 2px solid #e2e8f0; 
111:     cursor: pointer; 
112:     padding: 8px 12px;
113:     margin: 4px 0;
114:     border-radius: 12px;
115:     background: white;
116:     font-size: clamp(0.85rem, 2.5vw, 1rem);
117: }
118: .quiz-option.selected { background: #dbeafe; border-color: #1d4ed8; }
119: .quiz-option.correct-highlight { background: #dcfce7; border-color: #15803d; }
120: .quiz-option.wrong-highlight { background: #fee2e2; border-color: #be123c; }
121: .btn-chalk { transition: all 0.15s; box-shadow: 3px 3px 0px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); cursor: pointer; border: none; }
122: .btn-chalk:hover { transform: translateY(2px); box-shadow: 1px 1px 0px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); }
123: .btn-chalk:active { transform: translateY(3px); box-shadow: 0px 0px 0px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); }
124: .flip-btn { cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; background: #f1f5f9; border: 2px solid #64748b; }
125: .flip-btn:active { transform: scale(0.96); }
126: .flip-btn.hidden-btn { display: none; }
127: .progress-bar-container { background: #e2e8f0; border-radius: 20px; height: 10px; position: relative; overflow: visible; }
128: .progress-bar-container .pct-label { position: absolute; left: 6px; top: -5px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: #dc2626; white-space: nowrap; z-index: 1; text-shadow: 0 0 4px rgba(255,255,255,0.9), 0 0 8px rgba(255,255,255,0.7); }
129: .progress-bar-fill { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #3b82f6, #2563eb, #7c3aed); height: 100%; border-radius: 20px; transition: width 0.4s ease; position: relative; }
130: .level-chip { background: #e0e7ff; color: #1e3a8a; border-radius: 40px; padding: 4px 12px; display: inline-block; font-size: clamp(0.65rem, 1.8vw, 0.75rem); }
131: .student-badge { background: #dbeafe; color: #1e40af; border-radius: 40px; padding: 4px 12px; display: inline-block; font-size: clamp(0.7rem, 2vw, 0.8rem); }
132: .loader { border: 3px solid #e2e8f0; border-top: 3px solid #1d4ed8; border-radius: 50%; width: 40px; height: 40px; animation: spin 0.7s linear infinite; display: inline-block; }
133: @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
134: 
135: .card-word { 
136:     font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3rem); 
137:     text-align: center; 
138:     word-break: break-word;
139:     line-height: 1.2;
140: }
141: 
142: .card-definition { 
143:     font-size: clamp(0.95rem, 2.2vw, 1.2rem); 
144:     text-align: left; 
145:     line-height: 1.3;
146:     margin-top: 8px;
147: }
148: .back-content {
149:     max-height: 100%;
150:     overflow-y: auto;
151:     padding: 4px;
152: }
153: .answer-large {
154:     font-size: clamp(1rem, 3vw, 1.4rem);
155:     font-weight: bold;
156:     text-align: center;
157:     padding: 8px;
158: }
159: .context-hint { 
160:     font-size: clamp(0.7rem, 1.8vw, 0.8rem); 
161:     color: #6b7280; 
162:     margin-top: 4px; 
163:     margin-bottom: 6px;
164:     text-align: center;
165:     animation: fadeIn 0.3s ease-in;
166: }
167: .admin-link {
168:     position: fixed;
169:     bottom: 20px;
170:     left: 20px;
171:     background: #1f2937;
172:     color: white;
173:     padding: 8px 16px;
174:     border-radius: 40px;
175:     text-decoration: none;
176:     font-size: clamp(0.65rem, 1.8vw, 0.8rem);
177:     z-index: 100;
178:     font-family: 'Bubble Sans', sans-serif !important;
179:     transition: background 0.2s;
180: }
181: .admin-link:hover { background: #374151; }
182: 
183: .text-2xs { font-size: 0.6rem; line-height: 0.9rem; }
184: 
185: .card-back p, .card-back li, .card-back div, .card-back span {
186:     font-size: clamp(0.8rem, 2vw, 12pt);
187:     line-height: 1.3;
188: }
189: .card-back h3 {
190:     font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 3vw, 1.6rem);
191: }
192: .card-back .answer-large {
193:     font-size: clamp(1rem, 3vw, 1.4rem);
194: }
195: .level-picker-active {
196:     background-color: #1d4ed8 !important;
197:     color: white !important;
198:     border-color: #1e3a8a !important;
199: }
200: 
201: .progress-bar-container .progress-pulse {
202:     animation: pulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
203: }
204: @keyframes pulse {
205:     0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
206:     50% { opacity: 0.6; }
207: }
208: 
209: .kb-hint {
210:     display: inline-block;
211:     background: #f1f5f9;
212:     border: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
213:     border-radius: 4px;
214:     padding: 0 5px;
215:     font-size: 11px;
216:     color: #475569;
217: }
218: 
219: @media (max-width: 480px) {
220:     .flashcard-container { min-height: 320px !important; }
221:     .flashcard { min-height: 320px !important; }
222:     .card-front, .card-back { padding: 8px !important; }
223:     #againBtn, #goodBtn, #easyBtn { font-size: clamp(0.55rem, 2.5vw, 0.7rem) !important; padding: 4px 8px !important; }
224:     .flip-btn { font-size: clamp(0.55rem, 2.5vw, 0.7rem) !important; padding: 3px 8px !important; }
225:     .progress-bar-container { height: 8px; }
226:     .progress-bar-container .pct-label { left: 4px; font-size: 9px; }
227: }
228: 
229: @media (max-width: 380px) {
230:     .quiz-option { padding: 6px !important; margin: 4px 0 !important; }
231:     .card-word { font-size: clamp(1.3rem, 6vw, 1.6rem) !important; }
232:     #launchStudyBtn { font-size: clamp(0.85rem, 4.5vw, 1rem) !important; }

381: .set-item .set-desc-input { width: 100%; margin-top: 4px; font-size: 0.8rem; }
382: .set-item .set-meta { margin-top: 2px; }
383: .whiteboard-card {
384:     background: #ffffff;
385:     border: 8px solid #374151;
386:     border-radius: 4px;
387:     box-shadow: inset 0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.03), 12px 12px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
388: }
389: .hidden { display: none !important; }
390: 
391: @media (max-width: 1024px) {
392:     .editor-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
393:     .user-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
394:     .card-list { max-height: 300px; }
395: }
396: 
397: /* === Import CSV Modal === */
398: .import-modal-content {
399:     background: white;
400:     border-radius: 12px;
401:     padding: 20px;
402:     max-width: 1400px;
403:     width: 95%;
404:     max-height: 90vh;
405:     overflow-y: auto;
406:     box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
407:     display: flex;
408:     flex-direction: column;
409:     gap: 12px;
410: }
411: .import-header {
412:     display: flex;
413:     justify-content: space-between;
414:     align-items: center;
415:     padding-bottom: 10px;
416:     border-bottom: 2px solid #e5e7eb;
417: }
418: .import-file-area {
419:     border: 3px dashed #d1d5db;
420:     border-radius: 12px;
421:     padding: 40px 20px;
422:     text-align: center;
423:     cursor: pointer;
424:     transition: all 0.2s;
425:     background: #f9fafb;
426: }
427: .import-file-area:hover,
428: .import-file-area.dragover {
429:     border-color: #2563eb;
430:     background: #eff6ff;
431: }
432: .import-toolbar {
433:     display: flex;
434:     justify-content: space-between;
435:     align-items: center;
436:     flex-wrap: wrap;
437:     gap: 8px;
438:     padding: 8px 0;
439: }
440: .import-mapping-bar {
441:     background: #f9fafb;
442:     border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
443:     border-radius: 8px;
444:     padding: 10px 14px;
445: }
446: .import-records-container {
447:     max-height: 280px;
448:     overflow-y: auto;
449:     border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
450:     border-radius: 8px;
451: }
452: .import-table {
453:     width: 100%;
454:     border-collapse: collapse;
455:     font-size: 0.8rem;
456: }
457: .import-table th {
458:     text-align: left;
459:     padding: 8px 10px;
460:     background: #f3f4f6;
461:     border-bottom: 2px solid #e5e7eb;
462:     font-size: 0.7rem;
463:     text-transform: uppercase;
464:     color: #6b7280;
465:     position: sticky;
466:     top: 0;
467:     z-index: 1;
468: }
469: .import-table td {
470:     padding: 6px 10px;
471:     border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6;
472:     vertical-align: middle;
473: }
474: .import-table tr:hover td {
475:     background: #f9fafb;
476: }
477: .import-table tr.selected td {
478:     background: #eff6ff;
479: }
480: .import-table .import-row-title {
481:     font-weight: 600;
482:     color: #1f2937;
483: }
484: .import-editor-panel {
485:     background: #f9fafb;
486:     border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
487:     border-radius: 8px;
488:     padding: 14px;
489: }
490: .import-edit-grid {
491:     display: grid;
492:     grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
493:     gap: 8px;
494: }
495: 
496: .import-body {
497:     display: flex;
498:     gap: 12px;
499:     min-height: 0;
500: }
501: .import-left {
502:     flex: 0 0 65%;
503:     display: flex;
504:     flex-direction: column;
505:     gap: 10px;
506:     min-width: 0;
507: }
508: .import-right {
509:     flex: 0 0 35%;
510:     min-width: 0;
511: }
512: 
513: .import-preview-panel {
514:     background: white;
515:     border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
516:     border-radius: 8px;
517:     padding: 14px;
518:     position: sticky;
519:     top: 0;
520: }
521: 
522: .import-flip-card {
523:     border-radius: 10px;
524:     overflow: hidden;
525:     display: flex;
526:     flex-direction: column;
527:     gap: 6px;
528: }
529: .import-flip-front,
530: .import-flip-back {
531:     min-height: 120px;
532:     display: flex;
533:     flex-direction: column;
534:     align-items: center;
535:     justify-content: center;
536:     padding: 16px;
537:     border-radius: 8px;
538:     border: 2px solid #e5e7eb;
539: }
540: .import-flip-front {
541:     background: white;
542: }
543: .import-flip-back {
544:     background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fef9e8, #ffffff);
545: }
546: 
547: /* Import row checkbox */
548: .import-row-checkbox {
549:     width: 16px;
550:     height: 16px;
551:     cursor: pointer;
552:     accent-color: #2563eb;
553: }
554: .import-table tr.dimmed td {
555:     opacity: 0.45;
556:     transition: opacity 0.15s;
557: }
558: 
559: /* === Test Card Modal === */
560: .test-card-content {
561:     background: white;
562:     border-radius: 12px;
563:     padding: 24px;
564:     max-width: 480px;
565:     width: 90%;
566:     box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
567: }
568: .test-card-header {
569:     display: flex;
570:     justify-content: space-between;
571:     align-items: center;
572:     margin-bottom: 16px;
573: }
574: .test-card-body {
575:     display: flex;
576:     flex-direction: column;
577:     gap: 16px;
578: }
579: .test-card-flip-card {
580:     position: relative;
581:     perspective: 1000px;
582:     min-height: 260px;
583: }
584: .test-card-front, .test-card-back {
585:     background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0f9ff, #ffffff);
586:     border: 2px solid #e5e7eb;
587:     border-radius: 12px;
588:     padding: 20px;
589:     min-height: 240px;
590:     display: flex;
591:     align-items: center;
592:     justify-content: center;
593:     transition: transform 0.3s;
594: }
595: .test-card-back {
596:     background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fef9e8, #ffffff);
597:     border-color: #fde68a;
598: }
599: .test-card-controls {
600:     display: flex;
601:     gap: 8px;
602:     justify-content: center;
603: }
604: .test-card-feedback {
605:     text-align: center;
606:     padding: 12px;
607:     border-radius: 8px;
608: }
609: .test-card-feedback.hit {
610:     background: #f0fdf4;
611:     border: 2px solid #86efac;
612: }
613: .test-card-feedback.miss {
614:     background: #fef2f2;
615:     border: 2px solid #fca5a5;
616: }
617: 
618: @media (max-width: 1024px) {
619:     .import-body { flex-direction: column; }
620:     .import-right { width: 100%; }
621:     .import-flip-front, .import-flip-back { min-height: 100px; }
622: }
623: @media (max-width: 768px) {
624:     .import-modal-content { padding: 12px; width: 98%; }
625:     .import-edit-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
626:     .import-table { font-size: 0.7rem; }
627:     .import-table th, .import-table td { padding: 4px 6px; }
628:     .import-records-container { max-height: 180px; }
629:     .import-flip-front, .import-flip-back { min-height: 80px; }
630: }

2019:     function openTestCardModal(card) {
2020:         _testCardData = card || null;
2021:         if (!card) {
2022:             const title = editTitle.value.trim() || 'Flashcard';
2023:             const patternType = editPatternType.value;
2024:             const contentData = getCurrentContentData();
2025:             card = {
2026:                 title,
2027:                 pattern_type: patternType,
2028:                 question_text: patternType === 'multiple_choice' ? contentData.question_text : '',
2029:                 content_data: contentData
2030:             };
2031:         }
2032:         testQuizState = {};
2033:         testFlipped = false;
2034:         testAnswered = false;
2035: 
2036:         testCardFront.innerHTML = renderTestCardFront(card);
2037:         testCardBack.classList.add('hidden');
2038:         testCardBack.innerHTML = renderTestCardBack(card);

2050:                     el.addEventListener('click', function () {
2051:                         document.querySelectorAll('#testMcqOptions .quiz-option').forEach(o => o.classList.remove('selected'));
2052:                         this.classList.add('selected');
2053:                         testQuizState.selectedIdx = parseInt(this.getAttribute('data-idx'));
2054:                         testAnswered = true;
2055:                     });
2056:                 });
2057:             }, 50);
2058:         }
2059:     }
2060:

2062:         testCardModal.classList.add('hidden');
2063:         testQuizState = {};

2065:         testAnswered = false;
2066:         _testCardData = null;

2070:         if (testFlipped) return;

2072:         const pattern = card.pattern_type;
2073:         // Capture answer before flipping
2074:         if (pattern === 'multiple_choice') {
2075:             const selected = document.querySelector('#testMcqOptions .quiz-option.selected');
2076:             if (selected) {
2077:                 testQuizState.selectedIdx = parseInt(selected.getAttribute('data-idx'));
2078:                 testAnswered = true;
2079:             }
2080:         } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill' || pattern === 'audio_listening') {
2081:             const input = document.getElementById('testGapFillInput');
2082:             if (input) {
2083:                 testQuizState.userAnswer = input.value.trim();
2084:                 testAnswered = true;
2085:             }
2086:         } else {
2087:             testAnswered = true;
2088:         }
2089: 
2090:         testCardFront.classList.add('hidden');
2091:         testCardBack.classList.remove('hidden');
2092:         testFlipBtn.classList.add('hidden');
2093:         testMissBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
2094:         testHitBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
2095:         testFlipped = true;
2096:     });
2097: 
2098:     function evaluateTestCard() {
2099:         const card = _testCardData;
2100:         const pattern = card ? card.pattern_type : editPatternType.value;
2101:         const data = card ? card.content_data : getCurrentContentData();
2102:         let isCorrect = false;
2103: 
2104:         if (pattern === 'multiple_choice') {
2105:             const correctIdx = data.correct_index !== undefined ? data.correct_index : 1;
2106:             isCorrect = (testQuizState.selectedIdx === correctIdx);
2107:         } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill') {
2108:             const correctAnswers = data.correct_answers || ['answer'];
2109:             isCorrect = correctAnswers.some(ans => ans.toLowerCase() === (testQuizState.userAnswer || '').toLowerCase());
2110:         } else if (pattern === 'audio_listening') {
2111:             const correctAnswers = data.correct_answers || [];
2112:             const userAnswer = testQuizState.userAnswer || '';
2113:             if (correctAnswers.length) {
2114:                 isCorrect = correctAnswers.some(ans => ans.toLowerCase() === userAnswer.toLowerCase());
2115:             } else if (data.transcript) {
2116:                 isCorrect = data.transcript.toLowerCase().trim() === userAnswer.toLowerCase().trim();
2117:             } else {
2118:                 isCorrect = true;
2119:             }
2120:         } else {
2121:             isCorrect = true;
2122:         }
2123: 
2124:         testHitBtn.classList.add('hidden');
2125:         testMissBtn.classList.add('hidden');
2126:         testCardFeedback.classList.remove('hidden', 'hit', 'miss');
2127:         testCardFeedback.classList.add(isCorrect ? 'hit' : 'miss');
2128:         testCardFeedbackMsg.textContent = isCorrect ? '✅ Hit! You got it right.' : '❌ Miss. Review this card.';
2129:         testCardFeedbackDetail.textContent = isCorrect
2130:             ? 'Great job! This card would count as a hit in real study.'
2131:             : 'You would need to review this card again. Keep studying!';
2132:     }
2133: 
2134:     testMissBtn?.addEventListener('click', evaluateTestCard);
2135:     testHitBtn?.addEventListener('click', evaluateTestCard);

2138:     testCardModal?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {

34:     $handle = fopen($_FILES['csv']['tmp_name'], 'r');

59:     $imported = 0;

141:                 'question_text' => $questionText ?: 'Select the correct answer:',
142:                 'explanation' => $explanation,
143:             ];
144:         } elseif ($type === 'gap_fill') {
145:             $answers = !empty($correctAnswer) ? array_map('trim', explode(',', $correctAnswer)) : ['answer'];
146:             $contentData = [
147:                 'sentence' => $sentence ?: 'Complete: ______',
148:                 'correct_answers' => $answers,
149:                 'example' => $examples[0] ?? '',
150:             ];
151:         } elseif ($type === 'image_description') {
152:             $imageUrl = trim($data['image_url'] ?? '');
153:             $description = trim($data['description'] ?? '');
154:             $contentData = [
155:                 'image_url' => $imageUrl ?: '',
156:                 'description' => $description ?: 'No description',
157:             ];
158:         } elseif ($type === 'audio_listening') {
159:             $audioUrl = trim($data['audio_url'] ?? '');
160:             $prompt = trim($data['prompt'] ?? '');
161:             $transcript = trim($data['transcript'] ?? '');
162:             $correctAnswerRaw = trim($data['correct_answer'] ?? '');
163:             $contentData = [
164:                 'audio_url' => $audioUrl ?: '',
165:                 'prompt' => $prompt ?: '',
166:                 'transcript' => $transcript ?: '',
167:             ];
168:             if (!empty($correctAnswerRaw)) {
169:                 $contentData['correct_answers'] = array_map('trim', explode(',', $correctAnswerRaw));
170:             }
171:         } else {
172:             // ** Pure text types: usage_cases, deep_dive, formula_table **
173:             $contentData = [
174:                 'definition' => $definition ?: 'No definition',
175:             ];
176:             if (!empty($usage1)) $contentData['usage1'] = $usage1;
177:             if (!empty($examples)) $contentData['example1a'] = $examples[0];
178:             if (!empty($tip)) $contentData['tip'] = $tip;
179:             if (count($examples) > 1) $contentData['example'] = $examples[1] ?? $examples[0];
180:         }
181: 
182:         if ($type === 'usage_cases' && empty($usage1) && !empty($examples)) {
183:             $contentData['usage1'] = $examples[0];
184:         }
185: 
186:         $cardId = isset($data['id']) && is_numeric($data['id']) ? (int) $data['id'] : 0;
187: 
188:         if ($cardId === 0 && Card::findDuplicate($setId, $title, $type) !== null) {
189:             $skipped++;
190:             continue;
191:         }
192: 
193:         Card::save([
194:             'id' => $cardId,
195:             'set_id' => $setId,
196:             'title' => $title,
197:             'pattern_type' => $type,
198:             'level' => $level,
199:             'question_text' => $type === 'multiple_choice' ? $questionText : '',
200:             'content_data' => $contentData,
201:         ]);
202:         $imported++;
203:     }
204: 
205:     fclose($handle);
206: 
207:     echo json_encode([
208:         'success' => true,
209:         'imported' => $imported,
210:         'skipped' => $skipped,
211:         'errors' => $errors,
212:     ]);
213: } catch (Exception $e) {
214:     echo json_encode([
215:         'success' => false,
216:         'error' => $e->getMessage(),
217:     ]);
218: }

(End of file - total 218 lines)
</content>
```
